| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/73543311-8390-41cd-89d6-f95ca4662c0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump's reign of authoritarian terror began 2 weeks ago when his administration declared martial law over the District of Columbia--deploying the DC National Guard, federalizing the police force, and flooding the streets with FBI, DEA, ATF, ICE, and other federal agencies. His justification? To curb what he claimed was "one of the Highest Rates of Crime in the World, more than many of the most violent Third World Countries" with a "Homicide Rate... higher than places notorious for their violence, such as Mexico City, Bogota, Islamabad, and Addis Ababa -- almost ten times higher than Fallujah, Iraq."
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9fd55cf1-114b-4a1f-91fb-2af857fe3c49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ieXRoZWJhbGxvdC5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MTA5NTM4MCwicyI6NTE1NjU2NiwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjEyNjIwMCwiZXhwIjoyMDcxNzAyMjAwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.8qhvUSrZbieB8YM_ERMtv9N0NkseaSOX7tp-Ar7MAAY?)
If you believed him, you'd think DC was a post-apocalyptic wasteland--tires rolling down the street on fire, bodies piling up in the Reflecting Pool, every corner a kill zone.
But the actual numbers told a very different story. [In January 2025](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6b526616-c8d6-45ee-a85b-ccc6814c6084?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), U.S. Attorney Matthew M. Graves reported that "total violent crime for 2024 in the District of Columbia is down 35% from 2023 and is the lowest it has been in over 30 years," according to Metropolitan Police Department data:
* **Homicides** : down 32%
* **Robberies** : down 39%
* **Armed carjackings** : down 53%
* **Assaults with dangerous weapons** : down 27%

Yet if you turn on Fox News, Newsmax, Breitbart, or scroll Truth Social, you'd never know it. Fear sells, and for right-wing media, the truth is optional.
### **The Crime Perception Problem**
Humans have always been drawn to violence in storytelling--Shakespeare knew it, as do Netflix producers and true crime podcasters. But in an era when news alerts hit our phones in seconds, that fascination has metastasized into a distorted sense of reality.
[Fifty percent of all news coverage](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f725a874-83c2-4cf1-ab76-03aebd89da6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) focuses on violent crime because "If it bleeds, it leads." The result: more than 60% of Americans believe crime is worse than ever, despite decades of decline.
This disconnect isn't new. In the 1970s, local "action news" stations--supercharged by live broadcast technology--shifted from public affairs toward sensationalized crime coverage. The ratings were great. The journalism? Not so much.
Case in point: [from 1993 to 1996, the national murder rate dropped 20%. But murder stories on ABC, NBC, and CBS nightly news jumped ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f725a874-83c2-4cf1-ab76-03aebd89da6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[721%](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f725a874-83c2-4cf1-ab76-03aebd89da6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f725a874-83c2-4cf1-ab76-03aebd89da6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Even today, [the average American](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cf68f142-a188-4108-97a6-f9db3be22c13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has only a **2.35%** chance of being a victim of a violent crime, but you are **25 times more likely** to see crime on TV than to experience it. Nationally, violent crime has dropped from 79.8 incidents per 1,000 people in 1993 to 23.5 in 2022.
## **Fear is a Powerful Motivator**
For Trump, facts didn't matter. One violent attack on a member of DOGE was enough to justify militarizing the capital--a city that's majority-minority, historically known as "Chocolate City," and denied full federal representation.
This is the same fear tactic we saw in 1988, when George H.W. Bush weaponized the case of William "Willie" Horton, a furloughed prisoner escapee from Massachusetts in 1986 who committed rape and homicide in Maryland a year later. Out of 8,896 furloughs granted in Massachusetts in 1986, [only 11 resulted in escapes--a 0.12% rate.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bc520197-d207-45ff-b784-85661bed7eb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) But relentless ads made it seem as if every furloughed prisoner was a ticking time bomb.
The GOP runs the same playbook today, tying crime to immigration. Trump's 2015 campaign opener smeared undocumented immigrants as criminals.[ But Texas DPS data](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/17606bd0-c4c5-4ebe-99fc-0260e96217df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--funded by the National Institute for Justice--shows they're arrested for violent and drug crimes at less than half the rate of native-born citizens, and for property crimes at one-fourth the rate.
### **The Democratic Overcorrection**
Fear works--[61% of voters](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/90eb54fb-1372-4b45-8aa0-bc5517ce8a82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) say crime is a top issue, and for Trump's 2024 voters, that jumps to 76%. And because crime has been married to immigration despite the lack of solid evidence, immigration has an even larger vote share now with 82% of Trump's voters in 2024. That is up 21 points from 2020. This has spooked some Democrats into overcorrection.
The same "old guard" [who once knelt in Kente cloth](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1dacdf17-e45d-43c6-abe5-e3e03ce81d3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at BLM protests now lean into "tough on crime" rhetoric, as though one election loss means our entire justice reform agenda caused chaos in the streets.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f1f43896-351a-40dd-900b-49895f164e84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Virginia is a prime example. Despite a violent crime rate far below the national average, GOP attacks--like the "Soft Jay Jones" smear site or Lt. Gov. Winsome Sears' warning of "lawless insanity" under Abigail Spanberger or John Reid claiming there are ["Clandestine School-Funded Abortions](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/eb488038-96f3-4a5f-bbf9-b9109afade91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" in Fairfax County Public Schools --have nudged Democrats into more cop-heavy ads. Some of these ads are being run in Black neighborhoods, which one Richmond activist called "troubling and tone-deaf."
We've seen this backfire before. The 1994 Crime Bill, the most "tough on crime" legislation Democrats ever passed, still haunts the party--damaging Hillary Clinton in 2016 and Joe Biden in 2024. Overcorrection can erode both our values and our base.
And sometimes, this overcorrection can force Democrats themselves to cause the mess. In DC, Mayor Muriel Bowser's administration cleared one of the city's largest homeless encampments under K Street without providing shelter alternatives. People simply scattered to other neighborhoods. A housing-first approach could have addressed the problem without playing into conservative narratives about "Democrat-run cities."
### **Resisting the Fear Trap of Being "Tough on Crime"**
We are in one of the safest periods in modern U.S. history. Democrats don't need to cosplay authoritarian "law and order" politics to prove they care about safety.
We can:
* Address root causes like poverty, housing, and education.
* Reform immigration policy with facts, not fear.
* Communicate real statistics and long-term strategies.

The GOP thrives on manufacturing crises. Our job isn't to join their theater--it's to show that true safety comes from stability, not scapegoating. That's not just good politics. It's the truth.
## **TL;DR**
Conservative politicians and media have long used fear--especially about crime--to push authoritarian policies, even when crime rates are historically low. Trump's militarization of DC in 2025 is the latest example, built on exaggerated and false claims. Sensationalized news coverage fuels public misperception, making voters think crime is worse than it is, and Republicans tie it to issues like immigration despite contrary data.
Some Democrats, spooked by GOP attacks, overcorrect with "tough on crime" messaging that undermines progressive values and echoes past mistakes like the 1994 Crime Bill. Real safety comes from addressing root causes--housing, poverty, education--not from authoritarian crackdowns. Democrats should resist playing into fear-based narratives and instead focus on data-driven, long-term solutions that actually make communities safer

name: Team Hilton
subject: Breaking The Secret Plan To Turn Red States Into California
body:
California’s policies impact your life—wherever you live.

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: This is how we stop MAGA in Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Flood the zone with leaders who represent you
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3GMAN1WX5978JFY6R458VB6_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3GMAN1WX5978JFY6R458VB6_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, We’ve been sounding the alarm: the MAGA strategy in Tennessee is to rig our democracy with gerrymandered maps and extreme candidates. Their goal? Keep power at all costs—even if it means silencing your voice. But here’s the good news: we have a plan. And it starts with you. The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus is recruiting bold, qualified candidates who actually _live in_ _and reflect_ the communities they seek to represent. We’re not looking for politicians—we’re looking for neighbors. Neighbors who are:
* Pragmatic enough to rise above petty politics and do what’s right;
* Deeply invested in their community, their district and our democracy;
* Focused on economic kitchen-table issues—like better public schools, better transportation infrastructure, affordable healthcare, and lower costs of living;
* Unafraid to challenge the MAGA movement and defend every Tennessean’s rights;
* Experienced enough to know how to get things done, and exciting enough to energize our base and win.

Your Tennessee House Democratic Caucus _listens, engages and amplifies_ the voices of working Tennesseans. We can’t do this without your help. 👉 Every dollar you give will go to candidate recruitment, training, and campaign support. Will you chip in $25 right now to help launch the next great public servant?
---
| _**If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.**_
---
| | [ Contribute $25 ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3GMAN1WX5978JFY6R458VB6_2)
---
| | [ Other Amount ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3GMAN1WX5978JFY6R458VB6_3)
---
| This is how we win—by building a bench of homegrown leaders who reflect your values, not the MAGA agenda.
---
| **The time is now. Let’s get to work.**
---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_

subject: Meet My Body PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by My Body PAC
body:
A people-powered approach to autonomy and democratic participation.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K3GMFDXNMMW565HA9CABP259_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, I’m sharing a note from My Body PAC. They are turning small dollar gifts into real power for bodily autonomy and a healthier democracy. Read their note below and, if it resonates, consider making a donation. More soon, Andy DemsGive.org
---
|
---
| They’ve always used money to silence us, shrink us, control us. But here’s the truth: a dollar can be a weapon in the right hands. Our hands.

My Body PAC is turning a historically elitist tool, the PAC, into a weapon for the people. We’re building power rooted in autonomy, powered by joy, and made by the people who move everything but own nothing.

It starts with you. And one unapologetic dollar. If freedom cost $5, would you pay it? And what happens when 25,000 of us answer hell yes?

name: Not good
subject: This simple math equation shows Dems losing Congress for good
body:
If the GOP is able to add this key swing state to their redistricting calculus it’s over for Democrats. We will never hold Congress again
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqs2VopY3JnWWs7lGYxopjytF0zdOYuY1VDq0iR6djFRD19qHE3_SQC3oIRLC2ZN51dlrZyYJ0PEkAdRKOVvSpYIV2Xpuy9YKHEkowi7tlfGZFl5CIbmsX6vqPpjwj7k2myI_hz_djsCrXTSS1s4Prnh8o9QjvqSWIDVclQGaMfUWNL2uIVbaBexztb7Tn-9yUE8p45v1imLNmjBDm-d043fmSji-go8Fi5YTMoEO3s=&c=dJSVe6XFZ1d_9oIfnEfDLyJ4DwbSpq3tUjsItJWL1Dr4Y1lUBIoeww==&ch=gzvFWOvQZpQjGwFfOmrhQYGU6TnSXcMe700ej-ZppcdVwKl3_mI3Ow==)
---
| Peter,
The redistricting war has reached unheard of levels of escalation.
In one fell swoop, Texas' hyperpartisan gerrymander erased five Democratic seats. In reply, California is moving to remove dozens of GOP seats. Now GOP favoring redistricts are on the table in FL, OH, IN, and MO.
More Democratic states may join CA in retaliation but even if every blue state joins in the math does not work out in the Democrats favor:
23 \- number of states where GOP controls Governorship and legislature
15 \- the number of states where Dems control Governorship and legislature.
The GOP holds the advantage here. The only way to get ahead is by playing to win in the 12 swing states where full control is up in the air. However, the GOP is on track to beat us in that game too.
This November in an obscure judicial election, the GOP is working to flip the Supreme Court in the key swing state of Pennsylvania. If the GOP can add that state and its 18 congressional districts to their redistricting calculus, it is game over for Democrats, we will never hold Congress again.
[On the ground in PA, dems are nowhere to be found. Defend our Court is screaming from the rooftops about this looming disaster but barely anyone is listening. We need to throw everything into saving Pennsylvania - can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us turn things around?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqs2VopY3JnWWs7lGYxopjytF0zdOYuY1VDq0iR6djFRD19qHE3_SQC3oIRLC2ZN51dlrZyYJ0PEkAdRKOVvSpYIV2Xpuy9YKHEkowi7tlfGZFl5CIbmsX6vqPpjwj7k2myI_hz_djsCrXTSS1s4Prnh8o9QjvqSWIDVclQGaMfUWNL2uIVbaBexztb7Tn-9yUE8p45v1imLNmjBDm-d00wgeGezvIJgLPuoOo_hVhI=&c=dJSVe6XFZ1d_9oIfnEfDLyJ4DwbSpq3tUjsItJWL1Dr4Y1lUBIoeww==&ch=gzvFWOvQZpQjGwFfOmrhQYGU6TnSXcMe700ej-ZppcdVwKl3_mI3Ow==)

clean_body: If the GOP is able to add this key swing state to their redistricting calculus it’s over for Democrats. We will never hold Congress again | | | | | == | Peter, The redistricting war has reached unheard of levels of escalation. In one fell swoop, Texas' hyperpartisan gerrymander erased five Democratic seats. In reply, California is moving to remove dozens of GOP seats. Now GOP favoring redistricts are on the table in FL, OH, IN, and MO. More Democratic states may join CA in retaliation but even if every blue state joins in the math does not work out in the Democrats favor: 23 \- number of states where GOP controls Governorship and legislature 15 \- the number of states where Dems control Governorship and legislature. The GOP holds the advantage here. The only way to get ahead is by playing to win in the 12 swing states where full control is up in the air. However, the GOP is on track to beat us in that game too. This November in an obscure judicial election, the GOP is working to flip the Supreme Court in the key swing state of Pennsylvania. If the GOP can add that state and its 18 congressional districts to their redistricting calculus, it is game over for Democrats, we will never hold Congress again. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The math is simple. We cannot afford to lose here. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

body:
I'm sure you've seen the stories by now. Our undercover journalists meet with unsuspecting government bureaucrats who tell all about their efforts to undermine America with their leftist agenda.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1684658/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNXpqaFFSUkRhdw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjU/LbmNsMURvaGFwOQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNsNEdGZDVsdDZRQXZscw/gaKxjjA/s0mdf5510b4)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

I'm sure you've seen the stories by now. Our undercover journalists meet with unsuspecting government bureaucrats who tell all about their efforts to undermine America with their leftist agenda.

We call them our "Swipers" – brave undercover journalists who swipe on dating apps and get them to expose the Truth of their actions.

Our American Swiper Program has been powering explosive undercover wins that have **shaken the Deep State to its core.**

**But the Deep State isn’t slowing down, and neither can we. It's time for us to expand the program, and[**the only way I can do this is with your support**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).**

Recently, we released video of a Vera Institute director we caught on hidden camera confessing to **tipping off illegals about ICE raids through a secret notification system.**

**We also exposed** the Florida Tech president admitting to tweaking course language to **dodge Governor DeSantis' DEI bans** and secure millions in taxpayer funding.

Those bombshells—and the DoD branch chief vowing to **resist President Trump at every turn** —happened because of **patriots like you** who [**stepped up when it mattered**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

I'm eternally grateful for the support of OMG’s donors; they’ve been with us through the raids, the lawsuits, and the smears, and together we've exposed the rot that's eating away at our nation.

[**If you haven't already, please team up with me by donating today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

But Patriot, our program has grown exponentially this year, **with Swipers infiltrating deeper than ever into the swamp**. We've uncovered Nevada health officials exploiting "runaway youth" loopholes to hide gender surgeries from parents, and even a CNN stage manager revealing that Jake Tapper knew about Biden's decline long before the public did.

These stories aren't just headlines—they're lifelines for accountability in a system rigged against the Truth. Yet, as our impact surges, so does the Deep State's vicious counterattack: endless lawfare, like the recent lawsuits trying to silence our journalists under eavesdropping statutes, censorship on platforms, **and outright threats to our team's safety**.

We're losing ground fast without the resources to expand. [**Will you donate now to help us grow?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Let me pull back the curtain on what your support truly fuels. Our dedicated staff—brave men and women who've left comfortable lives behind—**are grinding seven days a week, from dawn until dusk, often into the night.**

They're not clock-watchers; they're warriors dedicating their entire lives to the Truth, sacrificing family time, personal safety, and peace of mind.

I've seen them endure ops in hostile environments and push through exhaustion because they believe, as I do, that **exposing corruption** is a calling worth everything.

But they're human, Patriot, and without reinforcements, burnout and breakthroughs both loom large. It's patriots like you who keep them going—[**your donations aren't just dollars; they're the fuel that says, "We're in this fight with you."**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Hiring new Swipers isn't quick or straightforward—we put every candidate through rigorous hurdles to ensure we're not being infiltrated by the very Deep State we're exposing.

That means exhaustive background checks, polygraph tests, loyalty assessments, and even simulated infiltration drills to weed out moles. It's a painstaking process, but it's essential to protect our mission and your investment in the Truth.

**That's why[**we urgently need to raise $70,000 in the next ten days**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) to onboard five new undercover journalists**, each costing $14,000 for state-of-the-art hidden cameras, secure travel, and ironclad legal defense.

We've already hit $20,000 from early responders, but the gap is vast, and time is short.

Patriot—Now, [**I'm asking for your loyal support**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.). A gift of $25 covers essential training materials, $50 equips them with critical gear, and $100 provides the legal shields they need in this hostile landscape.

**Without you, our momentum stalls, and the Deep State wins**. But [**with you**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)?

We keep draining the swamp, one exposure at a time. [**Donate now via our _trusted page_ and let's fortify this fight together.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

For the Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. Ten days—$50,000 needed. Your past support will change everything; [**step up again and ensure the Truth prevails!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

**THEN ➡️** Super PACs, far-right mega-donors, and the entire political establishment have tried and failed to take Ilhan down **__three elections in a row._ **_
Millions of dollars have been spent on attack ads, smear campaigns and more, but this grassroots team has always answered the call and helped us defend this seat.
**NOW ➡️** Ilhan has officially launched her campaign for reelection, and we are getting ready for a fight that will be as tough as ever.
With Trump cracking down on free speech and right-wing billionaires dominating political spending, we have to be prepared for a long and expensive campaign.

| 🐈⬛August Has Been Cat-Tastic!🐱
---
| You may not think of "summer" and "cats" together, but August actually holds Black Cat Appreciation Day! And there's nothing cats love more than lying in a bright summer sunbeam or watching birds through the window on a sunny day.
Here are some of our teams beloved cats:
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hxt79Cwd41zDb444UT05TAMxdvjp-IM3qXbJkF3WDYYrQVvoa28eCXfGURLWPv8xzXVdGhEJMX2KR6r-un2v3ZC5lBr6iARi5PU9M78CcWCLpgQlRQpJMzgnFTDTPoh71TGSEvztfEcGFkuuZpa8UbNNTN7H2Vf1v_pS_fq6OzeWyR6SbaCbS_iaKMPHFMzbLXl-PimfFiDF2k5awpnG4_1aJKzdvKRDSvuCNhNgQlmXFxOBRyCfCFzEKv3c8bKfQFimJAbYxVD3zS_2p3AY-LYf-6IH2QuGFTaPjKUUdVoRpFpWhxgknw==&c=1pIsRMIwZaWqMKJLa0dJIMfnAJshMBga5lnfRRwRxtiNQDg4HMvRuA==&ch=Di4rHsliSczoyZXaA1UOthlgIzZlrEBnf7YJgkpjv1BgvNeyp-Y8xQ==)
---
| As August comes near to its close, we ask for your support and contributions to help continue the work we are doing to create a fair and affordable economy in Virginia. In honor of our furry companions, who became domesticated some 12,000 years ago, we are asking for you to chip in between $1 and $12. name: Case Dixon
subject: Big Campaign Update + Town Hall This Thursday
body:
Hey everyone,
I wanted to drop in with another campaign update and let you know what we’ve been up to.
Since my last email, I’ve been hitting the ground hard, sharing our message of accountability and liberty all across the district. I’ve:
* Spoke to the **Chilton County Bama Carry** and **Bibb County Bama Carry** chapters.
* Spoke to the **Republican Women of Trussville** at their August meeting.
* Visited the **Shelby County GOP** meeting.
* Attended **Barry Moore’s U.S. Senate campaign announcement** , where I was graciously given the opportunity to share about our campaign.
* Attended the **Shelby County** and **Jefferson County Farmers Federation** meetings, speaking about our campaign and the issues that matter most.
* Spoke at the quarterly **Chilton County GOP** and **Talladega GOP** meetings about why I’m running and how we can make real change.
* Shared my message with the **Minority GOP of Jefferson County** , engaging in a great conversation about growing our movement and defending liberty together.

The conversations I’ve had have been encouraging, and the momentum is building—but none of this would be possible without your support.
**This Thursday, August 28th, at 6:30 PM** , we’re hosting a **town hall at the Albert L. Scott Library in Alabaster**. This will be a great opportunity to dive deeper into the issues and answer your questions. **Bring a friend!** [ RSVP on Facebook HERE](https://www.facebook.com/events/1135158971810036?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[\]%7D "https://www.facebook.com/events/1135158971810036?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[\]%7D")
I’ve also recently published an op-ed that lays out some of the principles I'll bring to Washington:
* **[“Tariffs Won’t Fix Washington’s Spending Addiction”](https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-tariffs-wont-fix-washingtons-spending-addiction "https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-tariffs-wont-fix-washingtons-spending-addiction")**

The piece highlights that real fiscal sanity comes from cutting spending to match revenue—not chasing new revenue streams.
**I want to once again thank each and every one of you for your support so far. Your sacrifice for this movement is deeply appreciated and never goes unnoticed.**
If you believe in what we’re building—**ending corruption-as-usual, restoring fiscal sanity, and defending liberty** —I’d ask you to consider helping us reach more voters by sharing this email, volunteering, and donating if you haven't already.
* **[Donate HERE](https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/donate-today-2d26b569160a252d "https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/donate-today-2d26b569160a252d")**
* **[Volunteer HERE](https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/volunteer-648069d0d32c0b62 "https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/volunteer-648069d0d32c0b62")**

Even $10 makes a difference in helping us share this message with more people across the 6th District.
And as always, please continue to **keep me, my family, and this campaign in your prayers**. We need wisdom, endurance, and favor for the road ahead.
Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can change the status quo in Washington.

In Liberty,
**Case Dixon **
**
**
Dixon for Congress
(205) 282-9103
615 Brooklane Dr. #3218
Hueytown, AL 35023-2508
DIXONFORUSCONGRESS.COM

"" "" Even $10 makes a difference in helping us share this message with more people across the 6th District. And as always, please continue to keep me, my family, and this campaign in your prayers. We need wisdom, endurance, and favor for the road ahead. Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can change the status quo in Washington. In Liberty, Case Dixon Dixon for Congress (205) 282-9103 615 Brooklane Dr. #3218 Hueytown, AL 35023-2508 DIXONFORUSCONGRESS.COM

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Hey can we talk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I was going through some of the things you said, and... wow...

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh9ipir9h3u8nrvb9gpgjecnnidkf66hjk92uh5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74c5h2bs)
---

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmlb3d96gl9purspvv3qnb9p3gv73do7udvbtucg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74c5h2bs)

Hey Friend,
Sometimes, after the day is done, I like to go through the replies that people leave on these messages, just to read what my supporters have to say.

A lot of them are very kind, and some are incredibly nasty, but then I came across yours.
I mean... _**wow**_.
It’s incredible how much you and I think alike.
It’s messages like yours that make me remember what it’s all for – that keep me grounded.
You, my friend, give me _**hope**_.

So I just wanted to say thank you. You’ve been with me through it all – stood with me through thick and thin.

Please, could you confirm for me, so we can stay in touch?

[STAY IN TOUCH WITH ME](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8eelsd7f7se1m8kcmiug1fi4l5ehdi7o83f1ifg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74c5h2bs)

God bless,
**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z83tgi1kc2sh2dqk0osvsbnn8eabkr4a0mab2b30_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74c5h2bs)
_American First. Always. _

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn6631gl5s0q7a68joqa2qv0q92pt6tjo8jr7fs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbt333alihm6lgpmpepci2f1mcm29nqi908532lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6hvmst5v1unuip62g6rgrkrehcsbjheelb8l6p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ui79lssa21adkg1k1c4hi0f5rtmajv0686dt80_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---

name: Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA
subject: Hallie and Brady should still be alive
body:
Let me explain what’s going on...

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,[**I’m writing you today on behalf of NumbersUSA because I need your name on this petition right away.**** **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7ab1rdm2jfdq48s3rckab8cvkmkvtpahsspcb60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs)
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5bai9bg1r7dh10tni94c5ecam5br1rjpdac0688_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs)
---
Let me explain what’s going on...Hallie Helgeson and Brady Heiling had recently graduated high school -- they’d both lettered in three sports and fallen in love along the way. They had their whole lives in front of them. That all changed when their car collided with an SUV driving the wrong direction on the highway.The SUV’s driver was a criminal illegal alien.She’d already been convicted of driving drunk back in 2020, and when she took a breathalyzer test at the scene of the crime she blew a 0.208 -- more than double the legal limit. This all happened in Dane County, Wisconsin just outside of Madison. That’s important for two reasons:
---
1. It’s nowhere near our Southern border, and
2. Dane County is a “Sanctuary” county.

---
So when the Radical Left tries to tell you that illegal aliens aren’t hurting anyone and that this crisis isn’t spreading across our country......I want you to think about Hallie and Brady. Two teenagers whose lives were cut short because they took a drive on a Wisconsin highway.They weren’t “looking for trouble...”They weren’t “in the wrong neighborhood...”They weren’t “asking for it.”If this can happen in suburban Wisconsin, it can happen anywhere.All it takes is a couple of open borders politicians declaring their county a “sanctuary” county......and suddenly the illegal aliens can commit heinous crimes in your community with no fear of being deported.Do you remember when Barack Obama talked about the “fundamental transformation” of our country?Well this is it. **[And if you want to put a stop to it, then I’d like to introduce you to my friends at NumbersUSA.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfntagl3ohg8s6dt6u77jdkh8khohm3ohho1ums8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs) ** They’ve got a plan to deport the illegal aliens before their crime and chaos takes root in your community. [**It comes down to three simple steps:**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zghg6riu64ma0cd7vn17buldn0ltu4kvoo9chmjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs)
---
1. **Rally public support for ICE’s work**
2. **Cut off federal funding for “Sanctuary” counties and cities**
3. **Deport every criminal illegal alien**

---
And that list is in that order on purpose.If #1 doesn’t happen then #2 and #3 never will. Because AOC, Gavin Newsom, Tim Walz, and J.B. Pritzker are using their bully pulpit every single day to undermine support for ICE and turn the American people against the deportations.Even when it’s children working on a marijuana farm and protestors shooting at ICE agents, they find a way to make ICE the villain of the story. **[To counter their lies, NumbersUSA brings together 8 million members calling for one thing: an America First immigration policy.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z651ikimrk36goof0g33nsfsgrsmo6pidm708660_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs) **They are the largest single-issue advocacy group in the country and with a donation of $27 today, you can join their ranks.Up here on Capitol Hill, they’re a force.You might notice when the White House makes a statement on immigration or when the Speaker’s office or Majority Leader Thune announce legislation, NumbersUSA is often the only immigration group mentioned. And when RINOs try to slip in provisions that will weaken our immigration policy, it’s NumbersUSA that sounds the alarm.** ** [**NumbersUSA brings the voice of the American people right into the halls of Congress by directing thousands of grassroots patriots to email, call, or mail a petition to their members.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2jbvmjsfjnl7qpvslpkfv8r4trcetnm6t9gacc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs) I’ve seen it firsthand -- and it works. Whether it was Ted Kennedy’s amnesty package back in 2007 or the “Dignity Act” just a few weeks ago that would’ve added 17 million permanent foreign workers -- they are relentless in protecting our country’s immigration integrity.Remember those three steps I mentioned before?I said they were simple -- not easy.But we’re at a critical moment right now.We’re either going to deport the illegal alien criminals and keep our communities safe and whole.Or we’re going to stop here and start counting down to when a Democrat grants mass amnesty.And in the meantime, we’ll keep seeing news stories like Hallie and Brady’s -- where dangerous illegal aliens are hurting and killing Americans.** ****[If you want to protect yourself, your community, and our country, then I’d ask you to sign and submit this petition today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zoi3qmhvmiul73spp8u5t4r98nct2ut28a4f8tm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmcp74clh2bs) **

And if you can make a donation today of $27, $50, or even $100 or more, you’ll not only become a member of NumbersUSA, you’ll multiply this petition drive into a movement that no one can ignore.Your petition and your best donation submitted in the next 48 hours will let me know that you don’t want to ever hear another story like Hallie and Brady’s. I know I don’t.God bless you and God bless America,

clean_body: Let me explain what’s going on... | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Let me explain what’s going on...Hallie Helgeson and Brady Heiling had recently graduated high school -- they’d both lettered in three sports and fallen in love along the way. They had their whole lives in front of them. That all changed when their car collided with an SUV driving the wrong direction on the highway.The SUV’s driver was a criminal illegal alien.She’d already been convicted of driving drunk back in 2020, and when she took a breathalyzer test at the scene of the crime she blew a 0.208 -- more than double the legal limit. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Huge news in our battleground race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4937?t=2&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
---
Null,

I have huge news to share about our battleground race for Senate, and I wanted to make sure you were among the first to know: **State Rep. Joe Tate — my former primary opponent — just endorsed me to be Michigan's next U.S. senator!**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=3&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
| | [JOIN JOE AND
ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=4&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
---
I'm truly honored to have Joe's endorsement. During his service in the Michigan House of Representatives, he has fought hard for our state and achieved real results for Michiganders. I'm proud to officially have him on this grassroots team, and I know Joe will fight hard to help us defeat Mike Rogers and deliver for Michiganders!
At this pivotal moment, I need every last grassroots supporter to show that we've got the momentum to win this race and take back the Senate for Democrats. **That's why – on the heels of this endorsement – I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign as well, null:**
**[Will you please add your name to officially endorse my campaign to be Michigan's next U.S. senator? This is a big moment for our race, and I'm counting on 10,000 grassroots endorsements from supporters like you. Please, add your name now!](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=5&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)**
| | [ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=6&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
---
This endorsement comes almost immediately after Republican operatives themselves admitted I'm their **“toughest general election opponent.** ” Our momentum is building, but ensuring we have the strongest grassroots movement at this moment is essential.

Here's why: Multiple political experts have already called our battleground race a "Toss Up," and Senate control will likely come down to what happens here in Michigan. That means Trump – who has an astonishing _quarter of a billion dollar_ campaign war chest – will spend heavily against me to help his handpicked MAGA candidate, Mike Rogers, win.

**That's why I'm counting on your personal endorsement today to demonstrate we have the strength to compete and win what will be one of the most important Senate races of the election.**
**[So take just a minute to personally endorse my campaign for Michigan's U.S. Senate seat. Your endorsement is absolutely critical to building our momentum, winning this race, and taking back the Senate for Democrats!](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=7&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)**
| | [ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=8&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
---
Thank you for standing by me,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=9&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4937?t=10&akid=685%2E49239%2E88m_fg)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Jordan Zaslow
subject: TOMORROW: A highly competitive race against 6 Republican men
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
This is happening TOMORROW. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113948763/565471468/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250825Shigley_N_JZ_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjZThiOWM5LWJiODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znm6s9rvs2al4hTe9ljFplTeDgx9pK_zuGWiN6Pcavg=)
---
Did you see this message, Peter?

**We are proud to be supporting Debra Shigley in the highly competitive special election for Georgia State Senate District 21 – and this race is happening TOMORROW.**

The Georgia state government consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male – that disparity has led to the state passing a cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban.

This law has already caused immense harm to women who deserve much more than a government that prioritizes politics over their lives. But to make progress, we need better representation in their government.

**That’s why we’re excited to support Debra Shigley, but she needs our help to cross the finish line TOMORROW.**

Last year, we were proud to support Debra Shigley’s candidacy as she ran against an extremist anti-choice opponent who helped push the state's cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban. This law has already caused untold harm to women, including Adriana Smith, who was declared brain dead at 8 weeks pregnant and was subsequently placed on _life support_ for months so doctors could retrieve her baby via cesarean section.

The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, **which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

The women of Georgia deserve so much more, and that starts with better representation in their government. That’s why we are thrilled to be supporting Debra Shigley once again as she runs for **the Georgia State Senate District 21.**

While this district is historically represented by Republicans, the special circumstances of this election, combined with disapproval of the current lawmakers in Georgia, put Debra in a unique position to flip this seat. **We believe Debra has what it takes to win this highly competitive seat. Here’s what she had to say:**

_“As a proud member and supporter of Planned Parenthood Southeast, I'm committed to protecting reproductive freedom and expanding access to care for women across our district. Georgia's 6-week abortion ban has created fear, delayed treatment, and put lives at risk — and I won't stand by while politicians play games with our health.”_

[**We only have a few days to get Debra the support she needs to win this race. Join us in this mission by pitching in a split $20.25 contribution between Her Bold Move and Debra Shigley’s campaign today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113948793/565471525/-1604983161?refcode=EM_F_250825Shigley_N_JZ_90DO_6_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjZThiOWM5LWJiODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=znm6s9rvs2al4hTe9ljFplTeDgx9pK_zuGWiN6Pcavg=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

name: Barack Obama
subject: The moment we’re in right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is about something precious: Who are we as a country? What values do we stand for?

---
Peter, these are not normal times, to put it mildly. Just imagine if, heading into a tough midterm election, I demanded that a state controlled by Democrats suddenly redraw its electoral maps because my party was “entitled to five more seats.” Republicans who are silent now never would have tolerated that from me or my predecessors. And let me be clear: This is not about partisanship. **This is about something more precious: who we are as a country, and the values we stand for.** At times like this, it’s on each of us to decide what we care about — and what we’re willing to do for our democracy. **Eric Holder and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to be on the front lines of these fights — and this work matters more than ever.[So I need to ask: Will you make a donation to support this cause and help face down escalating threats to American democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113950063/565474934/-387901526?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR2_email_20250825-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR2&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250825-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR2&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZThiOWM5LWJiODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z0MBvejc9C52bPF4-oyJuNPBvIeqJzWLhRZOpVmyp0I=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

It wasn’t long ago that most Americans didn’t have to worry about any of this.
For decades, there was a broad consensus — among Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals — around a certain set of rules by which we settled our differences. We recognized that some bonds transcend party, region, or ideology. And even if we had not fully realized an ideal version of America, we could all agree on the basic ideals to pursue: freedom, justice, and equality.
But some of these concepts also started to become abstract in our minds. Because they don’t intrude on our day-to-day lives, we started to take them for granted. Not anymore.
**Now is the time to stand up for your beliefs – to recognize the moment we’re in and rise to meet it.** Attorney General Holder and I started the NDRC because we believe that when districts are gerrymandered, it takes power away from voters. And that affects all of us.
[**The fight to end gerrymandering and make elections fairer is central to the fight for democracy. I’m so proud to be part of it. Please join me and make a donation to fund the NDRC and support this critical work when it’s needed most.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113950073/565474941/-387901526?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR2_email_20250825-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR2&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250825-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR2&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZThiOWM5LWJiODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z0MBvejc9C52bPF4-oyJuNPBvIeqJzWLhRZOpVmyp0I=)
Thank you,
Barack Obama

clean_body: This is about something precious: Who are we as a country? What values do we stand for? Peter, these are not normal times, to put it mildly. Just imagine if, heading into a tough midterm election, I demanded that a state controlled by Democrats suddenly redraw its electoral maps because my party was “entitled to five more seats.” Republicans who are silent now never would have tolerated that from me or my predecessors. And let me be clear: This is not about partisanship. This is about something more precious: who we are as a country, and the values we stand for. At times like this, it’s on each of us to decide what we care about — and what we’re willing to do for our democracy. Eric Holder and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to be on the front lines of these fights — and this work matters more than ever.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = It wasn’t long ago that most Americans didn’t have to worry about any of this. For decades, there was a broad consensus — among Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals — around a certain set of rules by which we settled our differences. We recognized that some bonds transcend party, region, or ideology. And even if we had not fully realized an ideal version of America, we could all agree on the basic ideals to pursue: freedom, justice, and equality. But some of these concepts also started to become abstract in our minds. Because they don’t intrude on our day-to-day lives, we started to take them for granted. Not anymore. Now is the time to stand up for your beliefs – to recognize the moment we’re in and rise to meet it. Attorney General Holder and I started the NDRC because we believe that when districts are gerrymandered, it takes power away from voters. And that affects all of us. = Thank you, Barack Obama = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Special news to share…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94110?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt)
Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Heartland Patriots and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94110?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94111?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94111?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94111?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94111?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94111?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94111?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94110?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt)
---
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won._
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now – split between my campaign and Heartland Patriots – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94110?refcode=em20250825-9317&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9317%2E614464%2Ecr_QXt)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze- I’m a retired Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I’m running for Al Franken’s former Senate seat in Minnesota, in what is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race in Minnesota since 2009.
**
_Democrats think we’re assholes, buffoons, Nazi’s, and just plain idiots. You and I both know that’s BS. _**__

I carried our flag on the battlefield for more than 20 years in over 70 countries. While serving our nation and carrying Old Glory, I learned a few things, and I want to share a few with you today.

**I’m concerned Google may be censoring our messages to you, so I’m including my message on a secure page that is only accessible for the next 24 hours.**

[**READ MY MESSAGE BEFORE IT DELETES
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9b980b0e764243c78c9470fe209de934&_e=yzfH7x5nykKMKKumuLPIosDuwmLKu6wGHY-vCo2YjtPy09WvB-aAByyUVryr9OPQ18FsUdPTvpZtxrQ8T7Xw_N3WjLyfwsgrntSLrKYd3FWda7jpjFUnn_OHvcvyy5zENpJ4eAhucACVNPWNpZVZvXOUlZFCvrJ3LOCFBoTjMhbmCU8_IeCeG-aBQGgdzeoRsJqLz65JsjGvRf8YfEFWJaRcr1noMi0ZwbzcJgtRPhjXGTJPKRmvxKeSSNyNiWIp4xyVHKXTaRKexd-tgJKjll9HrDiBjtwPsy8w4eaulJTf0sMDZ4eXQ6zCM-TavE6AvUiYOvNZxjLOSngDzS27_j2-qv0UZPpHa-3o-tSm81wautBzh21_lAGtGjh8kLVVcHiGM-mqDThApKCqHLhsWQmWCAeXymr4pGYT3UbPXS_63-6WzqcsmyT2kB-0z4JJeIPMInfKHtzNeoO9j_fWuCfQz5P0l6CnH674LAGY28e4oZrGUFgErZ0cHs6gr2rE6hWMaXEUjRbZCP3F7KiCrP3dNF0FUAN66XPcfIjsSDgy5qnhjdxf4rpTItsBHGyoL6ElMKduZ4i3pT2kwwwk4KwcMCrkGfvYr68KHPPSfnlbGkIubXqAhZTxa01tI2BXEw929heu4dJY0Ep0MeTc0wM1NKLcS7HySfS7nTq7f8cDclIOQdslEGAm87wEeSf7jz5EAmEQ-0A7DgiqsnASOeOy4MhVomaXwkjFtvYjKcoS9uyQ-NgUEQft-8PfFl_M)
_
_ I hope you’ll take the time to read my note to you.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

We cannot miss out on the moment to act, or we may be waiting for a long time to set sail again. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze- I’m a retired Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I’m running for Al Franken’s former Senate seat in Minnesota, in what is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race in Minnesota since 2009. Democrats think we’re assholes, buffoons, Nazi’s, and just plain idiots. You and I both know that’s BS. I carried our flag on the battlefield for more than 20 years in over 70 countries. While serving our nation and carrying Old Glory, I learned a few things, and I want to share a few with you today. I’m concerned Google may be censoring our messages to you, so I’m including my message on a secure page that is only accessible for the next 24 hours. I hope you’ll take the time to read my note to you. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Nancy
subject: God found me at the well and gave me purpose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m asking you to read my story

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9herhkusq5an9c0qagr9m6f5veru8fig0al9nio_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztaruo15cn813q96c897bo29pgc2ek3lu29tjch8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh0goedujkca1efe6pmphriq7sdnthr4ajcsdo70_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
| | **[There’s an old story in Scripture.__Maybe you know it.__](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zald2ocgpucel4a29r017fpgbfgkr3dmaekrthug_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)__** A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping **no one** would see her. But Jesus _**_did_**_ see her. He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. [**He offered her living water.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi9l499r5ldj3p9les0lql6asi77o1bukobe3qfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs) She was stunned. Jesus said: **[“If you knew who I was, you would’ve asked me for a drink. And I would’ve given you living water.”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z337jknscpaqort8vigp6d5n44324hh82jtqtn80_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)** That story hits me deep— __**because I was that woman.**__ I’ve been told I wasn’t good enough. **[But God doesn’t need perfection; He uses the broken to carry out His perfect plan.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ougds14ev635hrvi8ilkhub8niqhsft2v9g438_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)** At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents gave me two choices: **_Go back to school, or get a job._** **[So I got to work...at Waffle House. Graveyard shifts. Spatula in hand.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1r8h9ebuabtd5mlmksl72vs27bd9jq88aeb9qbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)** It was humbling. It was hard. _**But it wasn’t the end of my story.**_ 25 years later, that high school dropout became the **first woman to graduate from The Citadel, and the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5raq28a2dae2obtkj2fea7p2i8rqrebrshbdtg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
[ **STAND WITH FIGHTER NANCY MACE** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2772t3m82pva76f62fnqncccasuj2h62a9duuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
And I didn’t do it alone— _**God carried me**._ He carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. **He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD.** **When I moved four times to _keep my children safe._** When the world called me unworthy, _**God called me redeemed.**_ When the Left tried to silence me, _**God gave me a voice.**_ When I had nothing left to give, _**God filled me with living water.**_ I know what it means to be broken. And I know what it means to be _**rebuilt by grace.**_ **[This is more than politics. It’s a spiritual battle.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zilju1h07rj55bt5s9mm8a25katpkug5muve6jug_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)** A fight for **our churches** , our **daughters** , our **freedom** —and our __**souls.**__ _And I won’t sit back while spineless politicians sell out our country for fame and favor._ **[Now I’m running for Governor, and I’m up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based Americans like you, Patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmc5asqcpb9qk5llnetnfn7ue5ve88mtc0odpbk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)** If you believe in **grace** , **truth** , and **second chances** , **[I’m asking you to stand with me right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hauckar7sj7l900708grmka72vtkkh1bqhtfio_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)**
---
[ **SUPPORT NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhpd8jj0avhrac5o0t0c11kk1dq9s38i0u5e3208_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
Because there are millions of women out there still waiting at the well. **[Let’s show them:_God still sees them._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9uphn5g3e2k8s21foicljbmt1hsimad5giul988_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)** And America still has fighters who won’t back down. **— Nancy Mace**
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkgpi7f42u3qb1ee953ljeectdh95sk5r7thrfg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
**P.S.** I know what it feels like to be overlooked. Ignored. Counted out. But I also know what it feels like to be used by God for a mission far bigger than myself. _**[If you're ready to join me, I’d be honored to fight alongside you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ugmoc54lmej3bsaahf4dled1k33kb3opmgua9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)**_
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7nofs784vo2dov54eneq53ahv1god5pkbibms9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
| | [ **$25** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0qplml6d0jtodm3oorvji0nc214vmr63r64slf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
[ **$50** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zinvr14vlqjifbmdklp8eonlduts6t81621983eg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
[ **$100** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtov63g7lv50u3234vsava73tmnudlodglv65m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
[ **OTHER AMOUNT** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu4m5h2bmn58d192nivilectiu0su6e2me8u53h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmapr2cjh2bs)
---
**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
---
| | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492
---
---

---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc87bl7t0ahrsr9jg4ljr5jodhee8qtirjmqvcv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgm6or6c1h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zamrnlq2l78jhlfc9tlq2qd9cfspc3j9p687bhrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgm6or6c1h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znknc2p1s1d6t7k0ffklmkfka4v8urn3ge1u6au8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgm6or6c1h2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2n1jn11ufateu0d6h86h6isscbedf2dt2jdif4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgm6or6c1h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2rpagdd9l0492dt4q12gji8bt264njqto6fm84g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgm6or6c1h2bs)

* * *
# Riley Gaines mocks "Mamscrawny," out-lifts him in humiliating social media post
Riley Gaines mocked NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani's weak bench press performance **[sharing a video of herself bench pressing 165 pounds](https://substack.com/redirect/cf5ac1ef-4ec2-42b6-8e7a-e07d11fb5c29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at 130 pounds body weight to ridicule Mamdani, who struggled to lift 135 pounds at a Brooklyn event Saturday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6b4973c8-bb48-4699-b9dd-d2b3af75f30d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Gaines outlifted Mamdani while weighing significantly less** \- In her 2022 video, Gaines demonstrated "165lb relatively easy reps" when she weighed just 130 pounds, compared to Mamdani's failed attempt at 135 pounds, telling him to "take note" of her superior performance.
* **Mayor Eric Adams joins in mocking "Mamscrawny" with age comparison** \- The 64-year-old Adams, who successfully completed multiple reps at the same event, contrasted himself with the 33-year-old Mamdani, writing "64 vs 33. A lifetime of hard work vs. a silver spoon" and saying "The weight of the job is too heavy for 'Mamscrawny.'"
* **Former Governor Andrew Cuomo also criticizes Mamdani's fitness** \- Cuomo piled on the criticism, saying "This guy can't bench his own body weight, let alone carry the weight of leading the most important city in the world."

* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/210e81a4-5669-47e1-b070-01e0bd7e1460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Liberals laughed at RFK Jr's COVID warning... until THIS happened](https://substack.com/redirect/210e81a4-5669-47e1-b070-01e0bd7e1460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/210e81a4-5669-47e1-b070-01e0bd7e1460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
When RFK Jr warned that COVID 19 originated from a lab leak in Wuhan, China... liberals laughed and called him a conspiracy theorist.
NOW the FBI, CIA and Department of Energy all agree that Covid-19 most likely originated from a Wuhan lab leak...
Once again Kennedy was proven right.
But **[RFK Jr.'s next WARNING](https://substack.com/redirect/210e81a4-5669-47e1-b070-01e0bd7e1460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be far worse for millions of Americans.

Before the deep state's smear campaign really revs up--**[see it here for yourself.](https://substack.com/redirect/210e81a4-5669-47e1-b070-01e0bd7e1460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/210e81a4-5669-47e1-b070-01e0bd7e1460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Kilmar Abrego Garcia faces Monday deportation to Uganda
Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Salvadoran migrant at the center of a Trump administration immigration crackdown, will report to the ICE Baltimore Field Office on Monday where he's expected to be arrested and **[deported to Uganda](https://substack.com/redirect/c4141c81-2894-422f-ab12-ed41ef4913d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , not his home country.
* **Six-month legal battle spans multiple courts** : The case has involved an extraordinary court fight across two continents, dozens of hearings, and three federal judges in Tennessee and Maryland, with the DOJ alleging he's an MS-13 member who was caught smuggling migrants, while supporters claim he's a hard-working father being vilified.
* **Government offers plea deal to Costa Rica, rejected** : The Justice Department offered to send Abrego Garcia to Costa Rica in exchange for a guilty plea on human smuggling charges, which he declined, leading his attorneys to claim "vindictive" prosecution and coordinated pressure from multiple agencies.
* **Complex deportation due to safety concerns** : An immigration judge ruled Abrego Garcia couldn't be sent back to El Salvador due to danger there, leading to the unusual third-country deportation to Uganda after he illegally entered the U.S. as a teenager and lived in Maryland with his family.
* **Potential defiance of court order** : ICE's planned arrest may violate a court order from Obama-appointed Judge Paula Xinis that sought to prevent immediate arrest upon his return, while DHS Secretary Kristi Noem vowed the administration "will not stop fighting" until he faces justice and leaves the country.
