name: Dudley Brown
subject: WE NEED YOU to Help End 100 Years of Gun Control!
body:
This may be our only chance!
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0oz1mvi2zja3bipch06audjjvd0yn4rjtek73jbvi4m4m5vzpiirh2vqvmokbv19cr201jy5bu&__stmp=t1k0u9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights.
* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=bfmxu080eqwy4fmaohb2ddi6a12znicoxgkllx177tooc6nkysoluatj1029ehb8kcz3g6vevd2vp7m3uuvvzknhiq2fn9acv7lg4jurnuvmhd9xazfzmhq4zzudpm0bf023tbr7ja4sfhl4zze5hmt3bh2wl2cwhcrt1uj3miqq3t45geqprun1d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

What happens in the next few months could change the course of the Second Amendment in America.

On one hand, you and I have a once unimaginable historic opportunity to _repeal a century’s worth of radical gun control_ pushed on America from Presidents Biden, Obama, Clinton, and even as far back as FDR!

On the other hand, gun grabbers, Washington, D.C. insiders, and their pals in the national media are scheming behind the scenes to undermine our once-in-a-generation chance just long enough for the mid-terms to _crush_ our hopes and dreams.

You see, in just the first six months of the second Trump Administration, you and I have already racked up huge wins, like forcing the ATF and DOJ to abandon enforcement of many Biden-era gun control executive orders.

We’ve even come within _inches_ of outright REPEALING key sections of the National Firearms Act of 1934 (NFA) in Congress.

But if we’re going to _finish the job_ by making the pro-gun wins permanent and finally repealing the anti-gun NFA in Congress, I hope I can count on every National Association for Gun Rights member’s action right now.

**[Will you please sign your “END 100 YEARS OF GUN CONTROL” petitions to House Speaker Mike Johnson and Senate Majority Leader John Thune right away](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=upwectf1kgtr1k7dktp1mlrwofs9umnh9uwtv9165rvzaavb1ms9ktjwsohwvd2skbenl8q0cbgsv2qxg5fsoeduxt6lgr0yac1bylv2483vzk01fkfun7jzodqml5tno8eyf0g4iexxazu2lkisbf6ct2mjyw88s1j3izox8nhxlr5q6tcb96&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**?

Please act immediately, because right now is the critical moment for showing GOP leaders in Congress that we’re dead serious about sending nearly 100 years of gun control to the trash heap of history.

The consequences for letting up the pressure now will leave a DEVASTATING scar on our right to bear arms for decades to come.

_I’m afraid if we allow the Republican majorities to keep Biden-era gun controls on the books -- on top of the last century of infringements on our God-given rights -- we may never be able to reverse them and it’ll be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh_.

The good news is, for the moment, you and I have all the cards to save the Second Amendment, if we use them.

As I mentioned, we already succeeded earlier this summer in forcing John Thune and Mike Johnson to reduce one key gun tax in the “Big Beautiful Bill.”

Unfortunately, at the last minute, Republican Senate Majority Leader John Thune kowtowed to the will of an unelected Obama-era Senate staffer and refused to include repealing the GUN REGISTRATION scheme related to that tax in the final text.

Even before the ink was dry on President Trump's signature, House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-LA) and Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-SD) were already begging for mercy.

Mercy from gun owners and National Association for Gun Rights supporters like you for whom they narrowly failed to deliver the biggest win on restoring the Second Amendment in American history.

Almost immediately, they realized it was a mistake. House Speaker Mike Johnson rushed to _Fox News_ to call for a re-do, saying: _“We’re going to do this again. We’re gonna have a second reconciliation package in the fall and a third in the spring of next year”

– House Speaker Mike Johnson on The Ingraham Angle 7/3/2025_ Specifically, another bill will give gun owners like you and me the chance we need to push HISTORIC pro-gun wins over the finish line. Wins like: **> >> Repealing The NFA:** This 100-year-old gun registration and taxation scheme is designed to effectively BAN scores of semi-automatic rifles, shotguns and even suppressors by making gun ownership unaffordable. Ending this entire scheme is the only way to prevent future gun grabbers from exploiting it to ban all semi-automatic firearms! **> >> Defunding and Abolishing the ATF:** Even President Trump is calling on at least a $400 million or 26% budget cut to the ATF, targeting the specific parts of the agency who spent decades persecuting and prosecuting ordinary gun buyers and sellers. Speaker Johnson and John Thune would be wise not to undermine President Trump and the Second Amendment on this. **> >> Ending Biden-Era Gun Control:** With so many gun control “executive actions” placed on the books by the Biden Administration and including “Red Flag” Gun Confiscation funding for states, Speaker Johnson and John Thune have the power to end it all – by defunding it tomorrow if they want to. Make no mistake, Speaker Johnson and John Thune are not pledging to do another “big bill” out of the kindness of their hearts or out of love for the Second Amendment.

They’re _saying_ it because they’re currently sweating over the pressure they’re getting from you. Whether or not they do it depends entirely on us keeping the pressure up.

_Every Capitol Hill insider I’ve spoken with says both Johnson and Thune, as well as many key Senate offices are still reporting more phone calls in their offices from National Association for Gun Rights’ members than almost any other issue, weeks after the first “big bill_.”

This has the politicians and the entire beltway consultant class in full panic mode, that pro-gun voters who delivered Republican majorities in last year’s election will take them away just as fast next year if they do not use their power to REPEAL these gun controls.

**[So please sign your “END 100 YEARS OF GUN CONTROL” petition right away so we can officially end nearly 100 years of gun control](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=bfmxu080eqwy4fmaohb2ddi6a12znicoxgkllx177tooc6nkysoluatj1029ehb8kcz3g6vevd2vp7m3uuvvzknhiq2fn9acv7lg4jurnuvmhd9xazfzmhq4zzudpm0bf023tbr7ja4sfhl4zze5hmt3bh2wl2cwhcrt1uj3miqq3t45geqprun1d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**!

As I mentioned earlier, that leaves you and me with _all the cards_. And with time running out before mid-term primary season gets underway, we have a win-win situation.

Either we pressure John Thune into repealing gun control in the next round of Reconciliation and Appropriations bills, or else we expose them for fraudulent campaign promises leaving pro-gun voters to PILE on them in the 2026 mid-term elections.

It’s no different than how Democrats blew historic elections in 1994, 2014, 2016, and 2024 after passing gun control.

If John Thune and Speaker Johnson use their Republican majorities to continue all these gun controls, no party label can protect them from the electoral consequences of voting anti-gun.

_But this ONLY works if you and I can maintain the pressure on John Thune, Speaker Johnson, and every elected GOP official_.

_If we let up the pressure for one moment -- especially just before critical September legislative deadlines -- this once-in-a-generation chance to STRIKE BACK could all go up in smoke_.

**[So please sign your “END 100 YEARS OF GUN CONTROL” petition right away so we can officially end nearly 100 years of gun control](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=bfmxu080eqwy4fmaohb2ddi6a12znicoxgkllx177tooc6nkysoluatj1029ehb8kcz3g6vevd2vp7m3uuvvzknhiq2fn9acv7lg4jurnuvmhd9xazfzmhq4zzudpm0bf023tbr7ja4sfhl4zze5hmt3bh2wl2cwhcrt1uj3miqq3t45geqprun1d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**!

As you’ll see, these petitions urge Thune and Johnson to finish the job of repealing decades of gun control and especially demand they stop subjecting the Second Amendment to the anti-gun antics of one unelected Obama-era Senate staffer.

These petitions warn Thune and Johnson to not squander this historic chance to repeal these gun controls.

_By blanketing Capitol Hill with thousands of pro-gun petitions right now, we can show them _we mean business_ and that we’re not going away until they finally fix the gun control repeals they narrowly failed to pass earlier this summer_.

But we can’t wait. We can’t hope. And we definitely can not trust politicians to do it on their own without our pressure. If we don’t act IMMEDIATELY, they may give up, and we may never get another shot as good as we have now to repeal gun control.

**[In addition to signing your “END 100 YEARS OF GUN CONTROL” petition, I hope you’ll also agree to a most generous contribution of $100 to the National Association for Gun Rights](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=upwectf1kgtr1k7dktp1mlrwofs9umnh9uwtv9165rvzgng7fqr1ollredpu5gy8oiknecggqzt6aa9oleazulb6ees49pb8wvzdcnbzarrugllj3s1wed4l5v8qcfg8cf7vbv803i6hhrmm297ofcepy0ezdl8sey0gv1kcytyelcdggiv8fc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**.

I know that’s a lot, perhaps more than you have ever thought about contributing before. But if you agree it is too important for the future of the Second Amendment to miss out on this once-in-a-generation chance to repeal gun control, then I hope you’ll agree to at least **[$50 or $25](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=upwectf1kgtr1k7dktp1mlrwofs9umnh9uwtv9165rvzgng7fqr1ollredpu5gy8oiknecggqzt6aa9oleazulb6ees49pb8wvzdcnbzarrugllj3s1wed4l5v8qcfg8cf7vbv803i6hhrmm297ofcepy0ezdl8sey0gv1kcytyelcdggiv8fc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**.

**[Whether you can afford $100, or a lesser amount of $50 or $25, any contribution will help pull out all the stops to mobilize Second Amendment supporters all over the country in the critical weeks ahead and to pressure the Republican majorities to fully and completely repeal unconstitutional gun control](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=upwectf1kgtr1k7dktp1mlrwofs9umnh9uwtv9165rvzgng7fqr1ollredpu5gy8oiknecggqzt6aa9oleazulb6ees49pb8wvzdcnbzarrugllj3s1wed4l5v8qcfg8cf7vbv803i6hhrmm297ofcepy0ezdl8sey0gv1kcytyelcdggiv8fc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**.

Together, let’s finally end nearly a century of federal gun control tyranny.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. What happens in the next few months could change the course of the Second Amendment in America.

Thanks to ongoing pressure from NAGR members, House Speaker Mike Johnson and Senate Majority Leader John Thune are indicating they may take up another bill where we _could_ finally REPEAL a century worth of gun control.

But whether it happens before critical deadlines, the mid-term elections, or even at all depends on how much more heat you and I can turn up in the coming weeks.

If we win, it would be the most historic pro-gun reform in history, but if they fail to act, it could be a devastating blow making many Biden-era gun controls permanent.

**[That’s why I need you to immediately sign your “END 100 YEARS OF GUN CONTROL” petition and consider giving your most generous contribution of $100, $50, or at least $25 to help turn up the heat on Mike Johnson and John Thune IMMEDIATELY](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=bfmxu080eqwy4fmaohb2ddi6a12znicoxgkllx177tooc6nkysoluatj1029ehb8kcz3g6vevd2vp7m3uuvvzknhiq2fn9acv7lg4jurnuvmhd9xazfzmhq4zzudpm0bf023tbr7ja4sfhl4zze5hmt3bh2wl2cwhcrt1uj3miqq3t45geqprun1d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k0u9&__onlt=h)**!

clean_body: This may be our only chance! Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights. | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, What happens in the next few months could change the course of the Second Amendment in America. On one hand, you and I have a once unimaginable historic opportunity to repeal a century’s worth of radical gun control pushed on America from Presidents Biden, Obama, Clinton, and even as far back as FDR! On the other hand, gun grabbers, Washington, D.C. insiders, and their pals in the national media are scheming behind the scenes to undermine our once-in-a-generation chance just long enough for the mid-terms to crush our hopes and dreams. You see, in just the first six months of the second Trump Administration, you and I have already racked up huge wins, like forcing the ATF and DOJ to abandon enforcement of many Biden-era gun control executive orders. We’ve even come within inches of outright REPEALING key sections of the National Firearms Act of 1934 (NFA) in Congress. But if we’re going to finish the job by making the pro-gun wins permanent and finally repealing the anti-gun NFA in Congress, I hope I can count on every National Association for Gun Rights member’s action right now. ? Please act immediately, because right now is the critical moment for showing GOP leaders in Congress that we’re dead serious about sending nearly 100 years of gun control to the trash heap of history. The consequences for letting up the pressure now will leave a DEVASTATING scar on our right to bear arms for decades to come. I’m afraid if we allow the Republican majorities to keep Biden-era gun controls on the books -- on top of the last century of infringements on our God-given rights -- we may never be able to reverse them and it’ll be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh. The good news is, for the moment, you and I have all the cards to save the Second Amendment, if we use them. As I mentioned, we already succeeded earlier this summer in forcing John Thune and Mike Johnson to reduce one key gun tax in the “Big Beautiful Bill.” Unfortunately, at the last minute, Republican Senate Majority Leader John Thune kowtowed to the will of an unelected Obama-era Senate staffer and refused to include repealing the GUN REGISTRATION scheme related to that tax in the final text. Even before the ink was dry on President Trump's signature, House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-LA) and Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-SD) were already begging for mercy. Mercy from gun owners and National Association for Gun Rights supporters like you for whom they narrowly failed to deliver the biggest win on restoring the Second Amendment in American history. Almost immediately, they realized it was a mistake. House Speaker Mike Johnson rushed to Fox News to call for a re-do, saying: “We’re going to do this again. We’re gonna have a second reconciliation package in the fall and a third in the spring of next year” – House Speaker Mike Johnson on The Ingraham Angle 7/3/2025 Specifically, another bill will give gun owners like you and me the chance we need to push HISTORIC pro-gun wins over the finish line. Wins like: > >> Repealing The NFA: This 100-year-old gun registration and taxation scheme is designed to effectively BAN scores of semi-automatic rifles, shotguns and even suppressors by making gun ownership unaffordable. Ending this entire scheme is the only way to prevent future gun grabbers from exploiting it to ban all semi-automatic firearms! > >> Defunding and Abolishing the ATF: Even President Trump is calling on at least a $400 million or 26% budget cut to the ATF, targeting the specific parts of the agency who spent decades persecuting and prosecuting ordinary gun buyers and sellers. Speaker Johnson and John Thune would be wise not to undermine President Trump and the Second Amendment on this. > >> Ending Biden-Era Gun Control: With so many gun control “executive actions” placed on the books by the Biden Administration and including “Red Flag” Gun Confiscation funding for states, Speaker Johnson and John Thune have the power to end it all – by defunding it tomorrow if they want to. Make no mistake, Speaker Johnson and John Thune are not pledging to do another “big bill” out of the kindness of their hearts or out of love for the Second Amendment. They’re saying it because they’re currently sweating over the pressure they’re getting from you. Whether or not they do it depends entirely on us keeping the pressure up. Every Capitol Hill insider I’ve spoken with says both Johnson and Thune, as well as many key Senate offices are still reporting more phone calls in their offices from National Association for Gun Rights’ members than almost any other issue, weeks after the first “big bill.” This has the politicians and the entire beltway consultant class in full panic mode, that pro-gun voters who delivered Republican majorities in last year’s election will take them away just as fast next year if they do not use their power to REPEAL these gun controls. ! As I mentioned earlier, that leaves you and me with all the cards. And with time running out before mid-term primary season gets underway, we have a win-win situation. Either we pressure John Thune into repealing gun control in the next round of Reconciliation and Appropriations bills, or else we expose them for fraudulent campaign promises leaving pro-gun voters to PILE on them in the 2026 mid-term elections. It’s no different than how Democrats blew historic elections in 1994, 2014, 2016, and 2024 after passing gun control. If John Thune and Speaker Johnson use their Republican majorities to continue all these gun controls, no party label can protect them from the electoral consequences of voting anti-gun. But this ONLY works if you and I can maintain the pressure on John Thune, Speaker Johnson, and every elected GOP official. If we let up the pressure for one moment -- especially just before critical September legislative deadlines -- this once-in-a-generation chance to STRIKE BACK could all go up in smoke. ! As you’ll see, these petitions urge Thune and Johnson to finish the job of repealing decades of gun control and especially demand they stop subjecting the Second Amendment to the anti-gun antics of one unelected Obama-era Senate staffer. These petitions warn Thune and Johnson to not squander this historic chance to repeal these gun controls. By blanketing Capitol Hill with thousands of pro-gun petitions right now, we can show them we mean business and that we’re not going away until they finally fix the gun control repeals they narrowly failed to pass earlier this summer. But we can’t wait. We can’t hope. And we definitely can not trust politicians to do it on their own without our pressure. If we don’t act IMMEDIATELY, they may give up, and we may never get another shot as good as we have now to repeal gun control. . I know that’s a lot, perhaps more than you have ever thought about contributing before. But if you agree it is too important for the future of the Second Amendment to miss out on this once-in-a-generation chance to repeal gun control, then I hope you’ll agree to at least . . Together, let’s finally end nearly a century of federal gun control tyranny. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. Thanks to ongoing pressure from NAGR members, House Speaker Mike Johnson and Senate Majority Leader John Thune are indicating they may take up another bill where we could finally REPEAL a century worth of gun control. But whether it happens before critical deadlines, the mid-term elections, or even at all depends on how much more heat you and I can turn up in the coming weeks. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8ti2fsnaruc0jr3o5432ob3skve19c7r6jkne1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk9kkbb7krmj8tair3epmbpkcls3tq4c8e165vmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z92opvlieqc1b5sou24m9o5vl5m2gnv9eniqkb30_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr71eqcgka7hrdse50vnr5pca4v0ludd62c8uojg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7vipblp462fgoao5nvs9pvb50f8k36sc82hh36g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze3qd844avigl3qq9hk4bt3stb2lqje63cld7bt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd68s1sevg876g37dt7o639dvfqlkbdlhghv1hlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc9923bdjt1susduk7e72omgm11tr6htgl1h3a60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlm2nhrrtp0ckm6b0eu3f78hpa5vgooqh14ijkko_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmnlrk5j24qnnmjhj72ng9akn40osqrgoosdl5d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3chgmepb0c3h2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj78hgodbdov936icn94j1454bpouknil0shg5jg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5cdi62pr5c1ge49fg)

name: Dudley Brown
subject: BREAKING: UN “Small Arms Treaty” enforcement scheme in the United States?!
body:
BOMBSHELL: New U.S. Department of Commerce firearms export rule mirrors UN global gun control requirements. [unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihu1bqw71ka9oevftu68nm1tu67ifio83vq8mqjfjkb6k45xfgqaecdkowmtjz2easwkjio0tb1funpqfgvypm5oopuxe&__stmp=t1k1av&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Fellow Patriot,

**BREAKING:** **The White House could be on the cusp of adopting an ILLEGAL Biden-era rule to enforce the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in America!**

This comes just _WEEKS_ before the UN’s annual “Small Arms Treaty” conference in Geneva, Switzerland, where globalist one-world dictators will discuss their international gun control strategy for implementation and enforcement of the treaty around the world.

Last year, the Biden administration’s Commerce Department published a rule (**RIN 0694-AJ46**) that _directly mirrors the language in the UN “Small Arms Treaty_ ,” intended to bar the U.S. from supplying arms to civilians in other countries.

The Rule has remained unimplemented since then, but began to move last week -- just as we started packing for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” conference later this month:

**Your National Association for Gun Rights is calling on the Trump administration to:** **A)** **_Rescind this rule_** implementing the UN “Small Arms Treaty” using domestic policy; and **B)** Ensure that **_NO American taxpayer dollars_** are put toward implementing the Arms Trade Treaty, as directed by federal statute. **[So right now, before you do anything else, I’m calling on every single NAGR member to please sign your “NO UN GUN BAN” petition to President Trump, urging him to STOP THIS MADNESS>>](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1909wns27051cpw1msz1k32sn2m5gilz6hbvfrci7s0r0gbbskvwuumjosx1367jfz5xp9sq7u08nrtqnu02anxsyjjcaolea2bbaox71graj31tsphkk33czavnp46d7zcahax3lu4z6ykspg28uuw50zt4v6gbcrk2kv058e1h9bg0ijwzidquk9pw70llqbnmxk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k1av&__onlt=h)**
The Commerce Gun Control rule is directly tied back to the United Nations global gun control efforts, which insist that governments – not civilians – should have control of small arms and access to the tools of self-defense.

The rule doesn’t just flirt with globalist gun control, it directly parrots propaganda from the UN’s so-called “Small Arms Treaty” (the Arms Trade Treaty).

Line for line, the Commerce Gun Control Rule reads like it was ripped straight from the UN’s playbook; **the similarities aren’t a coincidence, they’re a blueprint.**

_This is the deep state working overtime to sneak America into compliance with, and even expand on, that dangerous treaty_.

And here’s the kicker... this Interim Final Rule blatantly violates Public Law 118-42, Section 537, which flat-out bans the use of taxpayer dollars to implement the Arms Trade Treaty.

If this rule were passed, it would have DISASTROUS economic implications for US firearms manufacturers and exporters.

More importantly, the United States would **aid in implementing the Arms Trade Treaty gun control and assist through our own policymaking process.**
**[Tell President Trump to TAKE ACTION>>](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1909wns27051cpw1msz1k32sn2m5gilz6hbvfrci7s0r0gbbskvwuumjosx1367jfz5xp9sq7u08nrtqnu02anxsyjjcaolea2bbaox71graj31tsphkk33czavnp46d7zcahax3lu4z6ykspg28uuw50zt4v6gbcrk2kv058e1h9bg0ijwzidquk9pw70llqbnmxk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k1av&__onlt=h)**
Like all gun control, the Commerce Department’s Gun Control Export Rule will only harm innocents around the world while restricting legitimate firearm exports domestically.

It **won’t stop** America’s adversaries from arming hostile actors.

It **won’t stop** rogue regimes from continuing to oppress their people with guns.

Warlords will **continue to wreak havoc** on civilian populations with guns. Innocent populations will only be further disarmed!

When I addressed the UN last year, I said to their faces that _“giving the state the monopoly of the possession of small arms is dangerous to all free-thinking individuals and liberty as a whole.”_

And that’s the same message I plan to deliver again later this month in Geneva.
**[SIGN YOUR PETITION to President Trump telling him that the United States has no business participating in GLOBAL CIVILIAN DISARMAMENT>>](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=1909wns27051cpw1msz1k32sn2m5gilz6hbvfrci7s0r0gbbskvwuumjosx1367jfz5xp9sq7u08nrtqnu02anxsyjjcaolea2bbaox71graj31tsphkk33czavnp46d7zcahax3lu4z6ykspg28uuw50zt4v6gbcrk2kv058e1h9bg0ijwzidquk9pw70llqbnmxk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1k1av&__onlt=h)**
**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown

National Association for Gun Rights**

subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Peter,

**After Amy Klobuchar backed away from facing my People-First Movement in 2026, there have been five likely contenders to emerge. I don’t care who I face; I know it’s GAME, SET, MATCH.**

**But we need to start RIGHT NOW.** **[Can you chip in just $5 to help me become Minnesota’s FIRST-EVER Black Republican Senator?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=1aeacf4bf34649eba396d58c026c08cb&_e=oZJGjk56hl7qj5kp68xh7FNQSrOutlcHdt-0HElHxhUeejlddB62KG_gvzAJ2OXEZypKmGogxgQ8jg3ErDZoiZ-VRzCm5XypZ2sMDgSOtBhPWOlgJi9Z79iBEoQBw3XCzw7d16X3b8fc_3iRs2eglYprVj7LwAPvV7TrSxstKQp9no9Q3x5WAG_JoSUfbeYKykFaBD47kppxGHlCZJZufumx9jNvcEjyfoXjNVFrzkemBgCRdh47aNq12cAIXGRxAu6O7q7uce4XYmuBbU4YWRTOKmN0_EggxTNP7FhihpJU19KuXFo-UvGZLCXo1UsaAhmfzfic7K86B-aof_ITmW8cSIjoEGi6yIYz1Bc0xF7curkBJluVhhiJrmeaCpQcWwdKcFwXven-Yug_qr9kSpDH6rV9-8ichlSLHW5G4ulOSREfCREdoGapHuEEX4GKt7yD5L5-TOGFozNtIUcSom3Mbr-3jJUc6_ch3R-t8hehlvgkvR2-uPu3FoGCFUcdvlg-XrEISHpV1z7hv5_kO0TgOn4qyOFVRI641B3QPZSTI_p-czWqQalwUMrUrhvV)**

From my days playing in Division 1 College Basketball and the NBA, I know the most important factor of success is KNOWING YOUR OPPONENTS and STUDYING THE FILM! So, let’s dive into each of these Radical Leftists...

[**TIM WALZ**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=1aeacf4bf34649eba396d58c026c08cb&_e=oZJGjk56hl7qj5kp68xh7FNQSrOutlcHdt-0HElHxhUeejlddB62KG_gvzAJ2OXEZypKmGogxgQ8jg3ErDZoiZ-VRzCm5XypZ2sMDgSOtBhPWOlgJi9Z79iBEoQBw3XCzw7d16X3b8fc_3iRs2eglYprVj7LwAPvV7TrSxstKQp9no9Q3x5WAG_JoSUfbeYK-sh2hOtyJo6vfBws0wNMBTXYCz7KG-9DH3jLSWq3s2jdjp4z3K-4sEhX8rE6G0z-SyQl1GdBsXQah0tqvHx_U3yQ3x-BSsGKkkA4JXpuhi1Q7WkNNv0j8tqJ_wDE4kMJ9MgScEnEIYQ55teZeCpgWMU46pXZsDvU2GYQOfR0VwoQ9TNhoXNH2LQh_hp6Aa2MBucWBvi_o-MxwR0tujtXWJbow8GoDcENpaMjOvntMXQIBNT8xOmAJ5tW5zXHv1j-1Rv1XEkxc782rvVUrqCxK4mNOa6gqwGUGZX689kFXmsU6rzzV57X2uZ4HZuCGyq8_O1Ck9UorkT8W5OFIr7U-EPRYeDlgegWet405wvxlRNRVYEXMBxP1i56A9F2wLb8)
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=1aeacf4bf34649eba396d58c026c08cb&_e=oZJGjk56hl7qj5kp68xh7FNQSrOutlcHdt-0HElHxhUeejlddB62KG_gvzAJ2OXEZypKmGogxgQ8jg3ErDZoiZ-VRzCm5XypZ2sMDgSOtBhPWOlgJi9Z79iBEoQBw3XCzw7d16X3b8fc_3iRs2eglYprVj7LwAPvV7TrSxstKQp9no9Q3x5WAG_JoSUfbeYKrWMg6LTob97VJxQgZJgBJiYMdrcjPFB-tgbfrYgVTYhDqOviQ6HBIB6LXXolKBn0qvLd1lh9BD70uejkbR4VUPbNBUvWIgHdp-127e7ZB_aTLXw2dVyD8BfypwBEcZt9mdBiMLBnffh4ltXMSYgjmVDOlUPkPtresfmd1mg_N_fFqccIJEAjwh7IdzHiDGb7gIZ_g35PI9N4tf9Ut8MSclfhy6z8c9FGD5xbntKbxVDUxCDUboSh1J071sakDO-ClcfMmlI5PnN6t4y3YcjPU6FwCC09SUgISvyO6YKKBAWRUTCCFtDOoUDpUuy198MKWZecOI_nH_JHwl3Fa5MVBc_n_qX1vbQUq8f3jCrLSbuX6vW3IEyfxn15GZPVQ7h4)
_As the Governor of Minnesota, Walz has become one of the MOST RADICAL Leftists in American history. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

The picture above should tell you all you need to know. She was in line to assume the Governor’s Office if Kamala and Tim Walz won, and now she’s ITCHING for more power over Minnesotans. If she runs, it’s GAME, SET, MATCH. After running for office twice, I learned a lot about how these campaigns and elections work. The odds are stacked against me. The Left controls the Media and has billionaire Deep State donors to support them. I don’t care who I face; I’m confident I’ll win no matter what. Minnesotans are waking up. I may not be “electable,” but the word “electable” is a SHAM word. “Electable” Republicans have been trying to take down the Left in Minnesota for years, but it hasn’t worked. We need someone who isn’t afraid to mince words and hold back. We need a free-thinking Black Republican who will NEVER be a slave or servant to the Left. All I need now is your support. Godspeed, Royce White | Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: This is all part of MAGA's plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Courier: Trump's executive orders seem to be ripped right from the pages of Project 2025 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082525_1&amount=25]
Remember when opponents of voting rights spent 2024 disavowing the Heritage Foundation's "Project 2025", Team? Now that they're in control, they are following that playbook line by line.
Organized by the Heritage Foundation, a right-wing, dark money, inside-the-beltway, anti-voting think tank , and advised by more than 100 conservative groups, Project 2025 put forth a 922-page list of policy recommendations, going agency by agency in the federal government.
So far the Trump administration has followed Project 2025 in five major ways:
➜ Military immigration enforcement. They've deployed U.S. troops on our domestic borders, with ongoing operations in Los Angeles and Washington, D.C., supporting ICE and their operations to round up anyone who might not be a legal immigrant -- with a lot of legal Americans wrongly arrested. Trump is threatening New York and Chicago are next.
➜ Filling the administration with the authors of Project 2025. From installing Russell Vought, the main author, as head of the Office of Management and Budget to making the head of the FCC section head of the FCC to and more, the author's list has been appointed to powerful positions en masse.
➜ Mass firings in the civil service. Elon Musk's DOGE team started with a buyout scheme for federal employees and when that failed, moved to layoffs. The Supreme Court recently cleared the path for mass firings. Project 2025 calls for replacing the open positions with partisan MAGA henchmen who are loyal to the president and not the Constitution.
➜ Persecuting transgender Americans. The Trump administration has attacked gender identity across the board.
➜ Environmental rollbacks. From pulling out of the Paris Climate Accords (again) to opening Alaska's land to drilling to valuing fossil fuels over all other forms of energy production, they're dismantling environmental regulation piece by piece.
We're just eight months in. If they've already accomplished all this, you can bet Project 2025's recommendations for voter suppression are going to be added to Trump's executive orders attacking our elections and mail-in ballots . We must use this playbook of theirs against them and fight back however we can.
Please, step up and fuel our efforts to defend our fundamental right to vote and more with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082525_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082525_1&amount=20]

Here’s the situation: President Trump and Republicans are trying to dismantle our democracy piece by piece, by gutting our federal agencies, redrawing congressional maps, threatening to end vote-by-mail, and more. And right now, Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see that Democrats are exhausted and ready to throw in the towel. They’re counting on all of us giving up. We can't let that happen. That’s why reaching our upcoming end-of-month fundraising goal is so important. After our next FEC deadline passes, we’ll be required to report how many contributions we received and how many people chipped in. We need a strong report to show _everyone_ that Democrats are not done fighting. We hope this message has shown you the urgency and importance of your contribution. subject: 🚨ALERT: GOP Mega-Donor Dick Uihlein Sitting Out Illinois Governor Primary
body:
view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/47bed80241c9/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10354553?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=25c8fbdf81) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=25c8fbdf81)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Sources: GOP Mega-Donor Dick Uihlein Sitting Out Illinois Governor Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/sources-gop-mega-donor-dick-uihlein-sitting-out-illinois-governor-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/sources-gop-mega-donor-dick-uihlein-sitting-out-illinois-governor-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Richard Uihlein (Credit: Stephen J. Serio)
By Illinois Review

As the Republican primary for Illinois governor takes shape, billionaire mega-donor Richard Uihlein’s name is once again circulating in political circles.

In recent weeks, advisers connected to Ted Dabrowski’s campaign have spread rumors that Uihlein is backing the Wirepoints president’s bid to unseat Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker, suggesting a significant contribution was forthcoming.

But multiple sources with direct knowledge of the matter say those claims are completely false.

Sources told this
publication (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/source-uihlein-camp-mortified-after-spending-50m-for-il-gov-race-to-be-called-minutes-after-polls-closed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) that just weeks after the 2022 governor’s election, members of Richard Uihlein’s inner circle – including his wife, Elizabeth – were left ‘mortified’ by the outcome, having spent $52 million on the governor’s race only to lose by double digits.

During the 2023 school board races, local parental rights organizations were told by the same advisers spreading rumors connected to the Dabrowski campaign that Uihlein would make a substantial contribution to Dan Proft’s People Who Play By The Rules PAC to support conservative school board candidates – but the funding never materialized. In reality, those promises were entirely false.

In April 2023, this publication
revealed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823#:~:text=The%20Richard%20Uihlein%2Dfunded%20People,candidates%20over%20the%20last%20several) that the Richard Uihlein-funded People Who Play By The Rules PAC, in quarterly disclosures, paid three political consultants $142,000 while spending just $3,700 to support a small cluster of conservative school board candidates during the April elections.

Unfortunately, the candidates lost, but the real winners were the consultants who paid themselves generously. The founder, president and treasurer of the PAC – Naples’ Dan Proft – received the majority of the consulting fees, totaling $75,000 while the rest went to two other consulting firms closely aligned with Proft.

The Illinois State Board of Elections website also revealed in 2023 – long after the elections – that Proft continued to pay himself a $25,000-a-month consulting fee using leftover PAC funds from Uihlein’s donations.

In the last week, this publication has
revealed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25c8fbdf81-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) that since 2020, Wirepoints has seen a steep decline in revenue. The organization reported $1.12 million at its peak that year, but by 2022, revenue had fallen to $709,000, dropping further to just $294,175 in 2023.

With expenses totaling $688,601 that year, Wirepoints faced a deficit of $394,426.

Despite bringing in only $294,175 in 2023, the fiscally conservative nonprofit spent $200,000 on executive salaries – $100,000 to President Ted Dabrowski and $100,000 to the vice president. An additional $295,252 went to other staff, bringing total salaries for the year to $495,252.

For years, Dabrowski has warned about the state’s chronic overspending – what he calls the “corrupt practice of deficit spending” – arguing that Springfield politicians consistently spend more than they take in.

However, his organization mirrors the state’s spending habits, raising only $294,175 in 2023 while incurring $688,601 in operating expenses, resulting in a deficit that he cites as evidence of the problems in Illinois government.

At this time, Wirepoints has not filed any disclosures with the IRS for fiscal year 2024.

Dabrowski will face DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick in the Republican primary for governor, with additional candidates expected to enter the race in the coming months.

The primary is scheduled for March 17, 2026.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Sources: GOP Mega-Donor Dick Uihlein Sitting Out Illinois Governor Primary () Richard Uihlein (Credit: Stephen J. Serio) By Illinois Review As the Republican primary for Illinois governor takes shape, billionaire mega-donor Richard Uihlein’s name is once again circulating in political circles. In recent weeks, advisers connected to Ted Dabrowski’s campaign have spread rumors that Uihlein is backing the Wirepoints president’s bid to unseat Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker, suggesting a significant contribution was forthcoming. But multiple sources with direct knowledge of the matter say those claims are completely false. Sources told this publication () that just weeks after the 2022 governor’s election, members of Richard Uihlein’s inner circle – including his wife, Elizabeth – were left ‘mortified’ by the outcome, having spent $52 million on the governor’s race only to lose by double digits. During the 2023 school board races, local parental rights organizations were told by the same advisers spreading rumors connected to the Dabrowski campaign that Uihlein would make a substantial contribution to Dan Proft’s People Who Play By The Rules PAC to support conservative school board candidates – but the funding never materialized. In reality, those promises were entirely false. In April 2023, this publication revealed () that the Richard Uihlein-funded People Who Play By The Rules PAC, in quarterly disclosures, paid three political consultants $142,000 while spending just $3,700 to support a small cluster of conservative school board candidates during the April elections. Unfortunately, the candidates lost, but the real winners were the consultants who paid themselves generously. The founder, president and treasurer of the PAC – Naples’ Dan Proft – received the majority of the consulting fees, totaling $75,000 while the rest went to two other consulting firms closely aligned with Proft. The Illinois State Board of Elections website also revealed in 2023 – long after the elections – that Proft continued to pay himself a $25,000-a-month consulting fee using leftover PAC funds from Uihlein’s donations. In the last week, this publication has revealed () that since 2020, Wirepoints has seen a steep decline in revenue. The organization reported $1.12 million at its peak that year, but by 2022, revenue had fallen to $709,000, dropping further to just $294,175 in 2023. With expenses totaling $688,601 that year, Wirepoints faced a deficit of $394,426. Despite bringing in only $294,175 in 2023, the fiscally conservative nonprofit spent $200,000 on executive salaries – $100,000 to President Ted Dabrowski and $100,000 to the vice president. An additional $295,252 went to other staff, bringing total salaries for the year to $495,252. For years, Dabrowski has warned about the state’s chronic overspending – what he calls the “corrupt practice of deficit spending” – arguing that Springfield politicians consistently spend more than they take in. However, his organization mirrors the state’s spending habits, raising only $294,175 in 2023 while incurring $688,601 in operating expenses, resulting in a deficit that he cites as evidence of the problems in Illinois government. At this time, Wirepoints has not filed any disclosures with the IRS for fiscal year 2024. Dabrowski will face DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick in the Republican primary for governor, with additional candidates expected to enter the race in the coming months. The primary is scheduled for March 17, 2026. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: a ton of new data — here’s what you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Wishful thinking won’t save us, Peter
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94177?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA)
Peter, too often when campaigns face cold, hard data showing a tough road ahead, they turn a blind eye. It’s one of the reasons Democrats are where we are today.
I’m determined not to repeat the mistakes of the past. So I’m going to share with you the truth about what the data is showing about our race here in New Jersey. I’m also going to share my plan for how we overcome the obstacles and win. And then, if you’re all in on beating Jack Ciattarelli and preventing New Jersey from falling into the hands of a MAGA loyalist, I’m going to ask you to **[split what you can between my team and State Democrats Committee to help me put that plan into action.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94177?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA)**
**Here’s an unvarnished look at what the data tells us:**
**→Polling.** Since the general election began a few weeks ago, one poll after another has come out showing me with a small lead (often just 3-6%) over Jack Ciattarelli — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the outcome either way.
And that’s not even taking into account the possibility that the polls could be underestimating Republicans, Peter, as they have in several recent elections. We need to campaign like we’re behind — _because we may well be._
**→Recent elections.** The 2024 presidential race in New Jersey was decided by less than 6% The last governor’s race here? Decided by just 3%. Recent election results and recent polls all tell the same story: _New Jersey is a battleground state._
**→Attack ads.** Ciattarelli’s super PAC has announced plans to spend over a million dollars attacking me across New Jersey, with plenty more planned in the weeks ahead. One recent poll found that after undecided voters heard these false attacks without a fact-check, _they swung heavily in Ciattarelli’s direction._
**Here’s what this all means, Peter: we are in an incredibly competitive race, and we will only win it if we work night and day to get our message out all across New Jersey. And that’s exactly what my team and I plan to do.**
We need to get out of the usual Democratic comfort zone and show up everywhere so that voters can actually hear what we have to say.
We need to blanket the state with our plan for lowering costs and making daily life easier for New Jersey families.
We need to reach out personally to undecided voters — and make sure every single one of our supporters shows up to vote this fall.
And it won’t be enough to fight Ciattarelli and his dark-money machine to a draw. We need to outhustle, outwork, and outsmart them every step of the way.
**[Peter, I’m all in on winning this race for the people of New Jersey. I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights, and I won’t hesitate to run toward this one. If you’re with me, I need your support. Please split whatever you can between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us win what is shaping up to be a nail-biter of a race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94177?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94178?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94178?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94178?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94178?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94178?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94178?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94177?refcode=em20250825-9324&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9324%2E614464%2Ek1pPNA)
---
Thank you,
Mikie

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Back to school
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can never forget.
#

Right now, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens in America.
Gun violence isn’t always in the headlines, and it can be easy for us to forget that it’s happening every day. But for the families who now have empty seats at their dinner table — like the families who lost a child in Uvalde, Parkland, or Newtown — they can never forget.
[**GIFFORDS is working to end the gun violence crisis. As millions of students go back to school, chip in $10 to help support our mission >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250825-1-b&t=1&akid=10817%2E3935704%2EuD4WbV)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250825-1-b&t=2&akid=10817%2E3935704%2EuD4WbV)**
Team,
**#1**
Gun violence is the top cause of death for children and teens in our country — more than car crashes and cancer.
**400**
Since Columbine, there have been more than 400 school shootings. Nearly 400,000 students have experienced gun violence at school.
**$1,010,000**
The NRA has only become more dangerous since Columbine. They have already spent more than $1 million this year to lobby elected officials to support their extreme agenda, including giving tax breaks for gun silencers and dismantling our progress on gun safety.
**$10**
That’s how much we’re asking you to chip in today — so we can overcome the gun lobby’s influence in our politics and elect gun safety champions.
We know what you’re thinking: How could my $10 possibly defeat the NRA? But as you read this, thousands of people have already pitched in to GIFFORDS PAC, _and they’re hoping you join them with a $10 donation today._
[**So, will you pitch in a contribution of $10 or more to help GIFFORDS PAC end the gun violence epidemic in America? Every donation allows us to invest in more competitive races across the country and do everything we can to keep our kids safe.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250825-1-b&t=3&akid=10817%2E3935704%2EuD4WbV)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Why I went to South Korea and Japan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Last week, I had the honor of leading a Senate delegation, alongside Senator Tammy Duckworth, to South Korea and Japan.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113964045/565498013/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmQyNGM4Yi1jNjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ig0L1KE2P1BR4nMVD3D0ExaUjziYIsZpJiwWQhaBpg=&emci=76398cf4-c181-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4fd24c8b-c681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)

| | Last week, I had the honor of leading a Senate delegation, alongside Senator Tammy Duckworth, to South Korea and Japan. Our mission was clear: strengthen America's alliances, deepen our economic ties, and ensure that our nation is ready to meet the challenges of the future. As the son of Korean immigrants, standing in Seoul carried a special meaning for me. I spoke with young people about their hopes for the future, and I met with leaders about how our nations can work together to advance shared priorities, from security in the Pacific to new frontiers in technology and innovation. **This delegation visit wasn't just about diplomacy abroad, it was about what it means for us back home in New Jersey.** Stronger partnerships with our allies abroad mean new opportunities for our businesses, more investment in advanced manufacturing, and greater cooperation in areas like quantum computing and shipbuilding at home. These are industries that will shape the economy for decades to come, and New Jersey is ready to lead. At a time when global instability feels more urgent than ever, America needs to show that we stand by our allies and that we are committed to building a safer, more prosperous future together. That's what this trip was about. I'll continue to bring these conversations home, making sure New Jersey families and workers are at the center of the economic opportunities that come from America's leadership on the world stage. Thank you for believing in this work. We're showing the world what's possible when America leads with strength and integrity. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: Many are saying this is the greatest merchandise ever
body:
Last night, more than 14,000 people joined Governor Newsom’s livestream after he signed legislation to place Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act, on the ballot.

Here’s a link to the livestream if you missed it.
https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4500?t=1001&akid=2496%2E4767699%2ECGymhV

So what does the Election Rigging Response Act do and how do we win?

It's a simple, temporary, voter-approved way to keep our maps fair in the face of partisan power grabs. Unlike Trump’s backroom deals approach, it puts the choice in California voters’ hands this November.

And the path to victory is the one we have walked before: conversations with voters. Neighbor to neighbor. Friend to friend. Text and phone call conversations.

That work starts now. We need your help reaching out to voters. Sign up to volunteer today.

https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/volunteer-erra/?t=1002&akid=2496%2E4767699%2ECGymhV

Vote-by-mail ballots begin going out in early October -- that’s roughly six weeks from now. Every single minute that passes is critical for our ability to win.

This election will not be easy. Just this week, Trump said he is ready to take us on, and has already pledged $100M to oppose our initiative.

What they don’t know is we have a secret weapon: a people-driven campaign. More than 12,000 people have raised their hand to stand up and fight. Join them.

SIGN UP NOW: https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/volunteer-erra/?t=1003&akid=2496%2E4767699%2ECGymhV

There’s a role for everyone in this fight. We’ll train you, provide ongoing support, and set you up with peer outreach, knocking on doors, texting, or calling -- whatever you are able to do.

After you sign up, you’ll be redirected to a virtual guide with resources to get started. An organizer will also reach out to help you along the way.

We’re on the frontlines, fighting for our democracy. We can win if you’re standing with us.

Team Newsom

SIGN UP NOW: https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/volunteer-erra/?akid=2496%2E4767699%2ECGymhV

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.gavinnewsom.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2496%2E4767699%2ECGymhV

name: Dinesh D'Souza
subject: This email could change someone's life
body:
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4dfe684e9914806b4bedce54022f38d&_e=qi_sMywF12zjlmqx_Hf8uEpBPf0FVJpSqrRezmgAh3267QgdYc5EgNqK6J0ivdTDKcj6JsC4JGSXaU6Nq4Vrh-S8CZEZ_qSounfAnaEggH5qmjosc8HDv4tO9YXMYVYe9HQNUA--_BPbq6VsHQvGy4KpZip0pkaq8fSEV4qAWJykPki9-ei87Z3eLNX0X1pFjPGJ75xgMTdaL1G_vS86JuSWuJBeCpKM2AUBI_sihPW5QY2u_JRrccU7hkpbob8RhRuLx28ZwawLx3l_0aUOjth0Rl1YPA2eH7WeiHEomnjHSqWQzHWsvbTPxJdrwLwuXVVLGL6_-7kRk1LKj_omq8geVpYbuAO3k8sSc6gALeKdTTWiItfMh3gmCFtnE6r8pcJalBQ4x_T5LiAkTJRYE6e2NNtEPKl1DJFlE_VYZMWeZoTwa2vv9C31K1H5ENIL2MV9dCUbXoPTPU-MoQ0XeKLNVIUX8vekrEdHGGKC56GVKIFzHnsvAvKj7ImhTI5lUcN5Z1ebqWLbDQ5Zsz3pNz7cHIbbTLZWYjDj7_VORY8s64vnbXp0StIw3cEFrH1cw4V4jNCIlopYvVzJT4sbqgD6zsxdrZh-ct56jgJPhJjmHKcHI4JyNuCKkVC_LgJJ)

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4dfe684e9914806b4bedce54022f38d&_e=qi_sMywF12zjlmqx_Hf8uEpBPf0FVJpSqrRezmgAh3267QgdYc5EgNqK6J0ivdTDKcj6JsC4JGSXaU6Nq4Vrh-S8CZEZ_qSounfAnaEggH5qmjosc8HDv4tO9YXMYVYe9HQNUA--_BPbq6VsHQvGy4KpZip0pkaq8fSEV4qAWJzQIY8XgUIGdDEV3I7QirjqHvFb44EbpMAWHQJ3OtdGKsCxClyT9ah-a8lVRYEXd965fXEXN1t4AomwtLElW2nbetemMU1GN-LXZgQi61RLWh-EPkUWy6-I_tZ3tjvHnqQo-4ZwUB-AKyDn3HWaiZxfzm9pbmbJw8b2Oa8DsyXfk-TrqJujH4Y5O8pK92MHnjsPdi0FQ68BScpMc87eAWHfqJCKcYOUnMORI158atwgK6Mtdu6_VuHQEp3WDI4xI1TVkrBJHrWX3ZMVXyVrzXGMJHFtd1tJ-nZMHnIEA7thzULpoBeaVZ8bObykP6fLqYCHG_tW91T502r3zcEuUWTbegx8qC7ikr0Us7hsjI0Oi4-KGwEViBL1rK0p0qZwENMwX9UR_72lGwr2GfFq0hQWCB-5Dui2oUVqSmQSWoQnoFYGTh0QYkiNHA8-u8ihfUHvpUC-VrEg1RAzLSUyqfEa)

[Donate Now](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4dfe684e9914806b4bedce54022f38d&_e=qi_sMywF12zjlmqx_Hf8uEpBPf0FVJpSqrRezmgAh3267QgdYc5EgNqK6J0ivdTDKcj6JsC4JGSXaU6Nq4Vrh-S8CZEZ_qSounfAnaEggH5qmjosc8HDv4tO9YXMYVYe9HQNUA--_BPbq6VsHQvGy4KpZip0pkaq8fSEV4qAWJz4ebbiIsmDizBFkzNJGiN8nJ7evbXOFRhzKZCyq_cONqOmFytzIoOoglNQabwtkIP-7-mQ4e7hFL7QWJDWGIYTVPnkEPivbAlLihZsz6-ZaflrvZrj7wwuyaTF741tdGP_SNZuWpD3Pf3sBDjQ93qIDdqV3MXoffRjdSBomcsJquPtaiAZ3d60IH6_32YA7wkQaBWcTwJlqAdK2L_AlHAaTbsuDqD3L0-ytUg42o6MSqQW9nUZ3TrMkzuCX9fP53ILbsfq3k0yryARtWyLt8QWc5OX6Dsf3h2SA5hQd4A0xWmVeUm1HC48TlIo_8MkWiTRFgy-IcL0536we34fcUXFnqLt2LiQc1ysACEoFH5-opdglL3miy2vMU97BdjzI1eNHPd098tsPwWn5Jl_sAt5LEzriL0iq4wKGQyhjp0sgSO9JFwX6iPaLGDa2b866aa7Sh_qZaXRnvqqwseIH8sRysOVlLEC5oujzLg0An4zXw%3D%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4dfe684e9914806b4bedce54022f38d&_e=qi_sMywF12zjlmqx_Hf8uEpBPf0FVJpSqrRezmgAh3267QgdYc5EgNqK6J0ivdTDKcj6JsC4JGSXaU6Nq4Vrh-S8CZEZ_qSounfAnaEggH5qmjosc8HDv4tO9YXMYVYe9HQNUA--_BPbq6VsHQvGy4KpZip0pkaq8fSEV4qAWJyQ5Qno9zeOFgo-zNAizry6xkxutXZsak3LbArR63IC_FxMJmGO2TqwJugmOZZ8jcrsqm_g2tDuGMogPDNlFO6ZSNkm4T6rcJlnEw9M7kwtSsNHsDLDDZEwXQu2qHJ54nQjfUMckTRGDv8HFdtFvOjTfOYq5-axtgSL2Hc2MemDO3NMigUVdW6wEE4-iNiEMmOyaRHIZrUscaCB--fl4KTula8WIEoia2gjBiGM4lQEuWg4o-zOhSt7eloLvItofyo0qMAISmPAI3zcdrFMrMHD2WsfCoK5BO4NPj0zr2-xmn0asF5pGG5rfxSoWEwiGCXCXTq6ONfuOSJBMMqWL4WhZas7tQSKruuxxLRFhi0VnK1iQsrY3p83CEJG7x9EUPkOe232KV3r3EZZJrNIQ1YMWK7h4tKnKr65liL9b_dg5B4UwWB0kDerSA4ZuOIhHHCsJQrsNaCQ1Bd7yKPWU_lb)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Rachel Barnett
subject: I get it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hi Peter,
I’m Rachel Barnett, Maxine’s Finance Director.
I know—there’s so much happening in the world and you’re tired of politicians asking for money. I get it, so I’ll make this as quick as possible.
Here’s the deal: campaigns like ours need to keep the lights on because we’re up against the GOP’s machine. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250825_EOM2_act]
Big money doesn’t just influence policy—it drowns out the voices of everyday people because those in power answer to the donors who bought their seats, not us. And the GOP has no problem taking money from megadonors, corporations, and super PACs who will sell out working families without a second thought.
But that’s not Maxine.
Dr. Dexter first ran for office because she saw the injustices in our medical system firsthand. As a physician, she’s watched families go bankrupt and people suffer because care was out of reach. She knew she had to make the system work for everyone, not just the wealthy few.
Maxine ran for office to protect our bodily autonomy, the air we breathe, and the health care that pays for life-saving procedures because she knew she needed to get people to listen and act. And she’s doing it.
Here are three of the 20+ pieces of health legislation she’s co-sponsored:
🩻 Medicare for All Act
🚸 Children’s Health Protection Act of 2025
🏥 Right to Contraception Act
Can we count on your support to help us build a bench of leaders like Maxine Dexter who actually care about people, families, and communities? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250825_EOM2_act]

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, I’m Rachel Barnett, Maxine’s Finance Director. I know—there’s so much happening in the world and you’re tired of politicians asking for money. I get it, so I’ll make this as quick as possible. Here’s the deal: campaigns like ours need to keep the lights on because we’re up against the GOP’s machine. [] Big money doesn’t just influence policy—it drowns out the voices of everyday people because those in power answer to the donors who bought their seats, not us. And the GOP has no problem taking money from megadonors, corporations, and super PACs who will sell out working families without a second thought. But that’s not Maxine. Dr. Dexter first ran for office because she saw the injustices in our medical system firsthand. As a physician, she’s watched families go bankrupt and people suffer because care was out of reach. She knew she had to make the system work for everyone, not just the wealthy few. Maxine ran for office to protect our bodily autonomy, the air we breathe, and the health care that pays for life-saving procedures because she knew she needed to get people to listen and act. And she’s doing it. Here are three of the 20+ pieces of health legislation she’s co-sponsored: 🩻 Medicare for All Act 🚸 Children’s Health Protection Act of 2025 🏥 Right to Contraception Act Can we count on your support to help us build a bench of leaders like Maxine Dexter who actually care about people, families, and communities?
