name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 8/25/2025
body:
🔥 Elk vs. Lee: Why Bloomberg’s estate got saved while ranches burned
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**August 25, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Friends,
Two wildfires broke out in the same week, in the same county. But the responses couldn’t have been more different. **[Our exclusive RMV investigation dives in.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
The **Elk Fire** , burning near Westlands—a 4,600-acre estate purchased by Michael Bloomberg for nearly $45 million—drew immediate, overwhelming resources. “They poured aerial resources... local BLM, local fire, they knocked the snot out of this upper river fire,” one local told us. The blaze was quickly suppressed, saving luxury lodges and guest cabins upriver.
Meanwhile, the **Lee Fire** , just 15 miles away, ran largely unchecked for days toward working ranches like the Clarks’. Families fought with whatever tools they had, cutting fire lines in high winds, hauling water, and watching as decades of work went up in smoke. Only after the fire twice crossed Highway 13 and endangered Meeker did the response intensify. Now, with 137,755 acres scorched, it stands just shy of Colorado’s fourth-largest wildfire on record.
The disparity has locals asking: [why did a billionaire’s estate get air support within hours, while multigenerational ranches were left waiting?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Why were landowners’ years of requests for prescribed burns and vegetation management ignored until it was too late?
This isn’t just another Colorado wildfire story—this is about priorities. When high-dollar properties get protection first, and rural livelihoods are left behind, it reveals a system tilted against the very people who feed and fuel this state.
Yet even in the ashes, the Colorado spirit shines. Neighbors showed up for neighbors, cutting ten-mile fire lines, standing guard through the night, and proving once again that when the system fails, communities rise.
As recovery begins, the question is whether state and federal leaders will finally back the kind of prevention and [equal response Colorado needs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—or if working families will remain second in line to elites.
_**ICYMI:**__**This Weekend on RMV**_ _📌[Douglas County School Board Race](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) – Four candidates—Matt Smith, Keaton Gambill, Dede Kramer, and Steve Vail—have launched a Common Sense DCSD slate focused on academics, parental rights, teacher support, and protections for girls in sports._ _📌[Special Session Tax Hike](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) – In Denver, Democrats pushed through six tax bills during a rushed special session. Republicans argued the process cut off debate and that the bills raise costs on small businesses and families._ _📌[Faith Over Fear](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) – Pastor Drake Hunter shares how Christians can find strength in chaotic times, reminding us that faith isn’t about surviving the storm—it’s about transforming it._
Stay strong, stay bold, and stay in the fight.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Now or Never: Colorado businesses punished for renting to conservatives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _I was recently invited to speak at an event organized by a small grassroots Republican group in Jefferson County. But once word spread that conservatives would be gathering, the brewery became the target of an online mob. A Reddit post titled “[Local Brewery] hosting a MAGA party” blew up with comments calling for boycotts._ __
**[Same week, same county, different response: Inside the Elk and Lee fires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Flames boiled the pond on Mike Clark’s ranch, scorched irrigated fields and melted fiberglass fence posts in minutes. On August 6, the Lee Fire came so fast friends were calling with warnings as his family scrambled to clear trees and pump water toward the house. Just miles away on the Elk Fire side, air tankers and ground crews had been dropping water since early morning.
**[Griswold rallies Indivisible activists with anti-Trump speech while overseeing Colorado elections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN & SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) When Larimer County resident Phoebe McWilliams tuned into an Indivisible Colorado Zoom call on August 6, she expected to hear an update on election policy. Instead, she heard Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold accuse President Donald Trump of “abusing our legal system and undermining the Constitution almost every single day” and rally activists to “stop Trump in the courts, mobilize and beat MAGA."
__
|
---
**STATE**
**[When watchdogs reached out, only two clerks answered: Colorado’s election crisis exposed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BILL LEHMAN & HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado’s election system is facing a crisis of confidence, with voters increasingly skeptical due to incidents like Arapahoe County’s mishandled 2020 Cast Vote Record and the Secretary of State’s office leaking 600 BIOS passwords during the 2024 election. Leaking 600 BIOS passwords is the civic version of leaving the house key under the doormat and then posting a photo of the doormat._
**[Polis Rejects DOJ Label as Sanctuary State and Defends Local Law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Justice Department put 11 other states on its list besides Colorado — California, Connecticut, Delaware, Illinois, Minnesota, Nevada, New York, Oregon, Rhode Island, Vermont, Washington, and the District of Columbia. It also included Baltimore County, Maryland; Cook County, Illinois; San Diego County, California; and San Francisco County, California, along with 18 cities from Seattle to Philadelphia.
**[Dear Colorado Legislature: Here’s Your $1 Billion Cut List](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [SCOTT K. JAMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado lawmakers are about to lock themselves in a special session cage match because they’ve managed to spend themselves $1 billion into the red. Cue the finger-pointing, cue the “hard choices” speeches, cue the “we just need more revenue” crocodile tears. Well, guess what? We did your homework for you. We found your billion._
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[The math doesn’t lie: America’s election system is broken—and the regime desperately wants it that way](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _America is being held hostage – not by a foreign power, not by a virus, not by some spontaneous national confusion. We are being held hostage by a corrupt, coordinated regime that seized the machinery of government, media, and elections in order to protect its own power and suppress anyone who threatens it._
**[Trump Backs Gabbard In Sweeping Move Against Intelligence Community](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) U.S. Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard said on Tuesday that she had revoked security clearances of 37 current and former intelligence professionals whom she accused of “politicizing and manipulating intelligence.” Gabbard said in a social media statement that the action was taken at President Donald Trump’s direction.
**[Biden Administration Placed Over 10,000 Migrant Children With Unvetted Sponsors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Senate Judiciary Chairman Chuck Grassley on Monday released new data from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), which confirmed his concern that the Biden administration placed over 10,000 migrant children with unvetted sponsors.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Denver wasted millions on homeless shelter that never housed anyone](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) After not housing a single homeless person, Denver’s $9 million purchase of a former hotel planned as a new homeless shelter is set to be sold off again — well over two years after its initial purchase, according to Denver’s Department of Housing Stability.
**[Heidi Ganahl Rallies Conservatives at Northeastern Colorado Women’s Event](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Greeley Republican Women (GRW) hosted a packed event at Ben’s Brick Oven Pizza in Hudson, Weld County, where former 2022 candidate for Colorado governor and Rocky Mountain Voice founder Heidi Ganahl delivered the keynote address.
______
**[Four candidates launch common-sense campaign for Douglas County school board](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In Douglas County, a new slate calling itself Common Sense DCSD is stepping into the school board race. The group — Matt Smith, Keaton Gambill, Dede Kramer and Steve Vail — says the district’s future depends on keeping academics and safety at the forefront.
__

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Potholes and Broken Promises: Colorado’s Working Class Deserves Better](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BOBBIE DANIEL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Drive a mile in Colorado and you’ll know the truth: our roads are crumbling, and so is the promise that the government would take care of this basic function. Families scrape by to keep their cars running while the same political elite who’ve run this state for twenty years pour billions into pet projects and leave working people holding the bill._
__
**[From gospel to grievance: How seminaries traded truth for ideology](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL HANCOCK,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There was a time when seminaries existed to train ministers of the gospel — men and women who would handle the Scriptures carefully, shepherd congregations faithfully, and proclaim salvation through Christ alone. But over the past century, many of America’s most prominent seminaries have undergone a quiet yet radical transformation._
__

**[New Era Colorado exploits budget crisis to push higher taxes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _I wanted to share a tweet I saw from Free State Colorado recently. If you don’t have twitter, the subject of the tweet is how progressive policy organization New Era Colorado is pushing for a “graduated” income tax and using current Federal policy + the state’s budget problems as justification._ __
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🚘 DID YOU KNOW?** **Mercedes once built a joystick-controlled car.** In 1996, Mercedes unveiled the futuristic F200 concept car, operated entirely by a joystick instead of a steering wheel or pedals. Even more innovative—the car could detect which seat was occupied, allowing either the driver or passenger to take control.
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "The only difference between a tax man and a taxidermist is that the taxidermist leaves the skin." – Mark Twain

name: THANK YOU, Texas Dems [VPP]
subject: Hurry before Trump can ARREST them!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sign the letter now! >>>
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93184?t=6&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs) [**You’ve been selected as one of our TOP 500 Democratic supporters to sign our thank you card to Texas Democrats! Chip in $3 to add your signature and stand with them against Trump’s MAGA minions! >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93185?t=7&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93185?t=8&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs)
---
**To:** Texas Democrats
**From:** A grateful Democrat
**Subject:** THANK YOU! Dear Texas Democrats,

**THANK YOU for standing strong and fighting back against Trump’s plot to RIG the 2026 elections in his favor!**

Your brave decision to jeopardize the GOP’s redistricting process was an incredible act for our democracy.

**I know Trump and Texas Republicans want to EXPEL and even ARREST you for daring to speak out against their cheating.**

Right now, it’s crucial that ALL of us Democrats stand together, especially now that the new maps have passed. I want you to know I have your back and am on the right side of history!

[**So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you for your resilience, help Democrats FLIP the House, and stop Trump from attacking our democracy EVER AGAIN! >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93185?t=9&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93185?t=10&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs)
---
Sincerely,
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20981%2E878179%2ESg6jRs)

We just got word that you may have switched your voter registration to Democrat.

Please tell us this isn't true. Please. Our America-First movement is counting on you.

If you've abandoned Republicans, then everything we've been fighting for is at risk.

We can't stress this enough: every single patriot matters.

We know how long you've been with us, and how you've fought to Make America Great Again.

Please, if you're still with us, take this America-First Loyalty Poll right now. It's the only way we'll know if you're still standing with us... or if you've dropped out of the MAGA movement for good.

name: Senator Rob Ortt
subject: While Gov. Hochul Is Busy Rigging Elections, NY Taxpayers Bear The Burden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Check out my latest OpEd for The Daily Wire...
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
Friend -
In my latest OpEd for the Daily Wire, I discussed Governor Hochul's refusal to address affordability and quality of life. Instead, her only agenda so far is to rig elections for Democrats and attack President Trump.
We need leaders in Albany who are putting New Yorkers, our safety, and our economy first.
I have attached the full OpEd below, Check it out!

| While Gov. Hochul Is Busy Rigging Elections, NY Taxpayers Bear The Burden
Rob Ortt
New York taxpayers continue to struggle with rising costs and a deteriorating quality of life in their communities.
[The Daily Wire](https://u4b9iicbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-fLfhJ9jfPnpCq90cd9DECaCaHGG48M0ThMjsgZ2t67FgldzAfGdgihMomctqaMAz9Gw6uzA6TqwEoaY1APcIr56xBBBnBOfSe3uFUeMTaikRMI7StaRoWRA0I6lhLUb_sEnR631h8jPGKg67hVArRbJDXCX6QXEmmdFLky9nyqc_9pd4qYwTSKpRZwpPtKwNNHvo8LKjHPX5-yPz_sF87HPHlvc9RPnbBP0TaD1hqeEEV8oDWT4BTrZ5Zim9d_P&c=Aqy_PuGIm5K098jMQOemnPbhvXgG2wPWClXXSc8ETb_WZ1TPKbaUww==&ch=Q0Wt-VvNvwwHZ9htHWkDlAZWyxAOEjpZ4omkXUAWv9Y3Izv_H4zQtw==)
Governor Kathy Hochul's administration recently blew nearly $500 million in potential savings for New York taxpayers by failing to move seniors to a federally funded Medicare plan. That's half a billion dollars -- gone -- because Kathy Hochul couldn't get her act together. That's money that could have gone to tax relief, infrastructure, and keeping your utility bills lower. When it comes to utility bills, National Grid customers in upstate New Yorker should brace themselves for a 15% increase in their bill starting next month. This amounts to about $216 more per customer per year, thanks to Governor Hochul's green energy scam agenda. Likewise, Con Edison has proposed double-digit rate increases that will raise costs for downstate residents, driving up their utility bills as early as January 2026.
And that's just the average cost increases. Many families and small businesses will be paying far more at a time when they are already struggling and can't afford any more increases in their cost of living and doing business.
These increases are not a reflection of market forces or a sudden spike in demand, rather, they are a direct result of action by the governor's Public Service Commission, which Hochul controls. This board approved the increases to fund her ambitious climate mandates. It's typical of Albany: self-righteous politicians pushing you to "do your part" by paying more, even when you're already struggling.
Why are these things happening? For starters, Kathy Hochul is incompetent and instead of addressing these problems and protecting you, she prioritizes politics. Currently, she's focused on her crusade to illegally gerrymander New York's congressional map - a scheme that the courts, and voters, already rejected. When the rules don't work for the Democratic Party, Hochul tries to change them.
Hochul and her cronies describe mid-decade redistricting as "undemocratic," yet in the same breath she and her fellow New York Democrats have declared they will engage in mid-decade redistricting. In other words - their words - they're going to take undemocratic actions in order to "save democracy" in America. The hypocrisy and absurdity of this is unparalleled, and New York voters can see right through it. The voters and the courts in this state have already made it clear the people must have the ability to choose their representatives, rather than politicians manufacturing uncompetitive districts and forcing their preferred candidates down everybody's throats.
New York voters overwhelmingly supported a nonpartisan redistricting process. However, Democrats ignored them, blatantly gerrymandered districts, and when they were thrown out by the courts, they corrupted the Court of Appeals to get their way. Now, they are looking to stomp on the Constitution again for another shot at rigging the system to protect their power. Meanwhile, New York taxpayers continue to struggle with rising costs and a deteriorating quality of life in their communities.
This is not leadership. It's political wheeling and dealing at its worst, and taxpayers are footing the bill.
Albany's ruling class has made their priorities clear: your paycheck, your bills, and your future come second to their grip on power.
Until we get a governor who will put people over politics, rein in spending, protect ratepayers, and actually focus on making New York affordable again, New Yorkers will keep paying for Kathy Hochul's failures.
______
Rob Ortt is the Republican Leader of the New York State Senate. He represents the 62nd Senate District.

clean_body: Which of these t-shirts would you most like to buy? Peter, Abigail is asking for your input! Our team whipped up a few t-shirt designs, and we want supporters to decide which one we begin selling on our official store. Remember, all store sales help to fund Abigail's campaign, including the ads we air on TV, the yard signs we give out to voters, and the events we host all across the Commonwealth. We hope you'll weigh in, Team Spanberger P.S. Have your own ideas for campaign-branded gear? Get in touch with us on social media @TeamSpanberger. Or check out our full collection of merch at . By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113969921/565517646/802905668?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_240825_FR_EO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTgxNjQ4YmUtZDA4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JfKYdOiliqe36wCRBL_jKRBovgnMf_1421MzONtXihc=)_
Donald Trump announced an Executive Order last week that would take aim at mail-in voting. Rep. Mary Miller had this to say:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113969927/565517650/802905668?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_240825_FR_EO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTgxNjQ4YmUtZDA4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JfKYdOiliqe36wCRBL_jKRBovgnMf_1421MzONtXihc=)
What Mary Miller fails to understand is that, obviously, land doesn’t vote. And even though those sections of the map are red, it isn’t necessarily full of people who live there.

Now add in her full support for Trump’s call to eliminate voting by mail. She continues to show us that she doesn’t belong in Congress and we’re going to work to make sure that doesn’t happen. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL The Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association P.O. Box 3445 Springfield, IL 62708 United States

subject: 🚨 RFK Jr. is putting lives at risk — he must go
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Save Lives -- Impeach RFK Jr.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0739547-e224-4cbe-b48f-220afb63a495/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65876083-8f92-4203-9e88-8733c47cead1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Health care works best when it's guided by science and facts — not conspiracy theories and junk pulled out of thin air.** Unfortunately, the man now in charge of America's health care is **[RFK Jr](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea925f60-fafb-4cea-bc66-6e15ae20a9cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** — someone who seems to base his "medical expertise" on articles from the medical journal _Stuff I Pulled from My Butt._ And his reckless nonsense isn't just embarrassing. **It's dangerous. It is costing lives.**
* He spread wild COVID lies — even claiming vaccines were created to track people with microchips.
* He shut down critical vaccine research — jeopardizing our ability to stop the next outbreak or find cures for deadly diseases.
* During a 2025 measles outbreak, he pushed quack "treatments" like cod liver oil while downplaying the real danger. And cases have once agains spiked.

This isn't leadership. It's malpractice. He's unqualified, he's dangerous, and every day he remains in power puts lives at risk. [**He needs to go NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1818cc2-3d21-46fe-b34d-f479e3e1a97b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [➡️ Add your name: Tell Congress to impeach and remove RFK Jr. before his reckless lies cost more American lives.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2867a96f-3df2-46c9-9f67-b31a34dbe7d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Let’s try this again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Every day you wait is another day they pull ahead. And if we lose, history won’t care about excuses — only results.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-iJs4x7lY7qdjIYcNQ)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, On August 12th, I sent you an email asking for your help to fuel our fight against the far left, which continues to raise mountains of cash.

**My ask --$9. I asked you and 111,000 other conservatives for help, and in the end, we came up short.**
I'm not going to sugarcoat it: **we are losing this fight -- and it's not because the Left is stronger, it's because too many conservatives are still sitting on the sidelines.** _I worry that because we finally have the White House, the US Senate and the House all at the same time and are getting things accomplished, grassroots Republicans are content with our recent wins. We shouldn 't be as there is so much more we have to do to fix America._
Democrats pulled in 7.5 million more donations than Republicans in the first half of 2025. That's not a small gap -- that's a warning siren.
If you haven't given this year, I have to ask you: **what will you say to yourself if we lose the Senate because you didn 't act when you could have?**
You'll know the truth -- that while the Left poured in cash to buy their wins, too many of us watched from the sidelines.
If you've ever said you stand for liberty, the Constitution, and America's future -- this is the moment to prove it. Not later. Not "when things get worse." By then, it will be too late.
**Because we failed to reach our fundraising goal on August 12th, our average gift this month has now fallen to just $7.**
_**I 'm asking you to at least match that right now.**_
[**< <chip in $7 before midnight>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-dqPjVN-GZg)
If we can't match their enthusiasm soon, we are choosing to let them have it all.
Every day you wait is another day they pull ahead. And if we lose, history won't care about excuses -- only results.
I'm asking you directly: **don 't be one of the conservatives who stayed quiet and then wondered how it all slipped away.**
For liberty,
Ted Cruz
**P.S.** Trump won more than 77 million votes last fall. If even 10% of those voters gave today, we'd erase the Democrats' advantage instantly. Please -- be one of them. [**[Chip in now]**](http://trk.tedcruz.)

House Democrats are demanding answers and pushing legislation to protect the USPS from partisan sabotage. But we need a surge of grassroots support to show the American people are watching and ready to fight! — Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.

Hi Peter, It’s the most wonderful time of year — back to school! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113972848/565525953/1675519574?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_082525_BacktoSchool_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlmZjFiOS1kNTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-53_Ve2iy9vTujC8yXSHSY9q6yuXUU8n2ew4-YK2DFc=) Understandably so, most parents are breathing a sigh of relief as their children prepare to return to the classroom. But these days in August always transport me back to the era of my life when my sons were in school. When my boys were young, my husband and I were both working full-time. As soon as I got off the night shift from the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7am, I would go straight to my sons’ classrooms to volunteer. Not only did this serve as an opportunity for me to spend more precious time with my children, **but it opened my eyes to the social disparities affecting students firsthand, especially Black and brown kids, in the classroom.** This launched my career in public service, Peter. When I could do nothing more as a volunteer, I ran for School Board. And as the story goes, I ended up here, in Congress. **[Now, I’m working in Congress to ensure every child has a voice advocating for their education, and building the future they deserve. Can you help defend my seat by pitching in $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113972849/565525954/1675519574?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_082525_BacktoSchool_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlmZjFiOS1kNTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-53_Ve2iy9vTujC8yXSHSY9q6yuXUU8n2ew4-YK2DFc=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Back to school should be an exciting time where our children are eager to make new friends, expand their horizons, and learn without boundaries.
This time of year should not be clouded with anxiety about budget cuts, inadequate supplies, or if our children are in danger while at school. **Our children deserve to return to school this year feeling safe, prepared, and excited to learn.**
The opportunity to learn is not only a blessing but a fundamental right — and every single child deserves equal access to a quality education. **[That’s why I’m in Congress fighting for public education day in and day out. Defending my seat means defending our children’s future, Peter. Can I count on you to make a donation of any amount to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113972856/565525961/1675519574?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_082525_BacktoSchool_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlmZjFiOS1kNTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-53_Ve2iy9vTujC8yXSHSY9q6yuXUU8n2ew4-YK2DFc=)**

clean_body: It’s back-to-school time in North Carolina! If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, It’s the most wonderful time of year — back to school! = Understandably so, most parents are breathing a sigh of relief as their children prepare to return to the classroom. But these days in August always transport me back to the era of my life when my sons were in school. When my boys were young, my husband and I were both working full-time. As soon as I got off the night shift from the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7am, I would go straight to my sons’ classrooms to volunteer. Not only did this serve as an opportunity for me to spend more precious time with my children, but it opened my eyes to the social disparities affecting students firsthand, especially Black and brown kids, in the classroom. This launched my career in public service, Peter. When I could do nothing more as a volunteer, I ran for School Board. And as the story goes, I ended up here, in Congress. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Back to school should be an exciting time where our children are eager to make new friends, expand their horizons, and learn without boundaries. This time of year should not be clouded with anxiety about budget cuts, inadequate supplies, or if our children are in danger while at school. Our children deserve to return to school this year feeling safe, prepared, and excited to learn. The opportunity to learn is not only a blessing but a fundamental right — and every single child deserves equal access to a quality education. = | = Thank you, Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here 's everything you need to be following today:**
* Cracker Barrel's terrible week just got even worse
* Trump's Intel investment is just the beginning
* Ethereum hits new All Time High before a retreat
* Cadillac's bold new direction unveiled with new "Elevated Velocity" concept

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 45417.19 - ( ⬇️0.47%) 🔴**
* **S &P: 6464.65 - (⬇️0.03%) 🔴**

# "Brand Suicide" \- Cracker Barrel board member's DEI past and "woke" advertising exposed
Cracker Barrel's **[board member Gilbert Davila](https://substack.com/redirect/08698e22-f255-45ab-8d4f-3f2c95a75af0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** faces backlash from conservatives over his DEI background as the chain's new logo, stripping traditional imagery, sparks outrage for abandoning middle-America values in a bold rebrand.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2dbc8ee6-6e42-415a-bc26-cf84ccc8cd09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cracker Barrel board member Gilbert Davila faces criticism for DEI background** \- Conservative activist Robby Starbuck targeted Davila, who joined the board in 2020 and has run a DEI consulting firm for 15 years, claiming he's behind the company's shift toward "far-Left values" and away from its middle-America customer base.
* **Company undergoes controversial rebranding amid consumer backlash** \- Cracker Barrel unveiled a new logo replacing the iconic image of a man leaning on a barrel with just black text over a yellow barrel backdrop, while also modernizing restaurant interiors by ditching the traditional American aesthetic for a sleek contemporary design.
* **Davila's corporate diversity experience spans major companies** \- Before founding DMI Consulting in 2010, Davila served as vice president of global diversity at Disney (2003-2010), held multicultural management roles at Sears, and worked as a marketing director for Coca-Cola, making him "widely recognized for his multicultural market knowledge."

### Watch Robby Starbuck's deep dive into Cracker Barrel's woke underbelly here:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/eb5508ac-5611-42cc-9345-2da162afc2d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **[Trump's Reset Can Give Birth To America's Greatest Era Yet](https://substack.com/redirect/99a80965-3b0f-4daf-8c50-1411086c8323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/99a80965-3b0f-4daf-8c50-1411086c8323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

**Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset.**
However, only those who download a copy of our **2025 Wealth Protection Guide** will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset.

# Intel investment hints at new Trump strategy to build a U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund
The U.S. government's bold move **[to take a 10% stake](https://substack.com/redirect/d9306b5a-0d01-44a5-9193-9714f6156b23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Intel signals a new era of federal investment in private firms, aiming to boost domestic manufacturing and economic security, White House advisor Kevin Hassett announced Monday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b8a79f5d-9baa-47c4-aabe-6504fde8ce59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Sovereign Wealth Fund** : The Intel deal is part of a broader strategy to create a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, potentially including more companies across various industries, Hassett said. These funds are state-owned investment funds that manage a nation's surplus reserves to generate economic benefits for its citizens.
* **CHIPS Act Funding** : The $8.9 billion Intel stake includes CHIPS Act grants and separate allocations for secure chip production, emphasizing strategic technological advancement.
* **Non-Interference Policy** : Hassett stressed the government will not manage company operations, citing past stakes in Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac as precedents.
* **Tariff-Driven Strategy** : The move aligns with tariffs to encourage onshoring production, aiming to strengthen U.S. economic resilience, Hassett noted.

* * *
* * *
# Ethereum soars to new heights on rate cut hints before retreating
Ether **[soared to a new record](https://substack.com/redirect/8302a824-d5bc-4683-b346-9061f7e60507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** above $4,885 on August 24, 2025, after Fed Chair Powell's rate cut hints in in Jackson Hole, Wyoming, only to erase gains as bitcoin faltered.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8302a824-d5bc-4683-b346-9061f7e60507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Regulatory Tailwinds Boost Ether:** Ether's recent surge is driven by favorable regulations and a boom in stablecoin interest, with Ethereum powering over half of blockchain fees.
* **Corporate Buying Supports ETH:** New corporate accumulators like Bitmine and SharpLink bolstered ether, sustaining its $4,000 level after multiple failed attempts since 2021.
* **Liquidations Hit Crypto Market:** Over $245 million in ether and $175 million in bitcoin long positions were liquidated in 24 hours, reflecting volatile market reactions.
* **Bitcoin Loses August Gains:** Despite earlier highs, bitcoin's August performance is flat, contrasting with ether's 15% monthly gain as market dynamics shift.

* * *
* * *
# New survey: People can't wait to get their hand on new retirement options
Retirement savers are **[clamoring for private assets,](https://substack.com/redirect/43694458-5249-49b4-98ce-f85e301cd2c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a new survey revealing strong demand for alternative investments like private equity and real estate to diversify portfolios and boost returns.
* **Private Assets Gain Traction:** Over 60% of retirement savers show interest in private equity, real estate, and infrastructure, seeking higher returns despite higher risks and fees.
* **Diversification Drives Interest:** Savers aim to reduce reliance on volatile stocks and bonds, with 45% citing diversification as a key reason for exploring private assets.
* **Regulatory Changes Enable Access:** Recent executive orders, including one by President Trump, ease restrictions, **[allowing 401(k) plans to include private assets and cryptocurrencies.](https://substack.com/redirect/9c191062-4ef9-4c87-bcc0-4d510df32518?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Risks Temper Enthusiasm:** Illiquidity and high costs concern 30% of savers, prompting calls for better education and fiduciary oversight to protect retirement funds.

## [The Crypto Door Opens for 401(k)s](https://substack.com/redirect/9c191062-4ef9-4c87-bcc0-4d510df32518?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Cadillac shoots for the stars as it drops a new gull wing EV SUV concept
Cadillac **[unveiled its futuristic Elevated Velocity](https://substack.com/redirect/26e3277c-7b7f-4eea-a05f-45cb2be21dea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** electric crossover concept at Monterey Car Week, blending high-performance V-Series thrills with off-road prowess, hinting at the brand's bold vision for luxury SUVs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26e3277c-7b7f-4eea-a05f-45cb2be21dea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Innovative Driving Modes** : The concept features e-Velocity for on-road precision, Terra for off-road capability, and Sand Vision for enhanced visibility in sandstorms.
* **Luxurious Interior Design** : Morello Red leather and Cerise fabric create a wellness-focused cabin with infrared lighting and breathing-guided modes.
* **Advanced Technology Integration** : Elements Defy system shakes off dust, while gull-wing doors and a retractable steering wheel enhance user experience.
* **Future Design Influence** : The concept's sleek Vapor Blue exterior and 24-inch flax-fiber wheels may shape upcoming Cadillac production models.

* * *
* * *
# Dr Pepper to buy coffee giant in $18 Billion dollar acquisition
Keurig Dr Pepper **[will acquire Dutch coffee giant](https://substack.com/redirect/0b0cd038-b4c6-4f05-a92c-88b43a2cd30d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** JDE Peet's for $18 billion, aiming to dominate the global coffee market, then split into two U.S.-listed firms, the companies announced Monday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b0cd038-b4c6-4f05-a92c-88b43a2cd30d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Global Coffee Leader Formed** : The acquisition combines Keurig's single-serve expertise with JDE Peet's brands like L'OR and Jacobs, creating a coffee powerhouse across 100+ countries.
* **Strategic Business Split** : Post-acquisition, Keurig Dr Pepper plans to separate its beverage and coffee units into two independent companies, reversing its 2018 merger.
* **Significant Shareholder Value** : The deal offers JDE Peet's shareholders €31.85 per share, a 33% premium, with expected $400 million in cost synergies over three years.
* **Leadership Transition Planned** : Tim Cofer will lead Beverage Co., while Sudhanshu Priyadarshi heads Global Coffee Co., with the split expected by mid-2026.

clean_body: CEO's "woke" past and DEI backstory erupts as it gets worse for the struggling brand | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? CEO's "woke" past and DEI backstory erupts as it gets worse for the struggling brand | | | Aug 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here 's everything you need to be following today: Cracker Barrel's terrible week just got even worse Trump's Intel investment is just the beginning Ethereum hits new All Time High before a retreat Cadillac's bold new direction unveiled with new "Elevated Velocity" concept Today 's markets: DOW: 45417.19 - ( ⬇️0.47%) 🔴 S &P: 6464.65 - (⬇️0.03%) 🔴 NASDAQ: 21555.17 - ( ⬆️0.27%) ✅ CBOE VIX Volatility Index: $14.30 ( ⬆️0.56%) ⚠️⬆️ "Brand Suicide" \- Cracker Barrel board member's DEI past and "woke" advertising exposed Cracker Barrel's faces backlash from conservatives over his DEI background as the chain's new logo, stripping traditional imagery, sparks outrage for abandoning middle-America values in a bold rebrand. | | ---|---|--- Cracker Barrel board member Gilbert Davila faces criticism for DEI background \- Conservative activist Robby Starbuck targeted Davila, who joined the board in 2020 and has run a DEI consulting firm for 15 years, claiming he's behind the company's shift toward "far-Left values" and away from its middle-America customer base. Company undergoes controversial rebranding amid consumer backlash \- Cracker Barrel unveiled a new logo replacing the iconic image of a man leaning on a barrel with just black text over a yellow barrel backdrop, while also modernizing restaurant interiors by ditching the traditional American aesthetic for a sleek contemporary design. Davila's corporate diversity experience spans major companies \- Before founding DMI Consulting in 2010, Davila served as vice president of global diversity at Disney (2003-2010), held multicultural management roles at Sears, and worked as a marketing director for Coca-Cola, making him "widely recognized for his multicultural market knowledge." Watch Robby Starbuck's deep dive into Cracker Barrel's woke underbelly here: | | ---|---|--- In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate. Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen. Now, 92 years later, His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price. That's a 72x increase! If activated, it could Reinforce America 's financial dominance Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset. However, only those who download a copy of our 2025 Wealth Protection Guide will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset. and discover how to position yourself for this golden opportunity. Intel investment hints at new Trump strategy to build a U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund The U.S. government's bold move in Intel signals a new era of federal investment in private firms, aiming to boost domestic manufacturing and economic security, White House advisor Kevin Hassett announced Monday. Sovereign Wealth Fund : The Intel deal is part of a broader strategy to create a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, potentially including more companies across various industries, Hassett said. These funds are state-owned investment funds that manage a nation's surplus reserves to generate economic benefits for its citizens. CHIPS Act Funding : The $8.9 billion Intel stake includes CHIPS Act grants and separate allocations for secure chip production, emphasizing strategic technological advancement. Non-Interference Policy : Hassett stressed the government will not manage company operations, citing past stakes in Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac as precedents. Tariff-Driven Strategy : The move aligns with tariffs to encourage onshoring production, aiming to strengthen U.S. economic resilience, Hassett noted. Ethereum soars to new heights on rate cut hints before retreating Ether above $4,885 on August 24, 2025, after Fed Chair Powell's rate cut hints in in Jackson Hole, Wyoming, only to erase gains as bitcoin faltered. | | ---|---|--- Regulatory Tailwinds Boost Ether: Ether's recent surge is driven by favorable regulations and a boom in stablecoin interest, with Ethereum powering over half of blockchain fees. Corporate Buying Supports ETH: New corporate accumulators like Bitmine and SharpLink bolstered ether, sustaining its $4,000 level after multiple failed attempts since 2021. Liquidations Hit Crypto Market: Over $245 million in ether and $175 million in bitcoin long positions were liquidated in 24 hours, reflecting volatile market reactions. Bitcoin Loses August Gains: Despite earlier highs, bitcoin's August performance is flat, contrasting with ether's 15% monthly gain as market dynamics shift. New survey: People can't wait to get their hand on new retirement options Retirement savers are with a new survey revealing strong demand for alternative investments like private equity and real estate to diversify portfolios and boost returns. Private Assets Gain Traction: Over 60% of retirement savers show interest in private equity, real estate, and infrastructure, seeking higher returns despite higher risks and fees. Diversification Drives Interest: Savers aim to reduce reliance on volatile stocks and bonds, with 45% citing diversification as a key reason for exploring private assets. Regulatory Changes Enable Access: Recent executive orders, including one by President Trump, ease restrictions, Risks Temper Enthusiasm: Illiquidity and high costs concern 30% of savers, prompting calls for better education and fiduciary oversight to protect retirement funds. | | | | ---|---|--- | Aug 21 | Cadillac shoots for the stars as it drops a new gull wing EV SUV concept Cadillac electric crossover concept at Monterey Car Week, blending high-performance V-Series thrills with off-road prowess, hinting at the brand's bold vision for luxury SUVs. | | ---|---|--- Innovative Driving Modes : The concept features e-Velocity for on-road precision, Terra for off-road capability, and Sand Vision for enhanced visibility in sandstorms. Luxurious Interior Design : Morello Red leather and Cerise fabric create a wellness-focused cabin with infrared lighting and breathing-guided modes. Advanced Technology Integration : Elements Defy system shakes off dust, while gull-wing doors and a retractable steering wheel enhance user experience. Future Design Influence : The concept's sleek Vapor Blue exterior and 24-inch flax-fiber wheels may shape upcoming Cadillac production models. Dr Pepper to buy coffee giant in $18 Billion dollar acquisition Keurig Dr Pepper JDE Peet's for $18 billion, aiming to dominate the global coffee market, then split into two U.S.-listed firms, the companies announced Monday. | | ---|---|--- Global Coffee Leader Formed : The acquisition combines Keurig's single-serve expertise with JDE Peet's brands like L'OR and Jacobs, creating a coffee powerhouse across 100+ countries. Strategic Business Split : Post-acquisition, Keurig Dr Pepper plans to separate its beverage and coffee units into two independent companies, reversing its 2018 merger. Significant Shareholder Value : The deal offers JDE Peet's shareholders €31.85 per share, a 33% premium, with expected $400 million in cost synergies over three years. Leadership Transition Planned : Tim Cofer will lead Beverage Co., while Sudhanshu Priyadarshi heads Global Coffee Co., with the split expected by mid-2026. body:
Will you add your name in support of November’s ballot measure?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113973995/565528995/-1713963887?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250822_PT_Redistricting_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU4NzkyMy1kODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbti7WHLQgaBrMLtofnhjBqOsnKfDVAfVNMDqCAyH8Q=&emci=3d6d308f-cf81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bd587923-d881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32394541) Hi Peter,

It’s official: California Democrats voted to place a measure on the November ballot that counteracts GOP efforts in Texas to add five more Republican congressional seats.

This is going to be a hard-fought race, but I believe we can win if we make our case to voters. [**If you support the _Election Rigging Response Act_ , I’m asking you to sign my petition today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113973998/565528998/-1713963887?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250822_PT_Redistricting_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU4NzkyMy1kODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbti7WHLQgaBrMLtofnhjBqOsnKfDVAfVNMDqCAyH8Q=&emci=3d6d308f-cf81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bd587923-d881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32394541) **[SIGN ON IN SUPPORT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113974002/565529002/1628059965?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250822_PT_Redistricting_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU4NzkyMy1kODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbti7WHLQgaBrMLtofnhjBqOsnKfDVAfVNMDqCAyH8Q=&emci=3d6d308f-cf81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bd587923-d881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32394541)**
The stakes are incredibly high. In states like Texas and Florida, Republican leaders are following Donald Trump’s orders to redraw maps and lock in their advantage—not by winning over voters, but by rigging the system.

If California doesn’t respond, Trump and his allies could get away with it despite tanking poll numbers and growing public opposition to their agenda.

That’s why I’m proud to support this constitutional amendment. But I can’t do it alone. [**I need to know that you stand with me in support of this initiative.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113974005/565529004/-1713963887?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250822_PT_Redistricting_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU4NzkyMy1kODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbti7WHLQgaBrMLtofnhjBqOsnKfDVAfVNMDqCAyH8Q=&emci=3d6d308f-cf81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bd587923-d881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32394541)

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ami Bera

body:
We tried to call out an underreported story on Palantir, and now we have been banned from TikTok. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1VYCK-_X7NxAqI6AwJuHOxvL-Pf9JTKiMFcUkQ09DDwcAvVVfyvhmngNHck1ZfVvZ6PlQGPJxch4WnX_jasRo6d53F2PdhBQ0Yfj668IBpWFAJyJxaHuT_H5knpLrJk_ZEndAKdvtrhSID35AFtHBekL3kOgdOKYqGGVfIIc6wVkal3hnJOCy0z2IlQzDM83l10WSHH9QRE6WgnBohBc9DnZNBZxQ19yS-pjTScL-CyN-KLbVaItHSUe38QNT7_hsK4JLBOzZuI9NG9CB7WepJU/4jc/K38IphzmRdukh6NBzZtWjw/h0/h001.sTs3Yaxp2Te_nQNxkqn3u6P04XWZnyWNJxRHJLHAFa0)
---
Friends, We just got banned from TikTok, _**all because we exposed the truth about Palantir.**_ Our social media team works around the clock to cover the biggest headlines, but also to shine light on the stories the mainstream media too often ignores. Our latest video asked a simple question: **Who is Palantir?**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1VYCK-_X7NxAqI6AwJuHOxvmbrFdxgc92B07P7T-hzehmQyk1BH74sLSfghEPq0wYUoytysn_TpHtQyDJitXjs6PJ9Db5a6CWiIwFh5BXNak9lqeEwQJTEcGqHNmAmv9aIScQQyGpWnlTqADR8FhijWzmAfyoPxq7-sSKVEkGrKwtx_yTW9yTZbfww-tMr0UitunvGsGYOq-GxlXdVjFSu1wS3FaDr2jxuYuEIro7ra6MHKM_0XHuyCQEDH50mrdObIzRQ04WOP52RpgUUO3mKs/4jc/K38IphzmRdukh6NBzZtWjw/h1/h001.Blblu0FFcD1jc0IYxtnzfA1E-o5sr4GCPJHmCOZvPSI)
---
Here's what we laid out: Palantir is a secretive military tech company compiling a massive database on Americans, everything from bank records to personal files. It's led by CEO Alex Karp, a self-described "neo-Marxist," which is laughable considering **his company was created and largely backed by the CIA.** And behind him is co-founder Peter Thiel, a billionaire power broker with deep ties to MAGA politics. Unlike Elon Musk, Thiel avoids the spotlight, but his influence runs deeper. He's an obvious white-nationalist sympathizer from a South African town that once celebrated Hitler's birthday, **and he 's been quietly bankrolling Trump's far-right movement for years.** That's the controversy **Palantir doesn 't want exposed.** They are grabbing unprecedented power and data on Americans, and they're using their connections in government and the media to silence anyone who calls it out. Our ban from TikTok proves it. This is about more than one video or one banned account. _**It 's about the threat to our First Amendment rights, our privacy, and our democracy.**_ That's why we're not backing down. We may not be able to post on TikTok for a while, but we will continue to cover these stories and deliver the truth on our other platforms, no matter who tries to silence us. [**If you believe in that mission, we need you with us. Chip in today to help us fight back and keep shining a light where others won 't.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1VYCK-_X7NxAqI6AwJuHOxtg8GQ382p625mDFE4RoWGVJrlb7Y3lICdlojjoIrLh6FVAYZYu9BHC2Ge2TVxZ6ttDPTKKEK8DWoBLkM4v76FX90Sg-1y_mi9s67FXfYvCKuhcclpVfv2GO5SOulNTZXOk75wTN4IBEB-txs2tFhYcFMyphe4fFB5eYp_4cX7I_m-V_7AUysciV6CI6TEDLUm3klq0Z2IOEkkwIZsUbYMbWMFdEtB-LvyVbMxK-JsftuPgPHDs9VntYEjMzCfQTZo/4jc/K38IphzmRdukh6NBzZtWjw/h2/h001.cDWOho960vjdhwe1LbEXHR9lg-TCHb-UTnu9S8M1HVU)

clean_body: We tried to call out an underreported story on Palantir, and now we have been banned from TikTok. | | Friends, We just got banned from TikTok, all because we exposed the truth about Palantir. Our social media team works around the clock to cover the biggest headlines, but also to shine light on the stories the mainstream media too often ignores. Our latest video asked a simple question: Who is Palantir? | Here's what we laid out: Palantir is a secretive military tech company compiling a massive database on Americans, everything from bank records to personal files. It's led by CEO Alex Karp, a self-described "neo-Marxist," which is laughable considering his company was created and largely backed by the CIA. And behind him is co-founder Peter Thiel, a billionaire power broker with deep ties to MAGA politics. Unlike Elon Musk, Thiel avoids the spotlight, but his influence runs deeper. He's an obvious white-nationalist sympathizer from a South African town that once celebrated Hitler's birthday, and he 's been quietly bankrolling Trump's far-right movement for years. That's the controversy Palantir doesn 't want exposed. They are grabbing unprecedented power and data on Americans, and they're using their connections in government and the media to silence anyone who calls it out. Our ban from TikTok proves it. This is about more than one video or one banned account. It 's about the threat to our First Amendment rights, our privacy, and our democracy. That's why we're not backing down. We may not be able to post on TikTok for a while, but we will continue to cover these stories and deliver the truth on our other platforms, no matter who tries to silence us. Thank you for standing with us, No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump turns the military on America
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=082425_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=082425_1]
Trump has taken the authoritarian step of using the United States military as his own personal police force. Troops are being sent into 19 states without the consent of their governors - a direct assault on democracy and civilian authority.
If we stay quiet, this will become the new normal. Trump will use the military to police communities, silence dissent, and cement his grip on power. Rush $15 now so we can help stop this authoritarian takeover before it's too late >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=082425_1]
BREAKING: Donald Trump mobilizes National Guard troops to 19 states in federal crime crackdown
This is his most serious authoritarian escalation yet, and all American citizens who beleive in freedom must take immediate action.
Rush $15 right away so we can help Democrats on the ground fight Trump's fascist power grab >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=082425_1]
Trump is claiming this is about “crime” and “immigration.” But we know the truth:
!!️He’s bypassing governors to deploy troops without their consent.
!!️He’s militarizing immigration enforcement and targeting vulnerable communities.
!!️He’s testing whether he can get away with using the military as his personal police force.
This is how fascism takes root. If we don’t rise up and resist immediately, Trump will escalate further — sending troops to suppress protests, intimidate opponents, and control communities that dare to push back.
We cannot allow silence to be mistaken for acceptance. That’s why we’re asking you, right now, to be one of the first to stand up. Chip in ANY amount you can spare to help us as we work to defend Democracy from Trump's authoritarian attempts >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=082425_1]

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. subject: Are we talking about the same Vladimir Putin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
We know Trump admires dictators like Putin. But why is every member of the Republican Party completely silent while a dangerous foreign power dictates the President’s actions?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113974530/565530558/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.25_PutinMailIn_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmJkMWY3YS1kOTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mo2zMVDOeeW1yAoczUP0mLLjj0a5CExO8DpPV3xoSU=&emci=4e48b947-c481-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d6bd1f7a-d981-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) | We never thought we’d read this headline from the _L.A. Times_ : **“On Putin’s advice, Trump launches assault on mail-in ballots and voting machines”** There’s a lot to unpack there. Let’s review: 1️⃣ During Trump and Putin’s meeting in Alaska to discuss Ukraine, _the sovereign country Russia invaded_ , somehow the topic of the 2020 election came up. 2️⃣ Putin – _vicious, anti-democracy dictator Vladimir Putin_ – told Trump that he only lost in 2020 because of “rigged” mail ballots. 3️⃣ Immediately after, Trump hopped on Truth Social to announce he will “lead a movement” to “get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS.” We know Trump admires dictators like Putin. _**But why is every member of the Republican Party completely silent while a dangerous foreign power dictates the President’s actions?**_ It’s the job of Congress to be a check and balance on the President. We’ve never needed that check and balance more. If House Republicans refuse to do their jobs, we’ll replace them with leaders who will. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Donald Trump believes he’s above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, On the campaign trail, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies promised to release the Epstein files and bring justice to Jeffrey Epstein’s survivors. _**They lied.**_ Back in May, I first raised the concern that Donald Trump had directed the DOJ to conceal the Epstein Files because he was in them. Then Elon Musk and undisputed reporting confirmed that. In late July, my Democratic colleagues and I pushed for a House vote to force the Trump administration to release the Epstein files. Instead of allowing the vote to take place, Speaker Mike Johnson sent the House home early for summer recess — all to avoid a vote that would require the full release of the Epstein Files, including any possible mentions, videos or other recordings of President Trump. **Now, Trump is manufacturing crisis after crisis to distract from his likely involvement — including deploying the National Guard in our nation’s capital.** I warned about this level of corruption years ago when I served as lead counsel in Trump’s first impeachment. His presidency was never about public service. It was about power, profit, revenge and retribution. Donald Trump truly believes that he is above the law. He uses the presidency to enrich himself, punish federal employees who speak the truth, and attack independent reporting. **And Republicans in Congress have made it clear that they won’t hold him accountable.** **But we will.** **[Donald Trump is not a king, and the Department of Justice is not his personal legal defense team. Add your name today to demand accountability from this administration:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113974523/565530444/-1862407553?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAxNjU2OS1kOTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NttT8l-K7hHF7-pJz7Vh0C_YSIBsYgrKVhPqeiiki1A=&emci=58860c45-c681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4b016569-d981-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113974524/565530445/-1862407553?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAxNjU2OS1kOTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NttT8l-K7hHF7-pJz7Vh0C_YSIBsYgrKVhPqeiiki1A=&emci=58860c45-c681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4b016569-d981-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13556823)

Sadly, this is nothing new to me. I've borne _venomous_ insults and been called so many _horrible_ names throughout the years.
The "tolerant" Left will turn racist and ugly the instant a black woman decides to reject the Democrat party and embrace common sense. Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.
I'm the sitting Lieutenant Governor, second in command in the former Capitol of the Confederate States. I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. There is no place for this disgusting hatred in our nation. I won't let their insults define me, and I certainly won't let them slow me down!
I didn't become the first black, female Lt. Governor of Virginia by playing the victim. I did it by embracing my conservative values and trusting in God!
Leftists can spew whatever racist nonsense they like, but I will win the race for Governor of Virginia with you on my side.
Here's my call to action: [Can you chip in to help us spread our positive conservative message?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3486b5d3635422ea892741e9b39bd03&_e=_D-8ibCK8VuVcyrdODfJvTdtZhyjS3VxjuyyorFqh3nausU3lrapHqNcVxK3DXhqQjf5f_IgsV_mvTI9y4g6sJSReFqBKbZNP5FIt_5vU1Baul5g0k49hIpV9HFOm9l2Bar4TdhBWFy33uS_tYkdxumNgk5SYvlPvJjdxeWK1zCTUnSrlTU7dIbTWTm0ntNEFDxfxMt0HSMj4V087olHw_pi6iIy7FF3whqH2AUKn4sFSyfaoLWJWESb9M-aCbbaX8xnCxxXp-IwJ6TAc4-f3ZhvbzY1UtZOGDvC5jPrNOrmF6LCdohA_ZOAXz6BcEnavgb9QzRkcr94XCeUZABGiudtXaf_usseIYqjykTMD04oBbMPRQKrM_0dLi-KpEI8KM0fHIDMtMQlLPhzQKdyqd8TQVRgp7_nMhzz4ApdEb1ez99LaOVjlfRWKYAdTp8K6s3Uh_M3Ibd4jjeIrPKdRWZws41CAyssxdufdsTJCBSvvfhKu1eKOeadkve_NAlZQjWM-zTOPd5NV74iAR-c7g_zBJmFkRpz-woTuOhVrUO059ExCYkUmzqnKeFNXvp97aiVwhvmhLYASqCqnJAtwChklGux34AvnAIIpLGxtmS9jEkfdrk0tW3UCmdvvJ3tjc_J7Z5sMJw3TcDF2PptoaMPVwUXOpwk-u5lVjqSfrKiojnZqPcW9Y0gcCziCe0L)[DONATE $18 OR MORE NOW >>

name: Greg Casar
subject: I want you to hear it from me first: I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250825-gc?refcode=em20250825-36958&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36958_1203867_hBmJ9x&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x ]Photo of Greg Casar

Hi, Peter. It’s Congressman Greg
Casar, and I need you to hear this directly from me first:

I’m officially running for re-election in Austin.

Donald Trump and Greg Abbott pushed through their racist, illegal,
gerrymandered maps that merge my district with another Democrat’s. Their
goal is clear: to protect Trump from accountability in the next election.

They’re rigging the maps to silence our communities and keep progressive
fighters like me out of the People’s House.

They don’t want me in Congress because they don’t want us to be heard.

But I have news for them: we’re not going anywhere. I’m going to keep
fighting for Austin and working people every single day.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250825-gc?refcode=em20250825-36958&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36958_1203867_hBmJ9x&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x ]If you’re with me, please split a donation right now between Justice
Democrats and my reelection campaign to become a Day One donor and help me
fight back and keep our progressive, pro-worker movement in Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250825-gc?refcode=em20250825-36958&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36958_1203867_hBmJ9x&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x ]Contribute $5

If you don’t know already, let me tell you what I’m fighting for.

I didn’t start my career in a courtroom or the corporate C-suite. I
started it here in Austin — on construction sites, organizing alongside
workers to win a raise, a union, and the right to a water break.

It’s where I learned the two big lessons that guide my work:

1. When working people stand together — Black, white, Latino, immigrant,
and native-born — we win.
2. When you’re taking on big corporations and corrupt politicians, you
don’t roll over. You stand up and fight back.

Those lessons took me from the Austin City Council — where we built
affordable housing, raised the minimum wage, and saved our local Planned
Parenthood — to the halls of Congress. But you didn’t elect me to learn
the broken playbook Democrats have used for decades. You sent me there to
write a new one.

So I’m doing things differently.

I’m taking on Trump, his billionaire buddies, and their puppet
politicians.

Greg Abbott and Donald Trump want movements like ours out of Congress
because they’re scared of what we can achieve.

They think they can silence our city. Take us backwards from the rights
our heroes fought for. They don’t want people like me in Congress, because
they don’t want people like us to be heard.

But if Abbott and Trump think they can silence us, they’ve got another
thing coming.

So, Peter, I am proud to
share that I will be running for re-election. To represent Austin, the
city that gave me everything. And I plan to give it my everything too.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250825-gc?refcode=em20250825-36958&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36958_1203867_hBmJ9x&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x ]If you are with me, please split $5 between Justice
Democrats and my reelection campaign on Day One.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250825-gc?refcode=em20250825-36958&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36958_1203867_hBmJ9x&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x ]Contribute

Let’s win this thing, together.

Greg Casar

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250825-36958-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36958_1203867_hBmJ9x&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36958%2E1203867%2EhBmJ9x

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: Your Leftist friends will hate this... You won't find this in stores -- here's how to get yours | | | Fellow Patriot, I don't know how else to say this... But something historic is happening -- and I want YOU to be part of this movement (and have a part of it, too).With Christmas and the holidays coming in a matter of months...We're inviting YOU to join it in the boldest, most joyful way possible: By wrapping your gifts in the symbol of this movement. 🎁 Limited-edition "47" wrapping paper dimensions are 24"x10'. Upon your gift to Turning Point USA, please allow 3-4 weeks for fulfillment -- all wrapping paper will be fulfilled prior to Christmas 2025 and donations must be received by 12/01/2025. This wrapping paper is a statement.A reminder that YOU helped spark this movement. That YOU stood tall when others backed down. That YOU gave the next generation a reason to be proud of America again.Because everywhere Turning Point USA visits, we're seeing patriotic young people fall in love with America again. They chant " USA!" in deep-blue states. They proudly wave the flag. They stand for freedom, for family, for TRUTH.This is not normal. This is a cultural UPRISING. Fellow Patriot, there's never been a better time to join this movement. We've shown we can beat the Left in our culture, but now, we need to reach as many young people as possible to put the Left out of business for a GENERATION. We're watching history unfold... Students rejecting the Left. Choosing America. Loving this country again.And it's all because of patriots like YOU. Whether it's Christmas, a birthday, or just because... don't just wrap a gift.Wrap it in the future you're helping build. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. This isn't just holiday cheer... This is cultural warfare -- with a smile. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: JD Vance is trying to rewrite history
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
So many people want peace in Ukraine, but it can’t come at the cost of Ukraine’s sovereignty. It definitely can’t give Putin the time he needs to rebuild the Russian military and prepare for his next war.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250825_ukr/?source=em250825-1-30&akid=3943%2E734936%2EwN56vc)
Yeah, this is bullsh*t. JD is actively trying to rewrite history here, just like Trump is by censoring the Smithsonian museums.
FDR didn’t roll out the welcome mat for Hitler and Tojo.
World War 2 ended with the unconditional surrender of Germany and Japan. Germany was occupied. Hitler shot himself in a bunker. Two nuclear bombs were dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. Major cities in both nations were razed to the ground.
It was the most costly war in human history. Tens of millions died, including 450,000 Americans. An unspeakable tragedy. But negotiating peace with evil men like Hitler would’ve only enabled more war, more suffering, and more death.
People did try negotiating to prevent that war.
Neville Chamberlain negotiated away German speaking territory in Czechoslovakia to appease Hitler, calling it “peace in our time.” Sounds a lot like forcing Ukraine to surrender “Russian speaking” territory to Putin, doesn’t it?
Less than a year after that negotiation Hitler invaded the rest of Czechoslovakia, and we all know the rest.
I’m not saying we should never negotiate. We should. But Putin only understands force. He has shown us who he is, time and time again. His goal is the resurrection of the USSR and the subjugation of all of Europe. Appeasing Putin today could very well lead to the next world war.
What we have to do now is speak with one voice, directly to Trump and Vance and all the rest of them. So many people want peace in Ukraine, but it can’t come at the cost of Ukraine’s sovereignty. It definitely can’t give Putin the time he needs to rebuild the Russian military and prepare for his next war.
[**I’m betting you agree with me on that, Peter. If you do, I’m asking you to add your voice and reiterate your support for Ukraine. It might seem like a small act, but when you join millions of others things like this become impossible to ignore.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250825_ukr/?source=em250825-1-30&akid=3943%2E734936%2EwN56vc)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250825_ukr/?source=em250825-1-30&akid=3943%2E734936%2EwN56vc)
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Tori Colgan
subject: Planned Parenthood did THIS?
body:
For decades, Planned Parenthood has staked its business on taking lives.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor.
