Dear Fellow American,

For decades, Planned Parenthood has staked its business on taking lives.

Thanks to the billions of dollars it's received in taxpayer funds--including yours--it's the nation's largest abortion business.

**According to a recent _New York Times_ expose, Planned Parenthood's single-minded focus on abortion has led to serious problems at its facilities:**

The article reported filthy clinics, untrained staff, reckless medical care that leaves women injured and scarred--physically and emotionally.

In one story from the article, a woman reported that her failed abortion resulted in weeks of pain, bleeding, and eventually an emergency delivery of a baby who later died.

Many of its facilities have fallen into disrepair. In one facility, sewage seeped into the abortion recovery room for days, making patients physically ill.

**These stories make my stomach turn.**

And, unfortunately, it doesn't stop there. Planned Parenthood's track record on puberty blockers and cross-sex hormones is equally disturbing.

Planned Parenthood has become the nation's _second-largest distributor of "gender-transition" drugs._ It boasts about giving these drugs to minors.

Think about that: Planned Parenthood profits from pumping vulnerable, confused, and hurting kids with drugs that can permanently damage their bodies.

And I haven't even mentioned the organization's devastating legacy of racism and eugenics. Needless to say, Planned Parenthood has been riddled with scandal _since its inception._

Fortunately, I have some exciting news to share:

**The U.S. Supreme Court recently sided with life and allowed states to DEFUND Planned Parenthood and instead support real, comprehensive healthcare providers.**

That means states across the country could protect more women, children, and unborn lives from Planned Parenthood's horrific actions.

Planned Parenthood doesn't deserve another dime of public funds--our hard-earned money.

Please join me in calling on all 50 states to refuse to give Planned Parenthood one more cent from their taxpayers.
[Stop Planned Parenthood](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/dsyIzz4mC4coDUBY0tCh6w4UyWO4LVBGtSlrgW8Hfcf23jSxC2mTpd2TbJwAQu9wSOE6CoQzbKYF64jha02JwA6QmpgITn6PJDL6TuUEZrgpRUpBAr4WcMac6Pd5sn6qeyHz4NYamKgyY50Y5yMI5VmC-XIl1ybec9EgigHwztFtDYnKF-rZ7WP7hJivdW_Ky9bAk6Fq00YSqY4D-2tAJHsh5bpTxwzU8WWomVtPvke6aTA9kNJyOpvsXkZmrNt70-i-XMAVD2xxLlLbe4praRJIub5t2fldYPesEvcpOeWPQfX3QElazJCIJqE5_QZBtujmPZpNutmB-bKDUb-MFKpqrZ8LiNATsraIrSt3GdXu9X9VZ1TZApM7uQLg6bypL1t09eKoVH5XByhaiOObVvSCSpXIfLIEXhPYgmgO0ie_-23c5wITCuZ6P5vY9RcgXN-zbgUTnCKgXqtC-jUH3n7WTKn66jd0ledFx3TiNvnrYBnf8G-sr0Q63NJfq1sp6RkxY0_mdZl7Lzo6GanfpbzAcsOUNIn0dlrp8usLx4DDX3QdFjRSxX3IAs8rjxYhrWfj4xNFR-066vHm11ldC0FBfa0VoRKQ2aYnnkb6pKkBFPU52e7hg9ZszYcs5yNWI8mtC7eKcy1hIP0rOMH_Ns1VoH0HY4qO0H3AmzLRzibjbNOfTDci7FuIl7spUavuMUTPOwof4ChWju7tKZhrtksJA-YBxUQ/xHOls6mddkWd1Ufjld_rY8FhRm6Djs7O/12)

For life,

Tori Colgan

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb639d1b9-59b5-4932-9c67-3f2244dc4b08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Postage prices are up … close the gap!

body:
| | | It’s Tyler, Elizabeth Guzman’s campaign manager in the must-win, red-to-blue 22nd VA House of Delegates District. Our MAGA Republican opponent is already attacking us in the mail, and we’re preparing a series of mail pieces to fight back. **As you know, postage rates went up again in July. Even with bulk discounts, postage for 1,000 letter-sized mail pieces will cost us at least $350.** Elizabeth and our volunteers are knocking thousands of doors per week. But we can’t reach everyone - we need a robust mail program to counter MAGA attacks. Our first mail piece is hitting mailboxes now ...

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JVWfSIy4GZfox9RzBB5J3Rez-7ZCCL1HDrNldeKl4zZFurZ9rozyVdhU50f7R8737oK6RKRUURBH1bZz2tAZ7TDWM8s2YGZH_bMELjthY_6Zj2CDPaYyQia7sBo_IdIH1jNnYliEo-7F9I72sEzd_Lurzx4aVeh2ah-PAnevz1WX730wEbTQAZQSeHQImBIxBWTuNL7n7-O0lZK9c0jx1YAhI5tDjDYjrLp4VT8Q8JQ/4jc/3-JR1mk_QhmhyGo2WnNXeQ/h0/h001.ewfSQhmuXeOvCAC3kjVivy5WY_UKIR_J3qvvuyBC1o8) And if we sustain our fundraising, we can deliver Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans a HUGE defeat in just over 70 days. name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Families can’t afford another blow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
Washington politicians have voted to slash an estimated $187 billion from SNAP

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/beca04cbfd73/families-cant-afford-another-blow?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=ec9f32b047&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | Friends,
When I read the news, my heart sank.
Washington politicians have voted to slash an estimated **$187 billion** from SNAP, the very program that keeps food on the table for working families, seniors, and children. For Virginia alone, that means **$352 million ripped away** from the people who need it most.
It couldn’t come at a worse time. Our Commonwealth is already reeling from federal cuts and job losses tied to DOGE. Families are struggling with **rising unemployment, soaring prices, and the highest grocery bills we’ve seen in decades.**
This isn’t just policy. This is personal. I grew up in coal country watching neighbors work themselves to the bone, only to still struggle to put food on the table. I became a doctor because I wanted to help people live longer and with dignity. As your candidate for Delegate, **I refuse to stand by while politicians balance budgets on the backs of the hungry.**
Thanks to your generosity, we already have **yard signs for the 49th District on the way, and large signs starting to go up tomorrow.** That momentum matters because this is an **open seat in an untested district,** and it’s one we can take back.
Make no mistake: a vote here is just as important as anywhere else in Virginia.**What happens in the 49th will echo across the Commonwealth,** showing whether grassroots people-power can beat back the politics of cruelty and neglect.
I’m running because enough is enough. But I can’t do this without you.
[ **Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to keep this campaign strong and prove that no district in Virginia is off-limits.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=1ca6a6e00e&e=606d7e9aa2)**** The more that we can raise, the larger our Fall ad buy will be.
Every single contribution fuels this fight and sends a clear message: **we will not be silent, and we will not back down.**
For our families,
Dr. Gary Miller
---
| [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=9272df7f5c&e=606d7e9aa2)

[ **Sign the Petition** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=77a7240cbd664c4d8ff42602136bed69&_e=9uGiPJR0bsdh5k_0OZ0XFl_mSVRPQBul046AqUzFADRrp4R2ZBq5tBCiH0aRFJWm48D0uPHdqbVH_KTxAzoVGn7HD4YkiHZ0NJBxeL3beylFnbejQHdSjK1h8fJ1_8ZNaU6k2EE2hj9Hm6Jbg0fepGRLBcYXoDjeTeSAqZaFd9FT5hekE3QKe6Dfhcvivpgrrp8FU1S6nu2J2h4_0N5sHuJzOdZZ3orMB4Z6qiyQ_KXML51f_vOqAyqtVtDrxIlp18pfgbGx9SrDJD0UmNkUXLnaG0HjKXKnFdVXYufEm7UbHI-iLFNMtKZq5arUZga1taMA3y64p_gDG03ablrBmzVK7LLt_e0is0c0wlFs31-QyWhlK5fXK6QGx8xs4AaGPv-2jlO0wcRq07h3k4Ty2GmMp7JVMrUNuOvy0EgZjr-wTLr0VpWQ3s1aZxBczYgWDn8qEt1XXA6hh9tp1AY2d8pntzalfGkXrJoGQZamFfxlEqSNRr2-TTpojOvWV8djtn-9ANpEEZEP1Ph3jENLabiS6UtafIBEkKArwRVPqfuT3TnVcpPbnUwSxNaeobMBRHgaXhu4I1aCmF4HZFq1aGH3_RSleh7wXqypdkfbIXE3zCkqPbngFGl91AIyfDacxl4IgpitfDDCDEAhyf6_UtIFpF_0nwRuY-m12Bpk7_MBhiKmad2iidlfrGiLY_41)
---
Let me explain what’s going on...Hallie Helgeson and Brady Heiling had recently graduated high school -- they’d both lettered in three sports and fallen in love along the way. They had their whole lives in front of them. That all changed when their car collided with an SUV driving the wrong direction on the highway.The SUV’s driver was a criminal illegal alien.She’d already been convicted of driving drunk back in 2020, and when she took a breathalyzer test at the scene of the crime she blew a 0.208 -- more than double the legal limit. This all happened in Dane County, Wisconsin just outside of Madison. That’s important for two reasons:
---
1. It’s nowhere near our Southern border, and
2. Dane County is a “Sanctuary” county.

---
So when the Radical Left tries to tell you that illegal aliens aren’t hurting anyone and that this crisis isn’t spreading across our country......I want you to think about Hallie and Brady. Two teenagers whose lives were cut short because they took a drive on a Wisconsin highway.They weren’t “looking for trouble...”They weren’t “in the wrong neighborhood...”They weren’t “asking for it.”If this can happen in suburban Wisconsin, it can happen anywhere.All it takes is a couple of open borders politicians declaring their county a “sanctuary” county......and suddenly the illegal aliens can commit heinous crimes in your community with no fear of being deported.Do you remember when Barack Obama talked about the “fundamental transformation” of our country?Well this is it. **[And if you want to put a stop to it, then I’d like to introduce you to my friends at NumbersUSA.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=77a7240cbd664c4d8ff42602136bed69&_e=9uGiPJR0bsdh5k_0OZ0XFl_mSVRPQBul046AqUzFADRrp4R2ZBq5tBCiH0aRFJWm48D0uPHdqbVH_KTxAzoVGn7HD4YkiHZ0NJBxeL3beylFnbejQHdSjK1h8fJ1_8ZNaU6k2EE2hj9Hm6Jbg0fepGRLBcYXoDjeTeSAqZaFd9FT5hekE3QKe6Dfhcvivpgrrp8FU1S6nu2J2h4_0N5sHuJzOdZZ3orMB4Z6qiyQ_KUJK4R3HwgPxaS4Os-9HXc6rEIvHjuyymXr1j7l4s7KZgNfirB0el1EQiqLq-cwJYeOkEOd0uCT5qzq6sAcWa8zLTJUayCZJwL93Te4UogJMlmp3ly44mJBr7tKSdNxC0I8cdY1qFeVqaGvVaobHf51MiZ9ZyibTyEVU95qnOVnN7UP6cyTC6fRfPbhf2_Tr9VlGeii0wnsEQv6T2ZW-8SpYYgCmcdjhD4IZgo8k1Y9TYaqJL99xeDcjKI9EmBvSYGxNKG24z5C0VxpGfOo4jQe0VZQUh_3fLiT8mieibSDRpVlPvXVXNA3pelShJhKOgjypmjUnDSKaBO0Tl9hBfQPiWkwNa14HYxP3iQPZxaQqxLdG8G_Lk-HSE-WGwZH3tg4OTEhzQJz7L2QDYmVwrq01TQeeqYCj7RLi3284XkImur5ZaEoL5b6YHOwqcomz6v8oY_vfrT1TUGImiTauLI6) ** They’ve got a plan to deport the illegal aliens before their crime and chaos takes root in your community. [**It comes down to three simple steps:**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=77a7240cbd664c4d8ff42602136bed69&_e=9uGiPJR0bsdh5k_0OZ0XFl_mSVRPQBul046AqUzFADRrp4R2ZBq5tBCiH0aRFJWm48D0uPHdqbVH_KTxAzoVGn7HD4YkiHZ0NJBxeL3beylFnbejQHdSjK1h8fJ1_8ZNaU6k2EE2hj9Hm6Jbg0fepGRLBcYXoDjeTeSAqZaFd9FT5hekE3QKe6Dfhcvivpgrrp8FU1S6nu2J2h4_0N5sHuJzOdZZ3orMB4Z6qiyQ_KUuQiE9n7CIea1w4-x_kE4d0DUOHaJCd2ym8rXED5U12VIABDrFjvtTTeEawV3t6-O5eg2SB7Ukl80-aA5eWjNdz_GXd1YFokLrrh5htFh3LetSuFLf5HHaH5Hi9OvCVZ7X5aSMwHvBTBRSclRO9KUymPwZcee66cXi9NT6gdvv5e1Yse8tkE1uE8S7FYGu5A9wIQvOTkeiUdCPWJemC7EKA3pwnJSD3SHTnb830VZ8aw9TTOFhsfd8bCucBxc-8HZbesiPECr4nGaYlOcVhHh88F5IUxAaJfb0D8JOzoN_QjNZ461170kUwQYXvPBtB3kT-UG0UkJsSVGUqII1gzs43ZpaK1YfChh3ylYfg_IG3bSSxmPKQvtexYuieHg_GAekC3qHW5lvk-Td8l9xHHyxmYQDO2OXvNQv0Fw7fZzqsSWBusu3DuOoYY0SWF4oYMq4mqXLcDWt7SmvbBEhsAgU)
---
1. **Rally public support for ICE’s work**
2. **Cut off federal funding for “Sanctuary” counties and cities**
3. **Deport every criminal illegal alien**

---
And that list is in that order on purpose.If #1 doesn’t happen then #2 and #3 never will. Because AOC, Gavin Newsom, Tim Walz, and J.B. Pritzker are using their bully pulpit every single day to undermine support for ICE and turn the American people against the deportations.Even when it’s children working on a marijuana farm and protestors shooting at ICE agents, they find a way to make ICE the villain of the story. **[To counter their lies, NumbersUSA brings together 8 million members calling for one thing: an America First immigration policy.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=77a7240cbd664c4d8ff42602136bed69&_e=9uGiPJR0bsdh5k_0OZ0XFl_mSVRPQBul046AqUzFADRrp4R2ZBq5tBCiH0aRFJWm48D0uPHdqbVH_KTxAzoVGn7HD4YkiHZ0NJBxeL3beylFnbejQHdSjK1h8fJ1_8ZNaU6k2EE2hj9Hm6Jbg0fepGRLBcYXoDjeTeSAqZaFd9FT5hekE3QKe6Dfhcvivpgrrp8FU1S6nu2J2h4_0N5sHuJzOdZZ3orMB4Z6qiyQ_KVkmY_HnLe9ECpuvHGf8p7nAw8dN2EKMXdS5lczIV5qmkzHn0NTFbbg3Hd0Gw9MaZ9FjYkONwA3QY6FA-jv9LOmCaEgugsVNyiAGH5n7IgSRu4HZnFnm6wzDBrz2_frPcZYoETm-iIjVWutuHr9IYxg46XhPwoSA7CJoAUxwIF3e-A8fAkocnZprTWROnhjR5Qk5CNDGb14AWnXZQD3zN4hAemA1nLsafx4R7HcwtnjiwDtZ-lwDDo-xAs83kEXLbxz5_qq3EPTVs6RH33mFDls_hFEAXkEbZ4NCks5A6Ty8SgvH9Sjg1gxVlG1FrDS39wg6hkh6u_4BNZACIyuZU0vbZQ7dOyNtx3ysavT101vYN-YCGG3Y4nPRO5kn8YSJRYLMRXXyzVK05qmOGQf_PhnMrtoG_oCWhtTgabDjsd0kqVloF8bViF9UX_K06KYgzvuIVHyB3t-WlkntlwrXcYa) **They are the largest single-issue advocacy group in the country and with a donation of $27 today, you can join their ranks.Up here on Capitol Hill, they’re a force.You might notice when the White House makes a statement on immigration or when the Speaker’s office or Majority Leader Thune announce legislation, NumbersUSA is often the only immigration group mentioned. clean_body: Sanctuary policies are deadly| | | | | | | | Peter, Let me explain what’s going on...Hallie Helgeson and Brady Heiling had recently graduated high school -- they’d both lettered in three sports and fallen in love along the way. They had their whole lives in front of them. That all changed when their car collided with an SUV driving the wrong direction on the highway.The SUV’s driver was a criminal illegal alien.She’d already been convicted of driving drunk back in 2020, and when she took a breathalyzer test at the scene of the crime she blew a 0.208 -- more than double the legal limit. This all happened in Dane County, Wisconsin just outside of Madison. That’s important for two reasons: 1. It’s nowhere near our Southern border, and 2. Dane County is a “Sanctuary” county. So when the Radical Left tries to tell you that illegal aliens aren’t hurting anyone and that this crisis isn’t spreading across our country......I want you to think about Hallie and Brady. Two teenagers whose lives were cut short because they took a drive on a Wisconsin highway.They weren’t “looking for trouble...”They weren’t “in the wrong neighborhood...”They weren’t “asking for it.”If this can happen in suburban Wisconsin, it can happen anywhere.All it takes is a couple of open borders politicians declaring their county a “sanctuary” county......and suddenly the illegal aliens can commit heinous crimes in your community with no fear of being deported.Do you remember when Barack Obama talked about the “fundamental transformation” of our country?Well this is it. They’ve got a plan to deport the illegal aliens before their crime and chaos takes root in your community. 1. Rally public support for ICE’s work 2. Cut off federal funding for “Sanctuary” counties and cities 3. Deport every criminal illegal alien And that list is in that order on purpose.If #1 doesn’t happen then #2 and #3 never will. Because AOC, Gavin Newsom, Tim Walz, and J.B. Pritzker are using their bully pulpit every single day to undermine support for ICE and turn the American people against the deportations.Even when it’s children working on a marijuana farm and protestors shooting at ICE agents, they find a way to make ICE the villain of the story. They are the largest single-issue advocacy group in the country and with a donation of $27 today, you can join their ranks.Up here on Capitol Hill, they’re a force.You might notice when the White House makes a statement on immigration or when the Speaker’s office or Majority Leader Thune announce legislation, NumbersUSA is often the only immigration group mentioned. And when RINOs try to slip in provisions that will weaken our immigration policy, it’s NumbersUSA that sounds the alarm. I’ve seen it firsthand -- and it works. Whether it was Ted Kennedy’s amnesty package back in 2007 or the “Dignity Act” just a few weeks ago that would’ve added 17 million permanent foreign workers -- they are relentless in protecting our country’s immigration integrity.Remember those three steps I mentioned before?I said they were simple -- not easy.But we’re at a critical moment right now.We’re either going to deport the illegal alien criminals and keep our communities safe and whole.Or we’re going to stop here and start counting down to when a Democrat grants mass amnesty.And in the meantime, we’ll keep seeing news stories like Hallie and Brady’s -- where dangerous illegal aliens are hurting and killing Americans. name: Jason Crow
subject: That kid with the bowl cut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Check out this old pic. What do you see? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113977271/565538872/1388073184?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20250825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTczZTgzOS1lMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVlQkx6iaoKQ87Rx_ucqwVyPoQK7lrUJGpRMXT6_Z4g=) Beneath that bowl cut, there’s a little kid who had _no idea_ what life had in store for him. His world revolved around Legos and backyard adventures. I grew up in a working-class family. I worked construction and at Arby’s — anything I could do to help. After high school, I joined the National Guard to help pay for college. Then 9/11 happened. I felt called to serve, became a paratrooper, then an Army Ranger, and deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. When I came home, I helped fellow veterans rebuild their lives and later ran for Congress to continue serving my community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113977272/565538873/1388073184?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20250825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTczZTgzOS1lMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVlQkx6iaoKQ87Rx_ucqwVyPoQK7lrUJGpRMXT6_Z4g=) Because when Donald Trump first took office, I saw what was coming. He attacked health care, vilified immigrants, and tried to dismantle the democratic institutions I risked my life to defend. That’s what drove me to run in 2018 — and it’s why I’m still in this fight today. Now, during Trump’s second term, the fight continues. His economic policies are driving up costs for working families. He’s sowing fear, targeting immigrant communities, workers, and civil servants. He’s firing truth-tellers and gutting critical federal agencies. So once again, I’m not sitting this one out. I’m holding the line in Congress and working to elect new leaders who will help us flip the House and fight back against Trump’s extremism. **But I can’t do it without you. clean_body: | Check out this old pic. What do you see? = Beneath that bowl cut, there’s a little kid who had no idea what life had in store for him. His world revolved around Legos and backyard adventures. I grew up in a working-class family. I worked construction and at Arby’s — anything I could do to help. After high school, I joined the National Guard to help pay for college. Then 9/11 happened. I felt called to serve, became a paratrooper, then an Army Ranger, and deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. When I came home, I helped fellow veterans rebuild their lives and later ran for Congress to continue serving my community. = Because when Donald Trump first took office, I saw what was coming. He attacked health care, vilified immigrants, and tried to dismantle the democratic institutions I risked my life to defend. That’s what drove me to run in 2018 — and it’s why I’m still in this fight today. Now, during Trump’s second term, the fight continues. His economic policies are driving up costs for working families. He’s sowing fear, targeting immigrant communities, workers, and civil servants. He’s firing truth-tellers and gutting critical federal agencies. So once again, I’m not sitting this one out. I’m holding the line in Congress and working to elect new leaders who will help us flip the House and fight back against Trump’s extremism. But I can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having my back. — Jason Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. body:
We’re at a critical crossroads in the fight to maintain our House Majority in 2026, and we’re falling behind. | Fellow Conservative,

**I’m reaching out with an urgent warning:** we’re at a critical crossroads in the fight to maintain our House Majority in 2026, and we’re falling behind.

**In July alone, House Democrats outraised Republicans by over $1.6 million!**

This isn’t just a number—it’s a massive advantage that directly threatens our ability to compete in the upcoming midterm elections. This fundraising gap translates into a significant edge for Democrats in building campaign infrastructure, expanding voter outreach, and dominating the airwaves with their lies. Every dollar they raise strengthens their ability to push a radical agenda that prioritizes government overreach, open borders, and extreme America-Last economic policies.

This $1.6 million deficit cuts deeply into our ability to fund critical campaign infrastructure. It limits our capacity to hire staff, open field offices, mobilize volunteers, and reach undecided voters with our conservative message — operations that are essential to winning in competitive districts like mine. Falling behind now puts Republicans, including myself, on the defensive for the entire election cycle. [**We simply cannot afford to play catch-up while Democrats flood battleground districts with resources.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0f232f80cd344738b44d2ab5ff22d0bd&_e=FhpIfzo-78RkVOiNIL7xoUUyUdD9D0KNi-hH0OHfky8-OtOts4pOExO20o44TqZjMZ7i1O7y4mvghp2lo20spe6xDj0UxiobvEwvsM_9L5wOf2VTh_BXtjg7jnMqfw0g16GbUOPsdt86JHf_BRyOCiNXyTfGl8kzeGv6BShVG6pJ_eRZxZy8T-_91Vq1ip-AO0M7ltQnHybyxFDaxBQUREW7UtoXAzirUoEVPinvezIMQOtZaIsqxg1zcLMnrZbCrzmP-OQ4TNxy10Ie6Gm2ah767Ql9AL2powou1nn2zRV_IBdjwh1qZIYvRdlvwWRn4KUs8iiFhel88_szihOolxJUxveYMtGUVdPQvsCtH33i4DA4O8wwbiyhTQVcydnFlPcUGQH7hCovceGZoQCcWTE89Bx5u6L6fw1uUriQlzZYE4gGXFCb4rBSYQArdwcjKQCibZRpQ9RWuay63T6EEQ0jtu-yIdzYasFjNB9E5murW0XDPoSpWUtjR7qhfFGwvt2su39G_VR03F9_J7dQykIkCUrkdXN7dS0mdlsGsi580R9pnT916rhdEa9tb8JTCt5fP8k4FbIwlMG_Tlv6Z1GXxFY7in88kIZW1It-CBK_V9nNsbnV6pP77ML87lnqn_8WHKhKG-XfOruowEgDU3rccBuL_l7TXusvSGptRUeTR5F4VMogXtXrw3Zpaky0wr278njgCJTFQZsQqGZQstzezxhTqnbj4Atr5E6_Ph93de76mthXmgTlSoQvdsjzR3c6rlcPvOmHGOnOmdRttw%3D%3D)

clean_body: We’re at a critical crossroads in the fight to maintain our House Majority in 2026, and we’re falling behind. | Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out with an urgent warning: we’re at a critical crossroads in the fight to maintain our House Majority in 2026, and we’re falling behind. In July alone, House Democrats outraised Republicans by over $1.6 million! This isn’t just a number—it’s a massive advantage that directly threatens our ability to compete in the upcoming midterm elections. This fundraising gap translates into a significant edge for Democrats in building campaign infrastructure, expanding voter outreach, and dominating the airwaves with their lies. Every dollar they raise strengthens their ability to push a radical agenda that prioritizes government overreach, open borders, and extreme America-Last economic policies. This $1.6 million deficit cuts deeply into our ability to fund critical campaign infrastructure. It limits our capacity to hire staff, open field offices, mobilize volunteers, and reach undecided voters with our conservative message — operations that are essential to winning in competitive districts like mine. Falling behind now puts Republicans, including myself, on the defensive for the entire election cycle. The stakes couldn’t be higher. Recent polls show the fight for the House Majority is a toss-up, with control of Congress hanging in the balance. Every seat, including mine, will be targeted by Democrats desperate to flip the House. If we don’t close this fundraising gap, we risk ceding ground to the Left’s army of elite megadonors, allowing them to outspend and outmaneuver us in key races across the country. Every dollar you give empowers us to counter the Democrats’ financial advantage and protect the policies that keep America strong. We’re also facing challenges beyond fundraising. The Democrats’ tactics, like Governor Gavin Newsom’s recent power grab in California to manipulate district lines for partisan gain, show their willingness to play dirty to consolidate power. We must be prepared to counter these moves with a robust, well-funded campaign that reaches every voter and exposes the Left’s true intentions. There’s no room for error in a toss-up election. I’m counting on you to stand with me in this critical moment. Thank you, Dr. Greg Murphy P.S. The House Democrats’ fundraising surge puts us at a severe disadvantage heading into 2026. With polls showing a tight race for the House, we can’t afford to fall further behind. | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. Box 1131 Greenville, North Carolina 27835 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
And he has a war chest of $2.6 million to keep the Senate in GOP hands
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113977568/565539865/98733755?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250825_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQwOWRjOS1lMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9-u8EcKtD86v9Tw1X7w0_QR__SQVCWcHN-fclxCHH4=) Team,

Political pundits are saying control of the U.S. Senate could very well be decided in Jon Husted’s race right here in Ohio — and he’s already got _$2.6 million_ in the bank to make sure the GOP keeps their hold on this seat.

[**_If that’s all you need to hear, pitch in to help us reach our $20,000 end-of-month fundraising goal so we can elect Sherrod Brown and make sure this is Husted’s only term >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113977569/565539866/98733755?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250825_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQwOWRjOS1lMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9-u8EcKtD86v9Tw1X7w0_QR__SQVCWcHN-fclxCHH4=)

If Husted wins reelection, Ohio and the entire country will be dragged into four more years of MAGA control. Another four years of Husted rubber stamping every dangerous, out-of-touch MAGA policy.

**That’s why this deadline is so crucial. We need resources to stop Husted and his billionaire megadonors from buying this race.**

Husted was handed this position by Republican insiders because he’s always been willing to do the bidding of the wealthy elite — since he’s been in office, he’s handed out tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans, cut Ohioans’ Medicaid, and left working Ohioans behind every step of the way.

Now, those same billionaires who have bankrolled his entire career are lining up to do the same thing for his campaign, because they know he’ll keep delivering for them.

[**_Can we count on you to pitch in before our end-of-month deadline so we can beat Husted next year and flip the Senate clean_body: And he has a war chest of $2.6 million to keep the Senate in GOP hands | = Team, Political pundits are saying control of the U.S. Senate could very well be decided in Jon Husted’s race right here in Ohio — and he’s already got $2.6 million in the bank to make sure the GOP keeps their hold on this seat. = If Husted wins reelection, Ohio and the entire country will be dragged into four more years of MAGA control. Another four years of Husted rubber stamping every dangerous, out-of-touch MAGA policy. That’s why this deadline is so crucial. We need resources to stop Husted and his billionaire megadonors from buying this race. Husted was handed this position by Republican insiders because he’s always been willing to do the bidding of the wealthy elite — since he’s been in office, he’s handed out tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans, cut Ohioans’ Medicaid, and left working Ohioans behind every step of the way. Now, those same billionaires who have bankrolled his entire career are lining up to do the same thing for his campaign, because they know he’ll keep delivering for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

# [From Zahid Himself: A Veteran's Voice from Solitary](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=171905275&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxOTA1Mjc1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYxNDcyMTIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODczOTIxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GDiu9nycGRD6lCkfUdOygcfBaREh3elZnwrpAyDfEG4)
### Honorable, decorated, disabled -- and detained. Zahid's words cut through the walls ICE is trying to silence.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)

| Aug 25

Friends,
First - thank you to everyone who came out to the protest yesterday. We will fight this outrageous injustice and **we will win**.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=171905275&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxOTA1Mjc1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYxNDcyMTIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODczOTIxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GDiu9nycGRD6lCkfUdOygcfBaREh3elZnwrpAyDfEG4)
Second - I've been able to speak with my husband. Behind glass, over phones, like this peaceful, brilliant, gentle pillar of our communities and soul of our family is some kind of criminal.
Then he has to go back to the **solitary confinement** and **24/7 bright, inescapable light** he is being kept in - well-docmented inhumane conditions that _amount to torture._
Every day that he is behind those walls, THIS SYSTEM exposes its cruelty. My husband is not on trial. ICE is.
He had messages he wanted to get out to us.
Here they are:
"It's never the murderers and rapists who get the worst treatment. It's the political prisoners - the ones whose voices they want to silence, the ones they want to intimidate and make an example of - the ones they're ashamed of."

"I'm an Honorable, decorated, disabled US Army veteran in a wheelchair. I swore to protect and defend the Constitution from all enemies, foreign and domestic. If this is what my country can do to me, **no veteran is safe**."

_" We must love our country enough to take a stand for courage and moral principle, that our government should not do anything unconstitutional to any one of us. Not based on race, religion, language, country of origin... to no one. _
_The Constitution, that I swore the soldier 's oath to protect and defend, is the glue that keeps us together. It's the foundation we stand on, as a nation and as people. If the Constitution falls apart - or gets torn apart - **everything** falls apart."_
_Now is the time for courage. Now is the time for solidarity. Now is the time to decide what America means to us and to stand for liberty and justice for ALL before it 's too late."_
Additionally, this is what Micaela Romera, a specialist in the effects of solitary confinement, had to say:

"As a neural systems & behavior researcher, I study how the brain and body respond when fundamental biological needs are disrupted by social isolation. One of the most damaging practices we see in solitary confinement is 24-hour exposure to artificial light. This constant lighting overwhelms the circadian system, derails sleep, and disrupts hormone regulation in ways that accelerate cardiovascular risk, immune dysfunction, and premature mortality. The scientific consensus is clear: conditions like these inflict measurable, biological harm. No one should be subjected to this, and Zahid Chaudhry must be released immediately from these conditions before they cause further and irreversible damage to his health."
\- Micaela Romero,
[www.micaelaelys.com](https://substack.com/redirect/266d90fd-e33c-4b00-91a7-9fd9946cb22e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I was able to take the kids in to see their baba yesterday evening. Our children are 2 years, and 8 months. Salma and Adil - their names mean Peace and Justice.
They climbed up on the little metal counter in front of the double paned window, put their little hands up to the glass, and smiled at their baba, who grinned back with his whole soul and put his hands up to match theirs. Salma, on the phone so he could hear, said "I love you TOOO much!!" about 50 times. She asked if she could climb on his lap and hug him, and started looking around the cinderblock booth for a way to go around somewhere and get to him. She talked about laying her head in his hand to sleep, which she's done since she was little.
Last night she cried herself to sleep at 1 am, and that's not like her. This is cruel and unusual on his family, and torturous and degrading on him.
Petition: [https://bit.ly/FreeZahid](https://substack.com/redirect/46381e2e-fedb-4be3-aab6-accb01b489b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Fundraiser: [https://bit.ly/FreeZahidFund](https://substack.com/redirect/0652bc43-bd88-4887-bce0-962c270f5d8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
News coverage:
* [KUOW on why he was taken](https://substack.com/redirect/b95726c4-28a2-4b63-bdcf-9b283c8ff5b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Seattle Times](https://substack.com/redirect/8b648c85-3941-4858-9319-17cb04ddacde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the protests this weekend
* Viral [twitter thread](https://substack.com/redirect/15bd8f60-edf6-4813-a946-17d6b388bfb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- please amplify
* Follow [Washington CAN](https://substack.com/redirect/32742a33-8172-494c-9a0e-6b96d01012b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Instagram for updates on their Week of Action

Please watch for further news coverage and please DM the links to me as you find them.
I'm head down in the thick of it, grieving and furious and focused with every fiber of my being. This injustice will not stand.

clean_body: Honorable, decorated, disabled -- and detained. Zahid's words cut through the walls ICE is trying to silence. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Honorable, decorated, disabled -- and detained. Zahid's words cut through the walls ICE is trying to silence. | | | Aug 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, First - thank you to everyone who came out to the protest yesterday. We will fight this outrageous injustice and we will win. Second - I've been able to speak with my husband. Behind glass, over phones, like this peaceful, brilliant, gentle pillar of our communities and soul of our family is some kind of criminal. Then he has to go back to the solitary confinement and 24/7 bright, inescapable light he is being kept in - well-docmented inhumane conditions that amount to torture. Every day that he is behind those walls, THIS SYSTEM exposes its cruelty. My husband is not on trial. ICE is. He had messages he wanted to get out to us. Here they are: "It's never the murderers and rapists who get the worst treatment. It's the political prisoners - the ones whose voices they want to silence, the ones they want to intimidate and make an example of - the ones they're ashamed of." "I'm an Honorable, decorated, disabled US Army veteran in a wheelchair. I swore to protect and defend the Constitution from all enemies, foreign and domestic. If this is what my country can do to me, no veteran is safe." " We must love our country enough to take a stand for courage and moral principle, that our government should not do anything unconstitutional to any one of us. Not based on race, religion, language, country of origin... to no one. The Constitution, that I swore the soldier 's oath to protect and defend, is the glue that keeps us together. It's the foundation we stand on, as a nation and as people. If the Constitution falls apart - or gets torn apart - everything falls apart." Now is the time for courage. Now is the time for solidarity. Now is the time to decide what America means to us and to stand for liberty and justice for ALL before it 's too late." Additionally, this is what Micaela Romera, a specialist in the effects of solitary confinement, had to say: "As a neural systems & behavior researcher, I study how the brain and body respond when fundamental biological needs are disrupted by social isolation. One of the most damaging practices we see in solitary confinement is 24-hour exposure to artificial light. This constant lighting overwhelms the circadian system, derails sleep, and disrupts hormone regulation in ways that accelerate cardiovascular risk, immune dysfunction, and premature mortality. The scientific consensus is clear: conditions like these inflict measurable, biological harm. No one should be subjected to this, and Zahid Chaudhry must be released immediately from these conditions before they cause further and irreversible damage to his health." \- Micaela Romero, I was able to take the kids in to see their baba yesterday evening. Our children are 2 years, and 8 months. Salma and Adil - their names mean Peace and Justice. They climbed up on the little metal counter in front of the double paned window, put their little hands up to the glass, and smiled at their baba, who grinned back with his whole soul and put his hands up to match theirs. Salma, on the phone so he could hear, said "I love you TOOO much!!" about 50 times. She asked if she could climb on his lap and hug him, and started looking around the cinderblock booth for a way to go around somewhere and get to him. She talked about laying her head in his hand to sleep, which she's done since she was little. Last night she cried herself to sleep at 1 am, and that's not like her. This is cruel and unusual on his family, and torturous and degrading on him. Petition: Fundraiser: News coverage: on the protests this weekend Viral \- please amplify * Follow on Instagram for updates on their Week of Action Please watch for further news coverage and please DM the links to me as you find them. I'm head down in the thick of it, grieving and furious and focused with every fiber of my being. This injustice will not stand. | | ---|---|--- Love, Melissa "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRtqt4REgvvjluOZFSkpkXAVkA-OyvGmIR84Yi_8MwzElBbuKUCBC6pmwxsxMVnF6lB9xKj2Y6Jl49dfPWmeTpNNjed0iFahUSid5-2BSh3H6O93ANaRTzUlcrw3QlZSiYf2rCQbTuziOSNty5nA6m8h_uVWjzANJmP_cuGXNO5siR9lfZVZbIovU-WIqk91T5Ef7uUVaNkYYkzov7kZEvqOUddT686VwT2Iu_vVpaI7KuT82k4Ej69p4x-D_wLCVOIw4GkytVLxPut2FnZY20Hb4toimZD1P3ua6q8T5dHE52aLIrOzl_8LP5R8rnOVrL4A_w8NEsNf-UBt24YIFKLqVal1u5rTWcLL2DXjjhOSkCvuwcPdKgv3JzX79H_goZN2ixvO92pvm2dQkfxTsUxvqgF5WAY5IMxs9XQqgrVvg/4jc/84CM313rTWafUByCn2g8lQ/h0/h001.niFv6TlFpEGph0e_UMpgjDn-L5rJFsTuYLtw37hPICc)Hi Friend, Texas Republicans just crossed a line—and now Congress must act. In an outrageous display of authoritarian power, Texas state troopers forcibly detained Democratic Rep. Nicole Collier inside the Capitol to stop her from protesting a racist redistricting plan. She wasn’t under arrest. She wasn’t charged with a crime. She simply tried to leave—and they locked the doors. [Investigate Texas Republicans for Kidnapping](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRtqt4REgvvjluOZFSkpkXAVkA-OyvGmIR84Yi_8MwzElBbuKUCBC6pmwxsxMVnF6lB9xKj2Y6Jl49dfPWmeTpNueQRqXouyg_cngVI_Rr1_BQrqdSV0PO9b4nX6DAMtVHI_k_G2cD4R-DFSrA2LZDZDkjXNfkx2o1jIObRVyha6eoIZNa0rWownrG0AeuHbnqrrLOLNZqq0rxR2JwreGpjaIDcObHNvCT4CsbtYBKhZbs4OrqExl-aX69VPrRqjMbA2G2OK6GQDUEdFz7aZfcZOEl3s8cdMxAYCrFqqWbxFU0xtWmBKIva3StohOGiNFcsGwnQkGuS2lKjgjTB6JM833K11aoQ-Xky6WZfwWRUotK7RM0WIBrrGv08Dyrb3izCWoQs0V9_32IRTI6xFWwKq-3Pjq-gGv1DF326ZmGDFA/4jc/84CM313rTWafUByCn2g8lQ/h1/h001.SgSIWpZrAHl0wdjBWlyTDkl1cgopauPBNYcn16UmN_Y)
Collier refused to sign off on a police escort agreement she called “demeaning.” Because of that refusal, she was effectively trapped in the chamber, unable to leave freely. She has since filed a habeas corpus petition arguing that the confinement was unlawful. This is what political kidnapping looks like in America, and we have to stop it. [**Tell Congress: "Investigate Texas Republicans for the unlawful detention of Rep. Nicole Collier and intimidating Democratic leaders who stood up to gerrymandering."**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRtqt4REgvvjluOZFSkpkXAVkA-OyvGmIR84Yi_8MwzElBbuKUCBC6pmwxsxMVnF6lB9xKj2Y6Jl49dfPWmeTpNgkJAPDRSMPQISRyI1oMhfI9eHIik64NQ_Kx0OEsvvnpf8ZVb287yo4wlyPeC1rTaGmeK-8shcw27xc3GXnbRd4EMsvI1N4U7ioERoWYcNL0FJ7bqqgfaq8Xe-M8RaUu-64N1Uix4FdoqjpH1jCt8jQuycL5YjLQhAr18h74SsQHI4DoIUP25K-WcATKUMcx_dP_HpoitffuoriDkjJFuSTiRqdno0HSMAZwDYp5urtfvM5-c63vX3hSbjXpVOCbsoagcYlc4IB69HEG4vvf8r8vUTW8XPlXp7eHcQl1C7ms01O4q46VWVk6TU00GVIzeAw7X-GW8hi1slW38AFW_lA/4jc/84CM313rTWafUByCn2g8lQ/h2/h001.hFsWdrPU2-U5uHUzn9mwz2Y_ZkV1_MUQmh4Ht2Heuc0) Let’s be clear: No lawmaker should be physically trapped by the state to stop them from standing with their constituents. This isn’t just anti-democratic—it may be criminal. The U.S. House Judiciary and Oversight Committees must immediately investigate this abuse of power. Holding a sitting legislator against her will is a threat to democracy. If we don’t act now, this will become the new normal. [**We cannot allow this to stand. Sign now to demand Congress launch a full investigation into the unlawful detention of Rep. Nicole Collier—and hold Texas Republicans accountable for this terrifying attack on our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRtqt4REgvvjluOZFSkpkXAVkA-OyvGmIR84Yi_8MwzElBbuKUCBC6pmwxsxMVnF6lB9xKj2Y6Jl49dfPWmeTpNL93Jze-htEnCeewz2SPkiQgbxzH_y3_5OEIaOyQD2lYjZtBBTfSzX-cceF3AnH3TFpHY_qH865BL33hmke0tiCnVaSuJ0-o0SmIOPRX2FyLKyeQzgNTYuRWY-3b1J48I-N_9e6xNlvl-nIUgGDNi9zvo0FVNHCDPb5JcGyukXqy3BEWVWiT3G5GEzQPgd3EftU1cL0iis9Lk0iEVidau91Ume0C5mQ663uzBp618IiWmfDv8UhsAAjp2IaxYp9J1nGU6UHUhMIF4RAGGTyOjTAEyzaNbG5vqFeonsQZVe8VWWIJ94woXdXkG6jDs07ldrMKepF-VSaliimdXF58JCg/4jc/84CM313rTWafUByCn2g8lQ/h3/h001.WHsxmS2W0Vk5ifunuBHCcF-8IuFfgT9nf6YFFPTGnxY) Thanks for everything you do. clean_body: Texas Republicans just crossed a line—and now Congress must act. | | | Friend, Texas Republicans just crossed a line—and now Congress must act. In an outrageous display of authoritarian power, Texas state troopers forcibly detained Democratic Rep. Nicole Collier inside the Capitol to stop her from protesting a racist redistricting plan. She wasn’t under arrest. She wasn’t charged with a crime. She simply tried to leave—and they locked the doors. Collier refused to sign off on a police escort agreement she called “demeaning.” Because of that refusal, she was effectively trapped in the chamber, unable to leave freely. She has since filed a habeas corpus petition arguing that the confinement was unlawful. This is what political kidnapping looks like in America, and we have to stop it. Let’s be clear: No lawmaker should be physically trapped by the state to stop them from standing with their constituents. This isn’t just anti-democratic—it may be criminal. The U.S. House Judiciary and Oversight Committees must immediately investigate this abuse of power. Holding a sitting legislator against her will is a threat to democracy. If we don’t act now, this will become the new normal. Thanks for everything you do. Josh | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Democrats.com, please .

**50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE 9:00AM EST ON 08/26/2025**
Senator Chuck Schumer just made a historic move to FORCE the Department of Justice to release every single Epstein file.

[He used a rare emergency power — the Rule of Five — to compel the DOJ to hand over decades of hidden evidence, names, communications, and deals.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66786?t=7&akid=23330%2E4449941%2E4bFTV_)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66786?t=8&akid=23330%2E4449941%2E4bFTV_)
For decades, the wealthy and well-connected have buried the truth. They’ve used their power and privilege to protect predators and silence victims.

Now, they’re running scared — **because if Sen. Schumer succeeds, their secrets will finally be dragged into the light.**

But Sen. Schumer won’t have an easy fight. He’ll face backlash from MAGA Republicans, far-right operatives, and billionaires (like Donald Trump) desperate to keep their names out of the headlines.

That’s where we come in.
[**We’re launching an emergency petition to show that the American people are with Sen. Schumer, demanding transparency and justice. So please, sign on now to stand with him:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66786?t=9&akid=23330%2E4449941%2E4bFTV_)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: People-powered, unapologetic, unstoppable
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250825-1493-foote&t=1001&akid=1493%2E342411%2EBiwFTV ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Every time a grassroots supporter steps up, we move one step closer to the
future we believe in — one built on justice, equality, and real democracy.
That’s why we’re reaching out today.

Right now, the Squad Victory Fund is up against some of the most powerful
forces in politics:

* Right-wing extremists pushing Trump’s authoritarian agenda;

* Billionaire-backed interests fighting to protect their profits;

* Politicians who want to silence bold progressive voices.

We don’t rely on corporate PACs or mega-donors — but we do have something
stronger: People like you.

Your support helps defend progressive champions in Congress who are
fighting for working families every single day. It fuels the grassroots
movement that corporate money can’t buy.

The other side is counting on us to give up. We’re counting on each other
to rise up.

If you believe in building a future where people — not corporations or
extremists — hold the power, now’s the time to act.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250825-movement.837lpY&refcode=em20250825-1493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1493%2E342411%2EBiwFTV ]Chip in $3 today and help us keep pushing for bold,
transformative change.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250825-movement.837lpY&refcode=em20250825-1493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1493%2E342411%2EBiwFTV ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1493%2E342411%2EBiwFTV

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113978044/565541244/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjN2ZiZS1lMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cndAicr822t6h8rBf_rejK1WuhucgBr3U0c8ibcMqFo=)
Hi, it's Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia. I have big news: Our Congressional district just got redrawn.
**If this map is passed, I will be running in California's new 42nd District. **
This district includes my hometown of Long Beach, as well as Seal Beach, Huntington Beach, Newport Beach, Costa Mesa, and South Santa Ana.
**Here’s the rub:** This new district is tougher. In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. _Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113978045/565541245/-309737922?refcode=250825_RG_stakes-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjN2ZiZS1lMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cndAicr822t6h8rBf_rejK1WuhucgBr3U0c8ibcMqFo=)
That means we need to fight harder than ever to keep this seat blue.
But here’s what else you should know: I’m not backing down. I love my current district, and I’m proud of the communities I’ve served. But I also understand the stakes — our democracy is on the line.
**This is going to be one of the most competitive races in California. Republicans will pour money into Southern California to try to flip this seat. And the only way we can stop them is with a strong grassroots campaign powered by supporters like you.**
**[So I’m asking: will you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can today to help us launch this new campaign in CA-42, keep this district blue, and flip the House?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113978046/565541246/-309737922?refcode=250825_RG_stakes-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjN2ZiZS1lMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cndAicr822t6h8rBf_rejK1WuhucgBr3U0c8ibcMqFo=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113978047/565541247/-309737922?refcode=250825_RG_stakes-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjN2ZiZS1lMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cndAicr822t6h8rBf_rejK1WuhucgBr3U0c8ibcMqFo=)
Let's go!
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113978048/565541251/-309737922?refcode=250825_RG_stakes-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjN2ZiZS1lMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cndAicr822t6h8rBf_rejK1WuhucgBr3U0c8ibcMqFo=)

subject: Can I share something with you that’s been giving me hope?

body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250825-807&t=1001&akid=808%2E251025%2EhQkOYS ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250825-807&t=1002&akid=808%2E251025%2EhQkOYS ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Can I share something with you that’s been giving me hope?

Not long ago, AIPAC’s preferred candidate was ahead of us by double
digits. Now, we’ve narrowed that gap to just two points:

[ A ]A graphic showing the new poll, which shows Stevens at 24%, El-Sayed at
22%, and McMorrow at 11%.

Some pundits doubt that a campaign fully powered by the people can
overcome one that’s bankrolled by AIPAC and corporate PACs.

We’re proving them wrong.

But here’s the thing: Every point we close in the polls takes substantial
resources — more calls, more ads, more field organizers on the ground.

If we can raise the budget to expand our outreach now, we can turn this
momentum into a win.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250825-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250825-807&refcode2=808_251025_hQkOYS&akid=808%2E251025%2EhQkOYS ]Your donation could be the one that flips the lead,
Peter. Please, pitch in
your first
$10 to fuel our campaign:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250825-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250825-807&refcode2=808_251025_hQkOYS&akid=808%2E251025%2EhQkOYS ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=808%2E251025%2EhQkOYS

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Every year, it’s the same old story, isn’t it? The Democrats raise hundreds of thousands dollars and immediately attack Congressman Tom Kean. Why?Because they know his seat in New Jersey is their chance to retake the House. | | | | The latest:$200,000 in attack ads funded by former Obama-Biden insiders. That’s on TOP of the whopping $5 MILLION they committed earlier this year to attacking Tom. | | | | Tom Kean fights for New Jersey residents every single day. Now it’s our turn to fight for him. and help keep NJ-07—and the House—in Republican hands. LET’S GO! Michigan's 10th Congressional District is at a turning point. With Republican Rep. John James running for governor, **this critical seat is now open** — and Christina is stepping up to represent her community and a new generation of leadership in Congress.
Here's why she's the right choice:
* **Proven champion & ally: **As a prosecutor, Christina fought for survivors of sexual abuse and human trafficking and prosecuted hate crimes, homicides, and cold-case sexual assaults.

* **Compassionate leader:** She led Washtenaw County's Special Victims Unit, advancing trauma-informed and restorative justice approaches to protect victims and prevent crime.

* **Dedicated advocate:** She's spent her career advancing justice, fairness, and opportunities for communities across Michigan.

Now, Christina is ready to bring that same commitment to Congress — but MI-10 has leaned Republican in the past. This is going to be a tough, highly competitive race. This is where the power of EMILYs List can make all the difference.
**With our help, Democratic pro-choice women like Christina can make BIG changes in Congress. **
****[**Now's your chance to have a direct impact on this race. clean_body: Christina is stepping up to represent her community and a new generation of leadership in Congress. | = Peter, meet Christina Hines , the Democratic pro-choice woman running in Michigan's 10th Congressional District. She joins our powerhouse slate of red-to-blue U.S. House candidates — and she needs our help to win. = **= | = Michigan's 10th Congressional District is at a turning point. With Republican Rep. John James running for governor, this critical seat is now open — and Christina is stepping up to represent her community and a new generation of leadership in Congress. Here's why she's the right choice: Proven champion & ally: As a prosecutor, Christina fought for survivors of sexual abuse and human trafficking and prosecuted hate crimes, homicides, and cold-case sexual assaults. Compassionate leader: She led Washtenaw County's Special Victims Unit, advancing trauma-informed and restorative justice approaches to protect victims and prevent crime. Dedicated advocate: She's spent her career advancing justice, fairness, and opportunities for communities across Michigan. Now, Christina is ready to bring that same commitment to Congress — but MI-10 has leaned Republican in the past. This is going to be a tough, highly competitive race. This is where the power of EMILYs List can make all the difference. With our help, Democratic pro-choice women like Christina can make BIG changes in Congress. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for supporting women! – the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Team Moore
subject: Absolutely unserious
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=507%2E1086043%2EbFciBi ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=507%2E1086043%2EbFciBi ]Wes Moore for Governor

Trump does not know what it means to serve our country,
Peter. Look no further than his
latest action: Deploying the National Guard to Washington, D.C.

Trump has never worn a uniform or served this country overseas, so he
doesn’t realize this action is deeply disrespectful and absolutely
unserious.

The National Guard is not his toy. It is composed of people who have
raised their hand to serve our country in times of true need.

Wes understands this. He knows firsthand what it’s like to make tough
sacrifices in the mission to protect and defend our people.

Instead of playing political games, he’s made historic investments in
crime prevention and reduction to make Maryland safer. As a result, we’ve
seen the most significant drops in crime in the country. But we still have
more work to do.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250825-1?refcode=em-20250825-1&refcode2=507_1086043_bFciBi&akid=507%2E1086043%2EbFciBi ]Peter, will
you pitch in $5 today to help us continue making real
progress on public safety in Maryland?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250825-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250825-1&refcode2=507_1086043_bFciBi&akid=507%2E1086043%2EbFciBi ]Donate $5 ››

Thanks for reading,

Team Moore

name: Mark Warner
subject: I was lucky enough to attend good public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113979851/565546996/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FirstDaySchool_250825_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWY1ODk1Ny1lNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JEAf8R2znR7egv_NqjIkHYSE2cU0CblfgrRe2WyXXIU=) Derek,

For many Virginians, today is the first day of school – and frankly, I can’t help but reminisce.

I’m thinking about how lucky I was to attend good public schools growing up. About how excited I used to get ahead of the new school year.

Unfortunately, the reality is that today, under the Trump administration, many Virginians will have a much different back-to-school experience.

That’s because over the past 218 days, Trump and Republicans have attempted to dismantle the Department of Education, strong-armed university boards to install political loyalists, and are **even working to suspend critical funding to schools in Virginia for failing to march in lockstep with their agenda.**

**This is the crowd that said they want LESS government intervention. It’s outrageous.**

Trump and Republicans’ cuts to public education and attacks on our universities and colleges are dangerous and making our country weaker – _and it tells you everything you need to know about their priorities._

**It’s clear we can’t trust Senate Republicans to do the right thing and stand up to Trump, Derek, even when our students are involved.**

[_**If we want to protect public education and hold this dangerous administration accountable, we need to take back the Senate for Democrats, and that starts with protecting my seat. Can you pitch in to my reelection campaign clean_body: | | | = Derek, For many Virginians, today is the first day of school – and frankly, I can’t help but reminisce. I’m thinking about how lucky I was to attend good public schools growing up. About how excited I used to get ahead of the new school year. Unfortunately, the reality is that today, under the Trump administration, many Virginians will have a much different back-to-school experience. That’s because over the past 218 days, Trump and Republicans have attempted to dismantle the Department of Education, strong-armed university boards to install political loyalists, and are even working to suspend critical funding to schools in Virginia for failing to march in lockstep with their agenda. This is the crowd that said they want LESS government intervention. It’s outrageous. Trump and Republicans’ cuts to public education and attacks on our universities and colleges are dangerous and making our country weaker – and it tells you everything you need to know about their priorities. It’s clear we can’t trust Senate Republicans to do the right thing and stand up to Trump, Derek, even when our students are involved. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = ******=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** The fight continues, Mark Warner ******=****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

subject: RSVP -- Frederick Community Conversation
body:

Friends and neighbors, As the Senate summer work period winds down, I am excited to share that I, along with Congresswoman April McClain Delaney, will be hosting a Community Conversation and Federal Update in Frederick this Wednesday, August 27 at 5:30pm. name: George Latimer
subject: Our democracy is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. # [#]
Hi Peter,

Earlier this week, the GOP launched a coordinated effort to undermine the constitutional right to vote for every American.

Donald Trump has shown us time and time again that he isn’t America First, he’s Trump First — and he’ll do anything to stay in power.

Trump knows his policies are causing grocery bills, and energy costs to rise, and plunging working class families into financial instability. Instead of accepting responsibility, Trump’s rigging the map because it's the only way the GOP can win in 2026.

But just in case that isn’t enough to hold onto the House, Trump, on the advice of Russian dictator Vladimir Putin, directed his lawyers to draft an unconstitutional executive order eliminating mail in voting in every election across the country.

Nearly 30% of Americans voted by mail in 2024 — it's a proven, effective, and secure way to expand voting access and ensure every vote is counted.

The strength of our democracy depends on trust — trust that every voter can access the ballot box and that every vote counts the same. But when the GOP manipulates district lines to protect their seats, or limits how and when people can vote, that trust erodes.

Let’s be clear: that’s not how free and fair elections work.

I’ve spent my career focused on getting results — not headlines. And I know that when people are cut off from participating in their democracy, it’s not just a political problem. It’s a moral one.

We know Trump won’t stop here, and that’s why we have to push back. We need federal protections for voting rights; we need to end partisan gerrymandering; and we need MORE people to vote, not less. So please, Peter, stand with me in this fight to defend democracy, and show Donald Trump that we won’t go quietly by chipping in $ today. Jonathan has spent decades fighting for justice, equity, and civil rights for all Americans. But right now, Trump and MAGA extremists are slashing the rights of people across Illinois' 1st district and silencing the voices of Americans across the nation. That’s why in Congress, Jonathan is focusing on: Demanding real accountability from our government Ensuring that Americans across the country have their voices heard Stopping the MAGA GOP from dismantling the foundations of our democracy But, to continue standing strong in this fight, Jonathan needs to show strong public disapproval for Trump and the GOP’s dangerous policies. Thank you, Peter. —Team Jonathan Jackson | Paid for by Jackson for Congress Jonathan Jackson for Congress 1030 15th St NW, #404 Washington, DC 20005 United States If you need to unsubscribe, you can | | Sent via . | | | | | | **ICYMI: Karrin Taylor Robson Joins AZ Political Podcast** _KTR discussed her plan to Make Arizona Strong Again_
---
| | **PHOENIX, AZ** — Karrin Taylor Robson, conservative business executive and Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor of Arizona, recently sat down with Jim Sharpe of KTAR to discuss her campaign for Governor and her plan to Make Arizona Strong Again on the AZ Political Podcast.
In a wide-ranging interview, Karrin highlighted the contrast between her proven, private-sector leadership and Governor Katie Hobbs’ record of incompetence and ineffectiveness. She discussed her priorities as Governor — from keeping the border secure and restoring public safety to fixing the housing crisis and strengthening education — and explained why President Trump gave her his complete and total endorsement to lead Arizona.
Listen to the full episode here: [https://youtu.be/QnwBUI0cdrM?feature=shared](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=07076c615d&e=ebfb0fda52)

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f29ddf2d4c304b4980f017bd813a8581&_e=9-0vtqyrCcLqifYHpPf6X-CVU7_zlm3NbVzR9sKm9EujYgQ5jCeakylwg5Y3OBd2xdPC3wROudzP94d-T5zvMzBlg7OvHtkKTUsi0YCJnyKaE-EWRMZqisSEK32m4pGUlz2Etll76kXSr2lAmQqx5X7cwlTQuMMrhlH85lbS1LkZYT71QN-HnT4dhkkj76AFkcgS6l2adVkwjtIHk3TfGbIV2d7_PjK-vfM8-feRuoeNADFYETXmviH5wWRIKuDIg6mhzVRHQrdC8MVGp4dXuQ-UYYXKb6M-qAk67gfW7Ti3WubauYt_XBsFguVZ8fTgJ6rIlvTPstRePcGfAP-okWxFfaGDqY20RcULLQGYhXzhD9Z-eCI1ZBGQinbViGAZbENhzbhurliNqjZr3xxlOvEwUtIVTSzrqyMQK1_ZnqtUsUDPDUUSlnhGtO8C_VMtnbT7JIrOsK5eDVr7ufwBuVx00ajAd12QFyAI5AsRW3Rb1iGzV3hsfX-BveHDV8AuTXnjQj-eZqEp0o_eAVlvQGJdnW70r7v_8bW2XL3xvLp_5Un84BI4MRLb3E0cumZD8pLlbqAzbQMSqKOlhmJXDySVG-BpKmyAPJpzWm0rpe0x86rZ25moKvKKb4dywbBk)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.
