Hi Peter,
Times are tough, I know. We are only seven months into Trump's second presidency and we've already seen many attacks on our environment, climate, and democracy. But we have a secret weapon: you and thousands of other grassroots supporters who remain committed to the fight for our environment.
We need you now more than ever. Will you give up one coffee a month and join our Sustainer Circle program at $5 a month? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=6bHkT/X+rQFjiReBBDYgkbDLiHDsCwLRnJIh1fFQQJFccxOhIVT3IH6jPPWGKMQc36Z4C92k1v6Zy4FUM66HLWHrMOXX/iPYsFmdR0hh30AgQf3T3vpWa+ZSVVL/zVVi]
I’d like you to hear from one of our Sustainer Circle members, Donna Maebori, about why monthly giving is so important to our work:
“Since the 1990s, I had become politically active every now and then, mainly attending rallies and marches. In 2004, I learned, somehow, about canvassing for John Kerry for president and went to my first-ever experience, which was followed by several more times of door-knocking. The people managing it were really friendly and efficient. Over time, I learned they were from OLCV. In 2016, after a certain election, I knew I wanted to be consistently active politically. Thinking back to my experience with OLCV, remembering it was good, I volunteered and have been on the Washington County Leadership Team ever since. Without a single exception, OLCV’s friendliness and efficiency are always present. OLCV is organized, effective, clear on its goals and purpose, with good-hearted people doing the work. Generally, the League is considered the political arm of the environmental movement. With government policy able to produce large societal changes, getting persons into office who live out environmental justice principles is absolutely vital to a viable future for the earth and all her inhabitants. Each year, it becomes easier to donate, having developed deep confidence in the quality and care given to this important work by everyone involved. In fact, it is a joy to give to OLCV. As a monthly giver myself, I invite you to join me in the Sustainer Circle!”
https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=6bHkT/X+rQFjiReBBDYgkbDLiHDsCwLRnJIh1fFQQJFccxOhIVT3IH6jPPWGKMQc36Z4C92k1v6Zy4FUM66HLWHrMOXX/iPYsFmdR0hh30AgQf3T3vpWa+ZSVVL/zVVi [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=6bHkT/X+rQFjiReBBDYgkbDLiHDsCwLRnJIh1fFQQJFccxOhIVT3IH6jPPWGKMQc36Z4C92k1v6Zy4FUM66HLWHrMOXX/iPYsFmdR0hh30AgQf3T3vpWa+ZSVVL/zVVi]
https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=6bHkT/X+rQFjiReBBDYgkbDLiHDsCwLRnJIh1fFQQJFccxOhIVT3IH6jPPWGKMQc36Z4C92k1v6Zy4FUM66HLWHrMOXX/iPYsFmdR0hh30AgQf3T3vpWa+ZSVVL/zVVi [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=6bHkT/X+rQFjiReBBDYgkbDLiHDsCwLRnJIh1fFQQJFccxOhIVT3IH6jPPWGKMQc36Z4C92k1v6Zy4FUM66HLWHrMOXX/iPYsFmdR0hh30AgQf3T3vpWa+ZSVVL/zVVi] Volunteers and Sustaining Circle members like Donna truly are our secret weapon. By donating their time, knocking on doors and talking to voters face-to-face, attending events, and educating others through Letters to the Editor, they make a huge impact. The supermajorities we elected in 2024 are a testament to that. But where does it all start? With your monthly gift.
If 8 more people sign up to give just $5 a month right now, we can recruit 10 new volunteers to OLCV! [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2] Think of the reach we would be able to have in the 2026 election and the difference we could make — that is even more needed right now.
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=6bHkT/X+rQFjiReBBDYgkbDLiHDsCwLRnJIh1fFQQJFccxOhIVT3IH6jPPWGKMQc36Z4C92k1v6Zy4FUM66HLWHrMOXX/iPYsFmdR0hh30AgQf3T3vpWa+ZSVVL/zVVi]
Despite the tough times we are living through, we can and must continue making progress protecting our climate and environment right here in Oregon and it all starts with you . Will you give $5 a month now? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]
Thank you,

Not because we don’t want to – but because this is that important. This legal strategy could **change the direction of the country.**

name: Tony Johnson
subject: 🚨 The Left Is Spinning Fast — Get the Real Facts Now
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206wi151spg57mqjn03xon2d7azgjs8vtxdaoz0y1d2wxqgnfdutw8ikle03b360s3re1fqybn6dmu0cofa&__stmp=t1keu4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ia5yu00u4b76wootqzg11dx4n455vmnltnmee23tcmejqnf8acxbmcm00gyo1zx91x2yr68sj5gc0enlhh707gg6fkia0p9h4sh2rvrqzqqvi4h32mpm74rte8cx1stma630faj97&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ia5yu00u4b76wootqzg11dx4n455vmnltnmee23tcmejqnf8acxbmcm00gyo1zx91x2yr68sj5gc0enlhh707gg6fkia0p9h4sh2rvrqzqqvi4h32mpm74rte8cx1stma630faj97&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1keu4&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

And for the last three years in Congress, Greg Casar has worked side-by-side with the Working Families Party to continue many of these same fights — always keeping working people in Texas and across the country front-and-center. With Greg officially launching his 2026 campaign for TX-37, now is the moment to show him we have his back. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . \- _NPR_ **[SIGN THE PETITION »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113980892/565550633/-1623720186?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjYjM0MWFkLWVjODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DZSFOUxNhNUHTHFYZj0ilWi5aYHdz0Os60-zk9FCK-4=&emci=fb167c99-c881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0cb341ad-ec81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16951753)**
* * *
**Peter — Donald Trump just declared war on your right to vote.** He's planning to ban mail-in voting and voting machines nationwide before the 2026 midterms. In his words, "It's the only way Democrats can get elected." _This is election rigging, plain and simple._ The same Trump who urged his own supporters to vote by mail now wants to strip that right away from millions of Americans. Working parents who can't take time off. Seniors who can't stand in long lines. Disabled Americans. Military voters overseas. Why? Because when more people vote, Republicans lose. **Trump knows his approval rating is in the gutter, so he's rigging the game. He's willing to destroy democracy itself to stay in power.** **[We won't let him get away with it. clean_body: I wanted to personally share with you the handwritten note my campaign finance director just passed to me during our meeting. | Fellow American, I wanted to personally share with you the handwritten note my campaign finance director just passed to me during our meeting. With the fight for the Senate a toss-up, our August fundraising shortfall is raising alarm bells. We know Democrats aren’t having the same problem, with the army of megadonors lining up behind their candidates. The good news is that we still have time to close the gap before the end of the month deadline expires at the end of the week. For America, Steve Daines P.S. I don’t usually share internal meeting notes like this. But with Democrats shattering fundraising records, I wanted to be 100% transparent about what we’re facing. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body:
Without grassroots donors like you, we won’t have the resources to recruit, train, and support more women like them.

| Peter,

I know the news is nonstop. Every day it feels like another attack, another threat, another piece of our democracy under siege. I understand that political emails are probably the last thing you want to read.

[_**But I want to be honest about why we send these emails and why your support matters more than ever.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113981251/565551960/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwZDQ4ZTE0LWVlODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E-ZuvH60fcF_QaHIxORW3yEHMohfrFGy-bPw1Qkh-BQ=)

Right now, Republican-controlled legislatures and a Trump White House are pushing policies that endanger our rights, our public schools, and our communities. They are gerrymandering districts, slashing funding for essential services, and making it harder for everyday people to have their voices heard.

Winning isn’t just about stopping the next attack. It’s about training and empowering the next generation of Democratic women who will stand up, run for office, and fight back at every level, from school boards to Congress. That’s what Emerge does best. That’s what your support makes possible.

Our alums are on the front lines every day, shining a light on corruption, defending the vulnerable, and showing up when others run from the fight. Without grassroots donors like you, we won’t have the resources to recruit, train, and support more women like them.

[_**If you’re able to chip in today, it would mean so much. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Homeland Security for Records about Efforts to Locate and Track Unaccompanied Alien Children
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records about efforts to locate unaccompanied alien children lost during the Biden Administration (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (No. 1:25-cv-02558)).

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 25, 2025
---|---|---
| [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76200&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099) | |
---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records about efforts to locate unaccompanied alien children lost during the Biden Administration (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (No. 1:25-cv-02558)). | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 25, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records about efforts to locate unaccompanied alien children lost during the Biden Administration (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (No. 1:25-cv-02558)). ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit in May 2025 against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding the FBI, under then-Director James Comey, initiating an investigation of then-2016 presidential candidate Donald Trump (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-01413)). ---|--- | | | | | Illegal immigration may be at an all-time low, but American taxpayers are still getting stuck with the exorbitant cost of caring for the hundreds of thousands of alien minors that entered the country under the Biden administration. The government calls them Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC), though the overwhelming majority are not really children but rather young adults in their teens and some have criminal histories. ---|--- | | | | | In yet another important immigration story ignored by the mainstream media, federal authorities in Texas arrested more than 350 gang members with a distressing 1,700 criminal convictions who entered the United States illegally over 1,400 times. The unbelievable figures speak loudly about the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies that welcomed a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and more than 1.7 million from countries that the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) determined pose a national security threat to the U.S. ---|--- | | | The Hill Once again, newly released documents and damning evidence conclusively substantiate what many Americans have long suspected. Russiagate was a conspiracy — hatched, implemented and relentlessly promoted by top officials in the CIA, FBI and across the Obama-Biden-Clinton political machine to rig a presidential election and undermine a duly elected president. It also corrupted the very institutions essential to protecting American liberty. Despite the mountain of evidence and exhaustive investigations, those responsible for this travesty remain unpunished. New York Post “Damning evidence” now shows “conclusively” that “Russiagate was a conspiracy — hatched, implemented and relentlessly promoted by top officials in the CIA, FBI and across the Obama-Biden-Clinton political machine to rig a presidential election and undermine a duly elected president,” fumes Tom Fitton at The Hill. “Simply put, this is a historic election law challenge. Too many courts have denied candidates their right to challenge unlawful election rules such as the outrageous act of counting ballots that arrive AFTER Election Day. American citizens concerned about election integrity will tune in closely to Judicial Watch’s Supreme Court arguments on October 8,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Team Tina Newsletters
subject: It’s here: Our August newsletter! 📰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Hi Peter,
Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter — here’s what I’ve been up to this month!
I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters.
Thanks!
— TK

Governor Kotek outlined the impact Trump’s budget cuts will have on Oregonians.

Tina is challenging federal budget cuts that threaten vital programs in Oregon. Together, we will fight for the crucial resources our residents need and ensure that human dignity triumphs over greed.

# [#]

Governor Kotek announced a funding solution to address the transportation system crisis.

Tina announced a new plan to ensure the state can pay the workers who run snowplows in the winter and keep our roads safe all year long. She is bringing lawmakers back to Salem for a special legislative session to address the transportation funding crisis and serve all Oregonians efficiently.

Governor Kotek signed bipartisan bills to improve and expand mental health, addiction care.

Tina signed bills to improve and expand mental health and addiction care access across the state. These measures are vital for a healthier Oregon where everyone can thrive.

Fighting for every Oregonian

In response to federal pressure to divert local law enforcement to do the job of federal immigration officials, Tina re-emphasized her commitment to fighting for our state's values. With Tina as governor, we will not be bullied into doing the federal government’s job when it comes to immigration enforcement.

# [#]

READ MORE [https://www.kptv.com/2025/08/18/i-will-fight-oregon-gov-responds-trump-admin-deadline-end-sanctuary-policies/]

Thanks for tuning in to this month’s edition of Team Tina’s Newsletter. Please forward this to a friend to help us reach more Oregonians — and if someone forwarded you this message, sign up to keep receiving updates here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/mtRcnQw5MUCpt68XOFey3w2]

Thanks, team. Talk soon!

— Team Tina

Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services.
Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-q3-2025]
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Y1j1SgO_eE68pZrYeExkuA2?unsubscribedata=IyZb122PPnp9%2Fr%2BP562%2FlUfkITSbE4SfXzy3rR3T9lNmp4Yiql6qzJUA4rfwRaif0syBugMmSDB7l5crX%2BXmnSoCc9sMgbFtjETYiObGqzv5Jpen5QItU4cM8mT9GgL9TmgLGwzSJO2CattC2U35%2BDwnITu0zyHfgyINEk1jrEs%2BpxiXLVbAQ3101WT1twqG9mlzLDDM%2FMtBGLAVnDZqDlUVlkpjUaGiP38WmupZcbOZrzxPKyI93pYDtb%2BCmpbeElx%2Br9NhOQAnW9Mex1iZL%2FL1r%2BlFMzyTfKdHBko2l0QXYEO794bJCnrO%2BgFNESiutolnYlqtDiHge1buV1V31%2BZqLf8X3ST5%2BtOY97XIMtclncOirAY6NWJ1VXJw04Gcr2vvgOxYaIkZTljYkIse3F6REkzhc%2BHwC2qNtrhFtdpVy6oSRRG%2FK6ysNM6oLT78]

body:
Help us expose the DeVos operation and keep Michigan blue |
#
---
Remember her, team? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113981757/565553622/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250825_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU4NDllNjAtZWU4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PcIJ81XRUP9JZq-2zl7TnbjTkv181spLRhu3MaTsH3w=) **That’s Betsy DeVos.** She’s Trump’s former Secretary of Education, billionaire political donor, and longtime enemy of public schools and working people. She’s spent decades trying to buy elections — and now she’s back, with a political machine more sophisticated and dangerous than ever. **The DeVos family is planning a full-blown hostile takeover of Michigan politics.** They’ve brought in former RNC Chair Ronna McDaniel to run the operation, leading a dark-money machine designed to flip the state red from top to bottom: the Senate seat, Governor’s office, Secretary of State, Attorney General, and both chambers of the state legislature. **And they’re already attacking Governor Gretchen Whitmer.** They’re running false ads, spreading conspiracy theories, and flooding local media with misinformation — all to discredit Governor Whitmer’s progress and pave the way for a DeVos-backed GOP resurgence. **We need to fight back with the truth.** That means early, strategic organizing across the state, with the resources to break through their noise. **That’s why we’re asking:[Please, will you pitch in any amount today to help Fight Like Hell PAC expose the DeVos operation and keep Michigan blue? clean_body: Help us expose the DeVos operation and keep Michigan blue | Remember her, team? = That’s Betsy DeVos. She’s Trump’s former Secretary of Education, billionaire political donor, and longtime enemy of public schools and working people. She’s spent decades trying to buy elections — and now she’s back, with a political machine more sophisticated and dangerous than ever. The DeVos family is planning a full-blown hostile takeover of Michigan politics. They’ve brought in former RNC Chair Ronna McDaniel to run the operation, leading a dark-money machine designed to flip the state red from top to bottom: the Senate seat, Governor’s office, Secretary of State, Attorney General, and both chambers of the state legislature. And they’re already attacking Governor Gretchen Whitmer. They’re running false ads, spreading conspiracy theories, and flooding local media with misinformation — all to discredit Governor Whitmer’s progress and pave the way for a DeVos-backed GOP resurgence. We need to fight back with the truth. That means early, strategic organizing across the state, with the resources to break through their noise. body:
They’ll stop at nothing to suppress our voices. |
---
Peter, this authoritarian administration will stop at _nothing_ to suppress the voices of voters. Trump and his allies in Texas are rigging the system to make sure GOP lawmakers pick and choose their voters instead of the other way around. Now, Trump is vowing to end mail-in voting ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. I’ve seen firsthand how much is at stake if we do not defend access to the ballot box. Voting by mail is safe, secure, and trusted by millions of Americans, and we cannot let Trump or Texas Republicans take it away. | | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a _Conservative outsider_ running for governor of Minnesota to **defeat Tim Walz.** His far-left leadership and failed policies have hurt families here and serve as a dangerous model for the rest of the country.
Before I share my story, I need to ask: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help me take him on and protect our values?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2a8e90c66f9c4bdfa5672db7e4ce6ae7&_e=BiP5iLS2__TXjRBm9DMIXhTThDYECqKbI34oFEt1yDNJq65QmCTnpeDfGSjWM322P-LmTi0ryTNPfwfSCJRJdmON-4PYqn3FT7-uWEKWWcjpZoTCozSgkGBvdKmqTD6fJYNeEzKB6i6Q5hYoKBwFDFpCiZQ240sYAkUk8yLMLRIREJ6Hb7Gm5BcU2mlZsYXno-elbNZX50OjIJh3d2pcFHUEmWTwNiMM23jsj3FInM62QuNk3MZQwv4kdkpm5pD8LCp5qy1MtDdIDTybRWwjlhUR7BLeLaRl95OmQ0227sR4idP2yi1NT9O6mZyvgeGQULtUJIlAU4kAS6DYp-uLZ8HtEHbHD5Nyp87P179wnuLJj95GpvtEGkYRIpg6tnHavELR-r0I7Zpzl9bxug_NoLw7_yy7YwAImHMBDeA5V1Yc0YaIazZYw0l8eadKsZPWvXIRzACLFJzlb4KBwKQ_yuXWOS-5R4DskezbOEQoGyNxsR1-fa6iLIpJ0XaHLcrXq5gGawdwnmtw_bBZDD6HpLqcudvP_VtiZgk0WoWUEh56jaAwiWIWat2Yd9x9wWt9kKN4eVCKx0DiZqr0WaughvQSdu8dg9ZOEQ7WqYWH8BDFih0f1hATPDlaTBFmxiN8AOV4aRaALyhdMTuDGMhF7FG8JYs7kJTSFilfChAxomkzX3TD9Bcymv_d-OqUcyQQjliIhroFr8QvLaCWd6VxRQ%3D%3D)****__**

| | **Tim Walz’s leadership is a warning for America.** He’s raised taxes by _billions_ , expanded government control over everyday life, and pushed radical social policies that divide communities and weaken public safety.
_If his approach spreads to more states, America will be less free, less prosperous, and less safe._
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** I grew up in poverty — first in Harlem, then in a trailer park in Oklahoma. I worked my way through college, served as a U.S. Army officer, and spent 30 years in the private sector leading teams and turning around struggling businesses.
I’ve _never been_ a career politician, and I don’t owe the political class anything.
That’s exactly why I can, and will, take on the entrenched bureaucracy, cut waste, lower taxes, and put power back in the hands of hardworking people.
This fight isn’t just about Minnesota. _It’s about stopping a dangerous agenda before it spreads_ , and proving that Conservative leadership can still win, even in a state the left thinks they own.
The national Democratic machine is already lining up behind Walz.
**If Conservatives across America stand with me now, we can shock the political class and restore freedom, prosperity, and common sense to Minnesota.**
**_[Can I count on your support right now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2a8e90c66f9c4bdfa5672db7e4ce6ae7&_e=BiP5iLS2__TXjRBm9DMIXhTThDYECqKbI34oFEt1yDNJq65QmCTnpeDfGSjWM322P-LmTi0ryTNPfwfSCJRJdmON-4PYqn3FT7-uWEKWWcjpZoTCozSgkGBvdKmqTD6fJYNeEzKB6i6Q5hYoKBwFDFpCiZQ240sYAkUk8yLMLRIREJ6Hb7Gm5BcU2mlZsYXno-elbNZX50OjIJh3d2pcFHUEmWTwNiMM23jsj3FInM62QuNk3MZQwv4kdkpm5pD8lEpDsQX8Ki9HBeUBARTp4Dt325YUFGrmmLYtel-XbPHYhckkO9qQjtHiTJ3qDeEkzbVVEgD13fLHZr9GjPE_a71eFTBkIjUx67_X-szd2YGQIvJ0Pk_sCr-HySUH4u9utkUTlca3epSCJ8rhH1tTvk6fpvaiMvv8rT0gLd72cInXTD07C5SG2fGD9mDt2hKOURDLzvWTuRMVRFMXU9uZut4OCKYe7zR_W2jrwLU8vR0McjW0gMTpD78IAH501gHTNrKxPxHfoSNZSb0bFPNgKif2PMbDsf8g6fqIQUtFO0EBTcPcIt0SuzUe4c2N2tScqViC38Iy29px7y91t3se76z6KeVjLJAt_oh-4Jy9Obm9vz5WvbAn2NDdh2umMXrH4v3mk8btYwwIkXz9-FBtofnz6qcoygBaXtcBQk2xBMi0IlDmGTuixskEimDgBh__n4MURpUjsr1lXqYfUS6AKg%3D%3D)_** Your donation today will help us reach voters, fight back against attacks, and build the momentum we need to win.

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. clean_body: I’m ready to lead. Here’s why. | | | | | | Friend, I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat Tim Walz. His far-left leadership and failed policies have hurt families here and serve as a dangerous model for the rest of the country. Before I share my story, I need to ask: | | Tim Walz’s leadership is a warning for America. He’s raised taxes by billions , expanded government control over everyday life, and pushed radical social policies that divide communities and weaken public safety. If his approach spreads to more states, America will be less free, less prosperous, and less safe. I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it. I grew up in poverty — first in Harlem, then in a trailer park in Oklahoma. I worked my way through college, served as a U.S. Army officer, and spent 30 years in the private sector leading teams and turning around struggling businesses. I’ve never been a career politician, and I don’t owe the political class anything. That’s exactly why I can, and will, take on the entrenched bureaucracy, cut waste, lower taxes, and put power back in the hands of hardworking people. This fight isn’t just about Minnesota. It’s about stopping a dangerous agenda before it spreads , and proving that Conservative leadership can still win, even in a state the left thinks they own. The national Democratic machine is already lining up behind Walz. If Conservatives across America stand with me now, we can shock the political class and restore freedom, prosperity, and common sense to Minnesota. Your donation today will help us reach voters, fight back against attacks, and build the momentum we need to win. | | Thank you for believing in this fight. Sincerely, Kendall Qualls Candidate for Governor of Minnesota | | | My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school. I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit. Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation. We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities. That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. With gratitude,Kendall Qualls | | | | | | | | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082 | | **The appearance of Kendall Qualls in military uniform does not imply or constitute endorsement by the U.S. Army or U.S. Department of Defense.

clean_body: Every dollar wasted by Washington bureaucrats pushes us closer to economic ruin| | | Friend – This isn’t a typo. Washington has officially driven America’s national debt past $37 TRILLION. That’s $37,000,000,000,000 of reckless spending, bloated programs, and generational theft—money our children and grandchildren will be forced to pay back because career politicians and special interests REFUSE to stop their spending addiction. Every dollar wasted by Washington bureaucrats pushes us closer to economic ruin. Are you going to stand by and let them bankrupt our country? Or will you help me FIGHT BACK? Unlike the D.C. elites, I won't back down. I’ve sounded the alarm for years—but I need YOUR support to keep up the fight. If patriots like you don’t act now, future generations will have to pay the price. We can’t let that happen. name: John Fetterman
subject: a note from my friend Sherrod
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey Derek,
I wanted to make sure you heard the good news: **My friend Sherrod Brown is back in the ring, fighting to win in Ohio and flip the Senate blue.**

If Sherrod wins this race, there's a very good chance Democrats take back the Senate. Plain and simple.
Sherrod’s no rookie. And he’s always picked the people over the powerful. He's one of the best of us.
But that’s also why the GOP spent nearly **$250 million** to beat him in 2024 – they bought that seat, plain and simple. 😡
**Now, Sherrod's fighting to take it back and give Ohioans a real voice in the Senate.**
I won’t say it’ll be easy. Republicans are hellbent on keeping that seat red. But Sherrod and I are cut from the same cloth. We fight for workers, and we don’t back down.
So when he reached out to me earlier, I knew the best way I could help was by passing his message along to yinz.
👉 [**If you’re ready to flip this Senate seat, split a donation between me and Sherrod today. Every buck helps.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51578?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=1&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
Otherwise, I'll let him take it from here. Thanks for being in this with us. Keep scrolling to hear straight from Sherrod.
John ❤️
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: Special news to share ...
Derek: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Last week I launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. [**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between John Fetterman and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51578?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=2&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Sherrod Brown and John Fetterman:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51600?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=3&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51601?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=4&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51602?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=5&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51578?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=6&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
---
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[**I’m personally asking, Derek: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and John Fetterman’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51578?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl&t=7&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk227-bu-fl-footer&t=8&refcode2=10270_434096__EhvAd&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=10270%2E434096%2E_EhvAd)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

**Becca is traveling to red districts across the country to host town halls, listen to everyday people, and hold MAGA Republicans accountable — and [she’s counting on your support to fuel her in the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113981955/565554462/-289842851?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjMzYzMwNy1mMDgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7j78pOEQaLfZQwmcljPHx5zZmASeTU9WwOmAOocWB7A=)**

If everyone reading this donated just $5, we would raise enough to fuel Becca’s work in Vermont and beyond. We’d even have enough to support other pro-democracy candidates who are in tough campaigns.

name: James Walkinshaw
subject: Meet the Democrat taking on Trump’s DOGE author
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-walkinshaw-partner-2025-email?refcode=8.25_walkinshaw-partner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-walkinshaw-partner-2025-email?refcode=8.25_walkinshaw-partner]
I’m James Walkinshaw — a proud husband, father, lifelong Virginian, and the Democratic nominee for the special election in Virginia’s 11th District.
This campaign is personal to me — and it’s personal for Democrats across the country. Because this is our first chance to elect a new Democrat to Congress since Trump forced through his cruel budget.
And my opponent? He’s the man who wrote their DOGE policy.
I was raised in Northern Virginia by a nurse and a plumber who taught me to work hard, do the right thing, and never back down from a bully. That’s what I carried with me when I served as Congressman Gerry Connolly’s Chief of Staff, and what I carried when I flipped a Republican seat on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors.
Since then, I’ve:
* Banned guns from libraries and rec centers,
* Defended abortion rights after Roe fell,
* Funded record teacher pay raises,
* Delivered real climate action — from solar power to cutting plastic waste.
Now I’m stepping up to keep this seat blue and stop Trump’s DOGE cheerleader from taking his extremist agenda to Congress. But I can’t do it without you.
Will you split a donation today between my campaign and Rep Elfreth to make sure we have the resources to win on September 9? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-walkinshaw-partner-2025-email?refcode=8.25_walkinshaw-partner]

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: MGP fails to call outTrump’s lawlessness—again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITcqKF8bRfNoG-iTLIs2tRn1U0y_CXe6l4TCXc65heQYxnz5pgez5smeC-_3eu2Tf5NVYPzN5OJqxm0N68ajoDbNvmm9k6XYSEx2mg0Atc_Fp6KItyuhBUDtiWIPZoMGFxmunKSsStr46PA4QvOJblSlniPWk0Z-wrtlQEy0WvIKLKvYRERWCPYYpmj7evG_-UiwO7SIL_xwwRTRmaxdOOyA/4jc/_0RmvaCyQYehwuDvuhbt7g/h0/h001.rHayGo4YLh5sZMVkCGOTAEocMSVw_mxLaRnPG1ZUds0)
---
Peter,

This week, my opponent Rep. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez sat down with _The Columbian_ and showed exactly where she stands.

When asked about the war in Gaza, she didn't take a stand on ending civilian deaths. Instead, she pivoted straight to weapons manufacturing: _"It matters to have this capacity and I think we should continue to stand with Israel."

_Translation: protect the weapons makers, not the people suffering a genocide funded by US taxpayer dollars.

When the editorial staff pressed her on stopping US arms sales to Israel and using U.S. leverage to stop the killing?

_"I'm not an expert,"_ she says. _"I didn't go to Washington to singlehandedly solve the Middle East."

_Instead of clearly stating what should be an obvious moral position, she unleashed incoherent rambling that avoids addressing the substance entirely.

This isn't careful diplomacy--it's moral cowardice. Real leaders stand up for what is right. We deserve better than a representative who won't take a stand when it matters most.

I'm running to lead with principle, courage and moral clarity, not to make excuses or protect war mongers and weapons manufacturers over human lives.
---

clean_body: | | Peter, This week, my opponent Rep. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez sat down with The Columbian and showed exactly where she stands. When asked about the war in Gaza, she didn't take a stand on ending civilian deaths. Instead, she pivoted straight to weapons manufacturing: "It matters to have this capacity and I think we should continue to stand with Israel." Translation: protect the weapons makers, not the people suffering a genocide funded by US taxpayer dollars. When the editorial staff pressed her on stopping US arms sales to Israel and using U.S. leverage to stop the killing? "I'm not an expert," she says. "I didn't go to Washington to singlehandedly solve the Middle East." Instead of clearly stating what should be an obvious moral position, she unleashed incoherent rambling that avoids addressing the substance entirely. This isn't careful diplomacy--it's moral cowardice. Real leaders stand up for what is right. We deserve better than a representative who won't take a stand when it matters most. I'm running to lead with principle, courage and moral clarity, not to make excuses or protect war mongers and weapons manufacturers over human lives. Change requires more than words--it takes resources. We're building a campaign that puts people first and is fearless in speaking the truth. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | Quick note about upcoming events for those in the area: Tuesday September 2nd Brent will be a guest at Drinking Liberally Vancouver candidate Q&A forum. Brent will be answering direct questions from those in attendance. Event starts at 6PM arrive early to order food and drinks. body:
Opponents of Medicare for All always say it costs too much.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250825-5368-footer&t=1&akid=5368%2E420207%2E5rdQ0S)
Peter,
Opponents of Medicare for All always say it costs too much. But then they go out and pass enormous tax breaks for billionaires, at the same time as announcing plans like this:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250825-1?refcode=em20250825-5368&amount=3&refcode2=5368_420207_5rdQ0S&akid=5368%2E420207%2E5rdQ0S)
**Let’s be clear: What’s stopping us from passing Medicare for All isn’t the cost. It’s a lack of political will.**
That’s why Pramila’s focused every day on growing our progressive movement so that we can build a government that finally puts working people before billionaires and giant corporations.
But she can’t do it without you, Peter. The billionaires getting giant tax cuts from Trump and his MAGA cronies won’t be the ones to fund the campaigns of the candidates we need to pass Medicare for All.
**It’ll be working people, pitching in $5, $25, or whatever they can at a time.**

subject: Thank you - let's keep the momentum going with Prop 50!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats,
Thank you to everyone who joined us for our Know Your Rights Town Hall with Congressman Robert Garcia, Attorney General Rob Bonta, and Angelica Salas of CHIRLA. It was a powerful evening of unity, filled with information and resources [https://www.chirla.org/myrights/] .
But we can't stop here
The most important thing we can do right now to protect each other is pass the Election Rigging Response Act – Governor Gavin Newsom’s proposed measure designed to counter efforts by Trump and Texas Republicans to rig the 2026 Midterm elections. It will be on the ballot as Proposition 50 on November 4, and we need Californians to vote YES to protect our democracy.
California Democratic Party Town Hall [https://cadem.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/Twitter-Header-AG-1.gif]
VOLUNTEER WITH CADEM! [http://cadem.org/castrong]
Here is how you can take action:
* Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/] for our next training on organizing in rural communities tomorrow , August 26.
* Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833391/] to call voters in English to support Prop 50.
* Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833417/] to call voters in Spanish and English to support Prop 50.
* Stay connected with us at cadem.org/CAStrong [https://linktr.ee/cadem] and by following us on social media. [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
We have 10 weeks left to get this done. Let's defend democracy together. ¡Si se Puede!

Team,
Before we wrap up August, we wanted to reach out to share some important news about the Michigan governor's race — [**and why your support is more critical than ever.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250825_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=644%2E181023%2EYgeJ3Y)
A new analysis revealed that Mike Duggan, a third-party candidate for governor, is receiving huge campaign checks from GOP donors who have also supported Trump and the extreme Republican candidates.
**While Jocelyn’s campaign is powered by the people, Duggan’s campaign is powered by pro-Trump, anti-labor megadonors.**
Duggan’s donors include former Michigan Republican Party Chair and Trump ally Ron Weiser and charter school profiteer JC Huizenga.
These donors know that a candidate like Duggan will work for their interests — and they know that Jocelyn can’t be bought or sold by corporate interests or megadonors.
Who’s investing in your campaign says a lot about who you’re going to be listening to when you’re in office. **_And Jocelyn is going to be listening to the people of Michigan._**

name: Brianna Shamsuddoha, AOTL
subject: Pay attention to Missouri and Indiana
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We must protect fair representation in these states
|
---

Peter,
We’ve been talking a lot about the attack on fair representation in Texas, and rightfully so. Lawmakers set off a five-alarm fire by conducting an extreme, mid-decade map redraw to try to unfairly gain five more congressional seats ahead of the midterms, at the expense of Black and Latino Texans.
**Our affiliate is already proceeding to challenge that discriminatory map in federal court. But we’ve also got to pay attention to states like Missouri and Indiana, too — two of the White House’s next targets.**
In Missouri, news could come any day now about whether the governor calls a special session to redraw the state’s congressional map. If he does, legislators could pass a map that would create at least one additional conservative seat.
And in Indiana, Vice President J.D. Vance met with state legislators and Governor Braun earlier this month to ramp up pressure on them to redraw their maps. Additionally, legislators were invited to meet with Trump in the White House. A new map could flip up to two additional districts.
Make no mistake: This is part of a concerted effort by conservatives to cling to power because they fear they can’t win in a fair electoral system. If they’re allowed to unfairly gain five seats in Texas, one seat in Missouri, and a few in Indiana, they could lock in control of the House of Representatives before the midterm elections even happen!

clean_body: We must protect fair representation in these states | Peter, We’ve been talking a lot about the attack on fair representation in Texas, and rightfully so. Lawmakers set off a five-alarm fire by conducting an extreme, mid-decade map redraw to try to unfairly gain five more congressional seats ahead of the midterms, at the expense of Black and Latino Texans. Our affiliate is already proceeding to challenge that discriminatory map in federal court. But we’ve also got to pay attention to states like Missouri and Indiana, too — two of the White House’s next targets. In Missouri, news could come any day now about whether the governor calls a special session to redraw the state’s congressional map. If he does, legislators could pass a map that would create at least one additional conservative seat. And in Indiana, Vice President J.D. Vance met with state legislators and Governor Braun earlier this month to ramp up pressure on them to redraw their maps. Additionally, legislators were invited to meet with Trump in the White House. A new map could flip up to two additional districts. Make no mistake: This is part of a concerted effort by conservatives to cling to power because they fear they can’t win in a fair electoral system. If they’re allowed to unfairly gain five seats in Texas, one seat in Missouri, and a few in Indiana, they could lock in control of the House of Representatives before the midterm elections even happen! All On The Line is working to make sure they don’t get away with this assault on our democracy.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = We must stay engaged in Texas, Missouri, Indiana, and beyond to promote free and fair elections — the cornerstone of our democracy. = Thanks so much, Brianna Brianna Shamsuddoha Mobilization Director is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Hey Peter,
Mark your calendars: Monday, September 2nd at 8 PM EST , Movement for Freedom is hosting our second official webinar, Building Momentum for Movement , and we’d love for you to be there! Click here to RSVP. [https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/DKkjC6wUQba1vER8YVkIzQ#/registration]
We’ve seen the arrests. The attacks on our rights. The silence from far too many people in power. This is the moment we speak louder, organize harder, and push back—for our communities, our future, and our freedoms. It’s time we start building the momentum to resist.
Save the date, rsvp here [https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/DKkjC6wUQba1vER8YVkIzQ#/registration] , and tell a friend! This is what building power looks like. And we’re just getting started.
And if you’re able, chip in today. Every dollar goes directly toward making spaces like this possible, where we come together in the face of arrests, attacks, and silence to organize, strategize, and fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250825_webinarinvite_act]

Maybe you’re an Independent or a Democrat, hoping for policies that actually reflect your values. Maybe you’re a mugwump, a Republican against the corruption and greed taking place in your party, and you’re ready to support someone offering an alternative in this upcoming election cycle. Whatever your political background, one thing is clear: many of us here in Western Montana are tired of the extremes—and ready for something better. That’s why I’m running for Congress, and I hope you’ll join me in this fight. [**Can you make a donation of just $10 to help me make a difference for Western Montana in Washington?**](http://links.russellcleveland.org/s/c/5eN4qY96xC4Jt1UdSMYShPwa7iabnNrt3_DEeBVm9O6fathuv5wvMJSrqOUBc_lFW1MhAQbV2_yTu2bNsYuY3k1bZZubY1VchhHslTRL2Hc94VanS1lyJEgqD_il_oQwzDfLNYYwWJavCEtcIbPum7jp2e5Diz0EX7MOCxK5RLqK3CompYetYQUe0ojTds5siMJifoEa8LF3BRCG_XL9u9Imi92TNcKvLt1hXIXs8pgz7YmzFVHMZrSMJsfL0gX81hNGUdsGBIIOfBkjQXEiitN5vFUxx5wVnQXvVvgnzXDtnQoNZIhCAd_EeSaoELzaUb7fFhg9VyX7m4z82GFPLdJsRNWN0u3b93nuI4mKTy-fD5wNDxAYQrflrIIr1xMWet50vAWg0UYTYBDZ0syiu_WhuYrNp_sCjMRWykDTD3eQQoYU2X098KOkpvCo3JrAM9PeikiwdbV90CiI8eX4CHb3o2eiagsE1hTQ-YTPOtToSey-MC5mQv-hrnSTM5hbV7SaPMtcq2yHEwUdVrOgem-91EITjq3dSJRX-kNek5zPyrXjg59w8861F79UN6nuJtpSDWETaeyFukYgvkZ2SqFfj6RRvEF3PUw-X6fOe0U359c69ZrJGQftWMrycictdHIRrJfwkaOX5ASmHVl1DHxyww7nvT-U_LogGuJKUaSYOOKOK6dfQRzxV9p-1vod0hPD3dx2ZuoWy781y5GxyyR7fce02ABS0SbKRUIwwjsn2Iet37EFBzJQ5iIIlIJjNiRZzkPifmqnKJCZ_yiZ83QMLRz-uxWKkpqwWcGxkwuySVWNDdMxOnjQjUS0oQzxMgg5c3r9lHRwlhq6k1uoW8YO9JD2y-HkOhfC2CYZKbXbTc4cXwkiF5hgLqpGrrmWjSUs4nlaxmHpBHdkgiUAi7dXQb_oE5NaBcx9gmVRwfVrWkTcWT4AMHCkkCqiM_RTvO23Z1C1oVwvL4TH/ahcYyQaQR8tQxMmn_keypK64dTvwbEvK/12) Like so many Montanans, I consider myself a moderate—someone who believes in commonsense solutions, personal freedom, and working together to get things done. These days, those views feel like they’re disappearing in Washington. So much so that I’ve stopped wearing a red or blue tie. I wear black—because moderation has been lost in modern politics, and because I’m mourning the state of our country. Our public lands, our economy, our civil rights, even our standing in the world, have all been compromised by political extremism fueled by propaganda and greed. And the influence of billionaires and out-of-state interests in Montana’s elections? That’s not democracy. That’s a threat to it. Enough is enough. It’s time for Montanans—of every party and background—to come together and fight back. [**Will you join my campaign for Congress by making a donation clean_body: Maybe you’re a moderate Republican, frustrated with our current representation. Maybe you’re an Independent or a Democrat, hoping for policies that actually reflect your values. | | | Friend, Maybe you’re a moderate Republican, frustrated with our current representation. Maybe you’re an Independent or a Democrat, hoping for policies that actually reflect your values. Maybe you’re a mugwump, a Republican against the corruption and greed taking place in your party, and you’re ready to support someone offering an alternative in this upcoming election cycle. Whatever your political background, one thing is clear: many of us here in Western Montana are tired of the extremes—and ready for something better. That’s why I’m running for Congress, and I hope you’ll join me in this fight. Like so many Montanans, I consider myself a moderate—someone who believes in commonsense solutions, personal freedom, and working together to get things done. These days, those views feel like they’re disappearing in Washington. So much so that I’ve stopped wearing a red or blue tie. I wear black—because moderation has been lost in modern politics, and because I’m mourning the state of our country. Our public lands, our economy, our civil rights, even our standing in the world, have all been compromised by political extremism fueled by propaganda and greed. And the influence of billionaires and out-of-state interests in Montana’s elections? That’s not democracy. That’s a threat to it. Enough is enough. It’s time for Montanans—of every party and background—to come together and fight back. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ****** | ---|--- **** | **** **** | **** This campaign isn’t about red vs. blue. It’s about right vs. wrong—and whether we’ll have the courage to come together and build something better. Thanks for being part of this movement. – Russ Cleveland Russell Cleveland is a Montanan, Navy veteran, and proud product of the Bitterroot Valley. He’s running for Congress to bring common sense back to Washington and put Montana families ahead of partisan politics. Russell believes in service, integrity, and protecting the Montana way of life for future generations. ****** Follow Russell Online: ** Paid for by Cleveland for Congress

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Peter, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
| | [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/aAEZSvlJ1mZG2_PXOUux7A~~/AAPPABA~/8W9KyLBEYd4GNNb6enXYzIuk0StxbLN2EklTy39FgGsCGWy9rjBnXXRBvwa8xnFHzNevyjJpYQgMdeks0U5P3NUd7XSgz9wwLImD7Unkd1hysKFjQ7eVjolG1eQnxtL61MXXcBgUBLiERquMHsGxVbDh-x3uj40KOqZr7L5nrkOLRfLKQA43HaS-lRiu8wyvycj06qPstsLyLYtlMieUIEQ9ohyfrMLlsKcQJFUAFPci4Mv3MYmC1rpK3Xt7IPvsNC0xlfpgribUcwMUkTI96EtESyZLBrypU4d0dPxxp1_okAsnCPQITdctvTxnBoeZ)

Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. When I say I'm a _Dirt Road Democrat,_ I don't mean it as a slogan. I mean it as a way of life.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/UOYsvjvdhujcAS3eRghEEw~~/AAPPABA~/kaPWEFRUStBxlw4M3WOZAzk4JlYl61sVmUU6enB9cGI8_4z6dbH8Nh4MFYRUM4Xu0ueC7hUU7Se1PE407CmrOGh0dHOD3a7OYiuCLB-qrwuAWWoZiNf_xaFTeCfFF6iUYfwOuZutnSDnAVzWLkH1ACGXWA885lX_BLeR-eiqfoDZ06JdBTmqIhO3ofCKI-q7Y5O8oks9MEJvVvdiDQit993Th-T290-D2PtTHqLHNSlI2-mZL-SoBlExd1vKoHOMyQhvpdXpufqcrykRaOYfnQ~~)
---
Being a Dirt Road Democrat means more than identifying with where we live--it means standing up for the values rural communities care about most:**_fairness, opportunity, and dignity._** For too long, rural Georgia has been treated like an afterthought. Our **hospitals** have shut their doors, our **farmers** face rising costs and shrinking margins, and our**small towns** have lost jobs while politicians in Washington argue on TV. Meanwhile, Marjorie Taylor Greene has spent her time chasing headlines instead of delivering results. That's not leadership--it's abandonment. We're building something different. Being a Dirt Road Democrat is about showing up everywhere, fighting for affordable healthcare, protecting Social Security and Medicare, investing in local schools, and making sure rural Georgia has the same shot at prosperity as anyone else. [**And we 're not just building a campaign--we're building a movement. That's why I'm asking you to take the first step with me: Will you add your name to let me know that YOU are a Dirt Road Democrat?**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/UOYsvjvdhujcAS3eRghEEw~~/AAPPABA~/kaPWEFRUStBxlw4M3WOZAzk4JlYl61sVmUU6enB9cGI8_4z6dbH8Nh4MFYRUM4Xu0ueC7hUU7Se1PE407CmrOGh0dHOD3a7OYiuCLB-qrwuAWWoZiNf_xaFTeCfFF6iUYfwOuZutnSDnAVzWLkH1ACGXWA885lX_BLeR-eiqfoDZ06JdBTmqIhO3ofCKI-q7Y5O8oks9MEJvVvdiDQit993Th-T290-D2PtTHqLHNSlI2-mZL-SoBlExd1vKoHOMyQhvpdXpufqcrykRaOYfnQ~~)
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME >>** ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/UOYsvjvdhujcAS3eRghEEw~~/AAPPABA~/kaPWEFRUStBxlw4M3WOZAzk4JlYl61sVmUU6enB9cGI8_4z6dbH8Nh4MFYRUM4Xu0ueC7hUU7Se1PE407CmrOGh0dHOD3a7OYiuCLB-qrwuAWWoZiNf_xaFTeCfFF6iUYfwOuZutnSDnAVzWLkH1ACGXWA885lX_BLeR-eiqfoDZ06JdBTmqIhO3ofCKI-q7Y5O8oks9MEJvVvdiDQit993Th-T290-D2PtTHqLHNSlI2-mZL-SoBlExd1vKoHOMyQhvpdXpufqcrykRaOYfnQ~~)
---
Together, we're sending a message loud and clear that rural voters matter, that we won't be written off anymore, and that it's time for leaders who actually fight for us. **Together, we can defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and prove that dirt roads lead somewhere powerful.** Onward, Shawn Harris

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: I’m geared up to bring home the win for OR-05
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
As a sports mom and devoted sports fan I’ve spent my fair share of time in the bleachers. But in Congress, I’m not sitting on the sidelines — I’m geared up and tackling the issues that matter most to bring home win after win for OR-05.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113983205/565558952/-629675555?refcode=email_082525_sportsmom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY4NmJjN2MtZjU4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xJZoHyQ9HP2TGDcVzbAbQmhwpmwc1f7W3KuI2LOMwTU=) As a sports mom and devoted sports fan I’ve spent my fair share of time in the bleachers. But in Congress, I’m not sitting on the sidelines — **I’m geared up and tackling the issues that matter most to bring home win after win for OR-05.** I’ve worked to bring down costs for Oregonians and make life easier for working families by introducing the Protecting Families from Inflation Act. I’ve supported small businesses that help our communities thrive by passing the ELEVATE Act in the House. I’ve fought to protect Oregonians’ healthcare and food assistance by voting against the GOP’s trash budget bill. And I’ve continued the fight by working to restore Medicaid funding and showing the harm these cuts are causing our communities. **In Congress, I’m not sitting on the sidelines, I’m putting in the work to deliver for Oregonians.** But just like in sports, it takes a strong, dependable team to keep delivering. And with our next big “game day” a little over a year away, I’m counting on this team to help continue our fight in Congress and bring home another win for OR-05. **[So if you want to help protect this must-hold seat and keep me tackling the issues that matter most in Congress, can I count on you to pitch in today to support my re-election campaign? Your contribution will help defend one of the most important House seats for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113983206/565558953/-629675555?refcode=email_082525_sportsmom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY4NmJjN2MtZjU4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xJZoHyQ9HP2TGDcVzbAbQmhwpmwc1f7W3KuI2LOMwTU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113983207/565558954/-629675555?refcode=email_082525_sportsmom&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY4NmJjN2MtZjU4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xJZoHyQ9HP2TGDcVzbAbQmhwpmwc1f7W3KuI2LOMwTU=)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: We’ve been busy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Here are some of the highlights from our recent travels:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2033%2E582294%2EdqrATS)
It’s been a busy week traveling New Hampshire and hearing from Granite Staters.
The opportunity to visit so many communities across our state is one of the best parts of this job. Here are some of the highlights from our recent travels and campaign events:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250825_1_trail?refcode=em20250825-2033&amount=5&refcode2=2033_582294_dqrATS&akid=2033%2E582294%2EdqrATS)

name: Team Kaptur HQ
subject: Outrageous
body:
Trump's Defense Secretary recently shared a video saying women shouldn't be allowed to vote.

| |
---
Friend, it can be easy to become numb to all of the outrageous and offensive things coming out of the Trump White House, but this latest news is beyond the pale. **Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth recently reposted a video from a self-described "Christian nationalist" pastor, whose church doesn't believe women should be allowed to vote.** The pastor, Doug Wilson, didn't stop there — he went on to claim that enslaved people "had affection" for their masters, and that a woman's role is to bear children and look after the home. Friend, views like these are repugnant. They have no place in our government or our society. [**As Marcy can tell you, a woman's place is in the House of Representatives, or wherever she wants to be. name: Esosa Osa (via Fair Fight Action)
subject: Combatting digital misinformation and disinformation as we head into the 2026 midterm elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113983333/565559428/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250825_T1_EsosaOnyx_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzZmMjc0Ny1mNjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BvedsjbmYlNKEUyHfZD6ILQbtlzpvy1PUwXMjYf_-0=&emci=7afcdd40-f681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=236f2747-f681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi there, First of all, I want to thank you for everything you do to support this team. As a former deputy executive director of Fair Fight Action, I know that grassroots activists like you are the engine that drives this organization’s vital, democracy-strengthening work. Second, I’d like to tell you a bit about what I’ve been focusing on lately, and how it connects to a mission we share: **combatting digital misinformation that functions as voter suppression, which is increasingly urgent as we get closer to the 2026 midterm elections.** All too often, bad actors target communities of color with false information that can keep them from participating in democracy. Misinformation would look like giving out the wrong polling hours, and disinformation would include deliberately providing wrong polling information to Black communities. It’s a tale as old as white supremacy — the tools and tactics may have evolved, but the goal has always been the same: to deter, deny, and disempower Black Americans. Fair Fight Action strives to make sure voters have accurate election information so they can use their power at the ballot box. I was proud to work towards that mission, and I’ve gone on to partner with Fair Fight Action as the founder and CEO of Onyx Impact — a nonprofit research, education, and digital innovation hub dedicated to fighting the spread of harmful information, amplifying Black voices, and empowering Black communities.

**One resource we’ve developed is the Digital Green Book. It’s a roadmap to equip the Black community with the knowledge and tools necessary to identify misinformation, protect our families, and make informed decisions in increasingly deceptive online spaces.** [**Click here to explore the Digital Green book. And share it with your networks to help block efforts to divide, deceive, or discourage Black communities with manipulated information.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113983334/565559429/1592707738?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250825_T1_EsosaOnyx_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzZmMjc0Ny1mNjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BvedsjbmYlNKEUyHfZD6ILQbtlzpvy1PUwXMjYf_-0=&emci=7afcdd40-f681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=236f2747-f681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277) I’m grateful that Fair Fight is helping to make sure voters have the facts they need to make their voices heard — and I appreciate how your support makes it possible. Thanks for everything you do,
Esosa Esosa Osa
Founder & CEO, Onyx Impact
| [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113983335/565559430/659513184?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250825_T1_EsosaOnyx_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzZmMjc0Ny1mNjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BvedsjbmYlNKEUyHfZD6ILQbtlzpvy1PUwXMjYf_-0=)
---
|

clean_body: | | | Hi there, First of all, I want to thank you for everything you do to support this team. As a former deputy executive director of Fair Fight Action, I know that grassroots activists like you are the engine that drives this organization’s vital, democracy-strengthening work. Second, I’d like to tell you a bit about what I’ve been focusing on lately, and how it connects to a mission we share: combatting digital misinformation that functions as voter suppression, which is increasingly urgent as we get closer to the 2026 midterm elections. All too often, bad actors target communities of color with false information that can keep them from participating in democracy. Misinformation would look like giving out the wrong polling hours, and disinformation would include deliberately providing wrong polling information to Black communities. It’s a tale as old as white supremacy — the tools and tactics may have evolved, but the goal has always been the same: to deter, deny, and disempower Black Americans. Fair Fight Action strives to make sure voters have accurate election information so they can use their power at the ballot box. I was proud to work towards that mission, and I’ve gone on to partner with Fair Fight Action as the founder and CEO of Onyx Impact — a nonprofit research, education, and digital innovation hub dedicated to fighting the spread of harmful information, amplifying Black voices, and empowering Black communities. One resource we’ve developed is the Digital Green Book. It’s a roadmap to equip the Black community with the knowledge and tools necessary to identify misinformation, protect our families, and make informed decisions in increasingly deceptive online spaces. I’m grateful that Fair Fight is helping to make sure voters have the facts they need to make their voices heard — and I appreciate how your support makes it possible. Thanks for everything you do, Esosa Esosa Osa Founder & CEO, Onyx Impact | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/iCVWnfAxlLeojMWdrt7fvNI_UbpnDQh2_CqqzECW2hFaiM7Z_-PvNFM5zBTPcTkQuvmp8tzkapBFFZ8aLPgxnRE8A4hL09G8zoVkGARTViUKgoH3knukthYQzvcS7xjOsggICSOJFs54css_VsHcgLIqDkJxcRzJMe_MrBC6wlOjCPzJz8mJ3uUbQRYBF0xCueOYsgwjW_DmwtlUcaFgtl3InoSZgEo7KENuk9vEtNsLHC7uXX655MST6wgq2aHca-A3_mAzBP3Wa6uHcR3m0Pvqv1rSribaB1pfWIM9nbA009_AXq_2twG340uCnTtStoymR4Kpt8RwqN0kEs4-xr1VjZrJ8a-T1Z3l9pvab_5sWc9o1fE4EOYkfQP9NxlnTqQkjQ77Xs8sVdHsH1mhtfbVvHjsBzix1UTA9ubwwvJrhWFyKDn7Y2TZADJzxwAUCCKekMUL3gED1or7GX6QXSixr6mPCvbr_BJQFdfYKM86qDG2Y5Swmc1XHsDlBkREXB4NW7xIINj0WmKmdws_C_Iq1rGj5rCNwZmCGvOjz6oZLleid8SUXxqBXObZZMV9YOpfgRH0wXSwJjHtKEclh5jTGXcXhhu7qLo6UoX8cm2NGoHD-u5qhA-n7Mr-ztOQ7XoeIWviF0Z18pyfItEcq-hvLa5hDpo7RvWGPM4nvsLmXzufaKlQ3JGQSe0DZfblFZuNgOVonyjuSDnSw9M1NvA8SFBy/cav2vFAvg4TaexX4B3mZHSl6GIru05uC/12) [NO](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/UhW-yO4N90g8Bpid0WkqJvAlUyFiQizlkqMLrEkCGLUZ7R7A4JYn2AAQVMSuaBJc_GvTGjUFvnxpq5AfY5RH20vYT6O0sFi_8mQbtC_41IYyAgNA3c16qhyFMzwSGwWVaDr5_aB6kKzuabmQfX3dum6f-iwifWPjWEUwdx9xlwu7_juU8q42W1VV1thxt22aYfnFWE_0116oYsarVLIEahOQWxfLSzHA3kilbIWbHMRkrZ8rFTgbeqyAHsL2R_-lpsoWyb9Twma_t8g3uThNP-CHnUZWMV0bSD8ECGmX8sVMual7d4Xaro3Bt-TUw9YNEI21tExz6-71s6CWkLcPTBd-X-fvk9K_IQeU-Jz-SiDyBKb4T_Tror-s1wDCPIU8j5qBGxcSsNbCQU1h9Jrx5vSnu9otwvFRhWQ7Kk9bGlDS-n62o-R1ywYVj7s4IaKCS15GzM3FEZp5h4Yo0is3rhJvQmr-yEsze9LzKs7d4jopuX1VNzBAGwA2W5oabxjWuhQmosD4MLy6H35I4TokwVqpMI-7rVbDq9ADSatJW3upJLjaJUcH0eINvhpFuFTXFFqksGxtmuHaXq8hr_hgnxKQzznYgCoK7CaFG2YnJ3RUTnH2ezUpljSy6Z8Sr7PuT6qhPuEwmOhtRiNZ5WWUfMnQNtngHg-bIo1C63tWXNKWTQHmXd2eBV6uZ5D8M6-PkwRLeCcY-46nzqELTUklH3ZjMIMs/QJ9KF8he2wC5NYR4gq-07IaRNYz9doQY/12) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/tWKXEDa1ghBpNQS0JIULXCKwSg2a4MALa-y57-oWd_Aj4nk4HZkJysevi5zftMpedlYGUGIVtxWtGwZeYeBmxUhtzqn6sCFGWXH0B1vrvd8yA8waiKtCs2mOMpIkkKuKOp2E4-8M2YOoIOkV1jTC44H6ksUKK63wGi1Cldamrn1hhtbnNnqbrPQnCxLGV2P9Yk0xbvzDsvyeLSZnWD86vap4bpVTC6ft4cpk5ihB08pGNdWwlswVK_viYUZnX6sTzosqYYcSIAIRYUgJ3hQMhNZOBh34K4IagOo7OAomrrKKCu7uQdxJyqcUOgf-ALVfqVDs9YDhRlpFtfEEeUZlCBDxTpRpaFbREu5a3BLMhF93YKdQ7WoklArwv44eNCCkp6mBEUNTM7zgg0R5evTxTGalSZX1N_eMihwd9kWdEtAgeG316Djxx5vZHfVdOAzR1a7mw6bDSbLts0jWrDr6hXi6T3xE2-3y-2hHshmCJE4-fjzCEpPgHlxJ4onDyPXSI83ddSwx76z69hgB-cSgKBZ-iR2Mo-yGqJSIosc4nNG8Fc5B2cqNGGqlyJxBOLxqo_ND3YOmv8NnGL0BeVHb6RicH6c86BpX_XXyGSnNxzRrCqA0XOj5WQaKQB2oKpmBfkKNmnXJFfRNCPm-Jfq56ws5N06s0aKTWRlSNdId6zf5VQDTkJPSKRwzJ8wRThWIqQbjLA4M-PszH4Do8w-zoR51CnC2/5MBOO1jjWzWv8x9jSjjfqFwdhyC_WCSU/12)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
