| | Friend, I wanted to write to you this morning and sincerely thank you. Working as your Congressman these past eight months has been an honor. While the work is never easy, serving the Western Slope and fighting for this constituency is worth every hour. It may feel like this term just began, but **the next election is already coming into view.** Every day—and every dollar—counts. Not just __ for delivering results, which we are doing, but for staying ahead. clean_body: I could not be prouder than to fight for you| | | | | Friend, I wanted to write to you this morning and sincerely thank you. Working as your Congressman these past eight months has been an honor. While the work is never easy, serving the Western Slope and fighting for this constituency is worth every hour. It may feel like this term just began, but the next election is already coming into view. Every day—and every dollar—counts. Not just for delivering results, which we are doing, but for staying ahead. That is why I am asking once more for your support– I couldn’t be prouder to stand up for you and the people of Western and Southern Colorado. I want to continue to serve but it is going to be a fight! Thank you for being on the team, Rep. Jeff HurdCongressman CO-03 | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2025 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

subject: Your opinion on mail-in ballots?

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Mail-in balloting continues to be attacked even after the 2024 election. Losing candidates from the last few elections continue with their fraud allegations despite there being no evidence of wrongdoing.
Please answer our simple question below:
Team: Do you think mail-in ballots are safe and secure?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082525_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082525_2no&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082525_2&amount=20]

body:
Ten top targeted Republican House incumbents raised more than $1 million last quarter.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5594%2E196590%2Ex-tEjf). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4459?t=2&akid=5594%2E196590%2Ex-tEjf)
---
| It’s Mandela Barnes. I wanted to reach out quickly with a pretty **concerning update** on Democratic campaign fronts across the country.

_**Take a look at this:**_
---
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4459?t=3&akid=5594%2E196590%2Ex-tEjf)
| | | [FIGHT BACK ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4460?t=4&akid=5594%2E196590%2Ex-tEjf)
---
**Ten, that’s right, ten, targeted Republican House incumbents raised more than $1 million last quarter.** For context, just one targeted Democratic House incumbent raised that amount.

If we want any hope of reclaiming the House majority and restoring a government that works for the people, _**we have to turn that trend around.**_

Now, it’s no secret that top Republicans will accept funding from anyone with deep pockets, values be damned. But money is money, and the funding these campaigns have received _**will**_ be put to powerful use.

At the Long Run PAC, we believe in backing changemaking candidates stepping up in ways we’ve never seen before. Young Candidates. Candidates of Color. LGBTQ+ Candidates. Working Class Candidates. Candidates who are breaking the mold and are positioned to win crucial races all over America.

But to win, it takes resources, a community of backers, and support from grassroots donors like you. [_**So, in that spirit, I hope you’ll consider a contribution to our work today so we can continue backing candidates who prioritize change.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4459?t=6&akid=5594%2E196590%2Ex-tEjf)

Mandela Barnes

body:

Tomorrow is Women’s Equality Day: A day to celebrate the achievements of women, commemorate the 19th Amendment, and acknowledge the ongoing fight for full gender equality.

Tomorrow must be a commitment to keep fighting — for fair pay, for access to health care, for safety in the workplace, for representation at every level of government. [**Join us now by adding your name and standing with Bonnie Watson Coleman in the fight for equity, representation, and opportunity for all women:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113984435/565563193/1403804542?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250825_PT_WomensEqualityDay_0_3MO_TeamWatsonColeman_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzBjOTcyMy1mODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-wf1uq7xAG1ed8VgOTsLoMlEluOnXmxvHJipH_OV9E=&emci=9aae39a8-137d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=dc0c9723-f881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098) | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113984437/565563196/1403804542?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250825_PT_WomensEqualityDay_0_3MO_TeamWatsonColeman_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzBjOTcyMy1mODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-wf1uq7xAG1ed8VgOTsLoMlEluOnXmxvHJipH_OV9E=&emci=9aae39a8-137d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=dc0c9723-f881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)

Bonnie Watson Coleman has worked to expand maternal health coverage, protect the right to choose, pass the CROWN Act to end hair discrimination, and reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act.

Every step of the way, she's been guided by a simple truth: **_Equality isn’t a privilege, it’s a right._**

And we’ll keep fighting everyday until that truth becomes reality for all women.

In solidarity,

Team Watson Coleman

* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Last week’s Paint it Red was a smashing success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Last week’s Paint it Red was a smashing success

| | | | | [|
---](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=6f42bed8e5&e=5a45b9550e)
| | | | | | Last week we had one of the best fundraisers I’ve ever been to – nearly 500 patriots joined us at our annual summer event, Paint it Red. With special guest, Congressman Jim Jordan, it was a pleasure giving our supporters a behind the scenes look into Congress.
I can’t thank Jim and everyone who attended enough for making the night so special.
Eastern Washington is choke-full of very special people, so it wasn’t easy to choose just five to honor with our Eastern Washington Impact Awards. I was glad to recognize the work of law enforcement, business leaders, community volunteers and women’s sports leaders.
Eastern Washington Impact Award Winners:
* **Cindy Zapotocky — Civic Leadership & Community Service**
* **Sheldon Jackson — Business & Civic Engagement**
* **Lauren Matthews — Courage & Fair Competition**
* **Sheriff Dale Wagner — Public Safety & Service**
* **Barry N. Baker — Business Leadership & Community Service**

Shining a spotlight on our local heroes was the highlight of the night!
To give you more of a flavor of the evening, I’m sharing a video we produced for the dinner as well as some photos for you all to enjoy.
---

clean_body: Last week’s Paint it Red was a smashing success | | | | | | | | | | | Last week we had one of the best fundraisers I’ve ever been to – nearly 500 patriots joined us at our annual summer event, Paint it Red. With special guest, Congressman Jim Jordan, it was a pleasure giving our supporters a behind the scenes look into Congress. I can’t thank Jim and everyone who attended enough for making the night so special. Eastern Washington is choke-full of very special people, so it wasn’t easy to choose just five to honor with our Eastern Washington Impact Awards. I was glad to recognize the work of law enforcement, business leaders, community volunteers and women’s sports leaders. Eastern Washington Impact Award Winners: Cindy Zapotocky — Civic Leadership & Community Service Sheldon Jackson — Business & Civic Engagement Lauren Matthews — Courage & Fair Competition Sheriff Dale Wagner — Public Safety & Service Barry N. Baker — Business Leadership & Community Service** Shining a spotlight on our local heroes was the highlight of the night! To give you more of a flavor of the evening, I’m sharing a video we produced for the dinner as well as some photos for you all to enjoy. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | It’s a privilege to represent the wonderful people of Eastern Washington in Congress! Thank you for making my job so special. While I’m dwelling on the evening, let me also give a special thanks to my campaign co-chair, and brilliant event organizer Eleanor, as well as the many staffers and volunteers who made the evening possible. I owe you so much. After Labor Day, I’ll be back in Washington, D.C., after a recess month filled with meetings at home. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203 | | | | | | | | | You can or | | |

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: 🚨 Trump Sends National Guard to New Mexico
body:
Plus: JD Vance Exposes Census SCAM | New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bf4187b1ce&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | This week’s episode of the[ No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6e866a594e&e=567664f14c) is packed with stories you won’t hear anywhere else.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=91c07f3b27&e=567664f14c)
| |

### 🔥 Trump Deploys National Guard to New Mexico
President Trump has just announced the deployment of up to 1,700 National Guard troops across 19 states — and New Mexico is on the list. Yet our leaders remain silent. No governor statement, no mayor statement, no major media coverage. Just crickets.
* Troops will support ICE operations and assist law enforcement
* Deployment already showing success in DC: crime down 35% in 10 days
* New Mexicans left wondering how this will play out here
* Expect pushback from state leaders soon — but so far, silence

Impact: This move could reshape local politics, especially in a state where party registration gaps are shrinking fast.

### 🚨 JD Vance EXPOSES the Census Scam
On _Meet the Press_ , JD Vance dropped a bombshell: the Census counts illegal aliens for congressional apportionment, giving states like California up to 5 extra seats while states like Ohio LOSE representation.
* Rasmussen poll: 57% of Americans want a new “citizens-only” Census now
* 52% say illegal immigrants should NOT be counted
* This fight could set the stage for a Vance vs. Newsom showdown in 2028

### 💀 Newsom’s Slick Rise
Gavin Newsom has surged ahead of Kamala Harris and AOC as the clear Democratic frontrunner for 2028. His secret? Mimicking Trump’s style — all caps tweets, insults, and brash attacks.But can a “Trump copycat” survive a general election? Spoiler alert: Democrats are desperate for a fighter, and for now, they’re rallying around him.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7aaeb12a66&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

### 💰 Economy & Voter Shifts
* Hispanic voters in Texas souring on Trump: 61% disapprove
* Prices on basics (like $2.59 donuts!) are crushing families
* Democrats losing MILLIONS of registered voters — NM gap drops from 16% to 9.9%
* 2026 midterms shaping up as a stalemate, not a wave

### 📉 Woke Stocks Collapse
Cracker Barrel’s logo rebrand sparked a $100 million market value drop — another sign that “go woke, go broke” is now a Wall Street reality.

### 📺 CBS Takeover
CBS News has been acquired by Skydance. Could this mean a shift back toward balanced reporting? Early signs suggest yes — with anchors like Tony Dokoupil pushing for fairness.
###
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d28d1a77b3&e=567664f14c)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Hearing your thoughts directly will be a big help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I’ve been so grateful to see so many of you sharing your thoughts in the survey I sent around.
As Donald Trump and Washington Republicans unleash an endless stream of chaos and harm on the American people, your direct input helps me make sure I’m focused on the issues that will make the biggest difference for you and your loved ones as I fight back.
**But I’m still looking for another 100 responses by midnight, so if you haven’t already, can you share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly? Here's the survey link again:** [**https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-august-priorities-surv-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113984548/565563574/-1019335539?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5576-su-nd&refcode=jtk5576-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmM5NDE5MC1mODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DR_LRV4vGiyHdBncH6ZyHvdZEScY3mwYxylKJ99-BWQ=&emci=819be58f-2c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66c94190-f881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1586379)
Thank you,
Rev. Warnock
| \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Raphael Warnock**
Subject: I need to hear from you |
---|---|---
| | |
---
Friend, the GOP-led Senate left for a month-long break after passing one of the most shameful pieces of legislation I’ve ever seen.
Their budget bill will strip millions of their health care and cause health insurance premiums to skyrocket – all to fund a massive tax cut for the special interests and billionaires who fund their campaigns.
Meanwhile, Trump’s tariffs are pushing up prices everywhere you look. The GOP has added more than $4 trillion to the national debt. **And now, Republicans are working to gerrymander districts before the midterms so they won’t have to face voters and the consequences of their disastrous agenda.**
I’m using every lever of power I have to fight back against Donald Trump, the GOP-led Senate, and their dangerous policies. But to do my job well, I need to hear from folks like you directly about your top priorities and concerns.
**With the Senate out of session this month, I’m traveling around the state to talk with folks about what’s top of mind for them right now – and I want to make sure I hear from _you_ , too.**
[**That’s why I asked my team to put together a brief priorities survey so you can share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly. Will you take a moment now to let me know what is weighing heaviest on your mind?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113984549/565563575/391917200?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5576-su-nd&refcode=jtk5576-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmM5NDE5MC1mODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DR_LRV4vGiyHdBncH6ZyHvdZEScY3mwYxylKJ99-BWQ=&emci=819be58f-2c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66c94190-f881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1586379)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113984550/565563576/391917200?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5576-su-nd&refcode=jtk5576-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmM5NDE5MC1mODgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DR_LRV4vGiyHdBncH6ZyHvdZEScY3mwYxylKJ99-BWQ=&emci=819be58f-2c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66c94190-f881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1586379)
---
I’m grateful to have you with me in this fight. Thanks for taking a moment to share your feedback.
Sincerely,

Raphael Warnock Subject: I need to hear from you | ---|---|--- | | | Friend, the GOP-led Senate left for a month-long break after passing one of the most shameful pieces of legislation I’ve ever seen. Their budget bill will strip millions of their health care and cause health insurance premiums to skyrocket – all to fund a massive tax cut for the special interests and billionaires who fund their campaigns. Meanwhile, Trump’s tariffs are pushing up prices everywhere you look. The GOP has added more than $4 trillion to the national debt. And now, Republicans are working to gerrymander districts before the midterms so they won’t have to face voters and the consequences of their disastrous agenda. I’m using every lever of power I have to fight back against Donald Trump, the GOP-led Senate, and their dangerous policies. But to do my job well, I need to hear from folks like you directly about your top priorities and concerns. name: Rep. Vikki Breese-Iverson
subject: The tax hike no one’s talking about...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Vikki PAC ID #20022
body:
What you can do about the statewide payroll tax buried in Salem's "transportation" plan.
| [](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQ1oszhc8XMq4SQTPtl2ZYjTdWr8XLNPs5DKkHqNFgxrsIFgpN44tTLLXHCUtSGcZrPJz2WxU8BWhUggJB5GJm88F5rhlpIo9HuPdYwLXhNGU_wLdSJEvReSzkKPfjq9bgb4YK3UpLHHCAKkivCRWQYuuY_2cssEA-BzWPQf7aR-wL0)
---

Friends, Today in the Transportation Committee, lawmakers are considering proposals that could directly impact how we travel, commute, and do business across Oregon. While these bills are still in the discussion stage, they include measures that would:
* **Increase fuel taxes by $0.06** per gallon
* **Increase vehicle, motorcycle, and trailer registration fees $42 -$72** a year
* **Increase vehicle titling fee by $139** per title
* **Increase road usage charge by 5%** of gas tax (or $340 per year)
* **Create a statewide transit payroll tax** that is 0.1% of Oregon employees' wages

As your representative, I believe it's important that you know what's on the table before decisions are made. These changes could raise costs for families and businesses, especially in rural areas that already face long commutes, limited transit options, and already high costs of living. I'll be voicing concerns in committee today to make sure rural Oregon isn't left behind. But your voice matters too. _**Please take a few minutes to share your thoughts by reaching out to the committee directly.**_ You can submit a written testimony here (even just a few words make an impact): | [Submit Written Testimony](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=pAGH_0KF-67RjzK9VF0hp5OD23c3BIwCe66hk3dhLWfWr7orrzUKMNCCYrJndFa_L-lhDn8iF2dKoFiG6E6PiRfdEnHUN56o0RHsDpDEu1TwGXSr9738cGY2PBhyW1U7hapmtK8C4PbaEIRtolRLRrKT7j56yEqk5fxizM-4zhANHQRu-1L6dY-R_qHWhXhDSH8fa0Umbn50P7hOx6CRssH717XO4bWSMhxUgFYsanFs19r7CZzEN0blsm-pG4G_1w2)
---

If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
[https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025I1/Testimony/JCTF?meetingDate=2025-08-25-15-00](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=pAGH_0KF-67RjzK9VF0hp5OD23c3BIwCe66hk3dhLWfWr7orrzUKMNCCYrJndFa__Kx6Z8SDVbxH3lTZZucekAUAq1L_m8UwgUg1OHV-vyNJe_XOTcMUV8vtCc68OR8vcw9zgDV_uFerF4QJs3OEo9wM9Rhy_ZzVHFxPt17-hGeoW1eHT4amMlkJZ_7VUFatzCXBseuhTiYKG_RwSU8-Rw_bFaeHH9tN_Q1zyfWjES4n3YoO-sgzCDiln586piLsAA2)
Together, we can ensure that transportation policy works for everyone in Oregon--not just Portland and the metro area.
Thank you for staying engaged,

**Vikki Breese-Iverson**
State Representative | House District 59
**P.S.** To keep fighting these costly tax hikes and stand up for rural Oregon, I rely on supporters like you. Will you chip in today to help fuel our campaign?
[Contribute Today](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQ8FT-opFxF80UHNfkdU2CpcJU-4n-Xvsj1tZtfMnuGJNUNPSaEyrx9THyTpyCZPuceBxMnEO56ZnQqNPDo9XzluhHLpug0jzPK7LFLNnqxw17uoPCW7DLmFkcfWxgoTWzMP6ZUCX66tiitABKCUExZtO-sA_XbCevB0jc_iceHowE0)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I'm asking you to endorse voting by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Tons of people send their ballots by mail, and they have for decades. It's safe and secure, even if Trump says otherwise.
#

Folks, this is Mark Kelly. Do you have a second?
If you're still with me, I'm respectfully asking you to sign on here and endorse voting by mail:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/VBM-July25-Endorse**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/VBM-July25-Endorse/?refcode=em250825-1-700&akid=6161%2E6688874%2ElOyhgh)
Tons of people send their ballots by mail, and they have for decades. It's safe and secure, even if Trump says otherwise.
He's trying to make it harder for people to vote because he thinks he's going to lose a bunch of elections next year.
[**He's probably right, but if we're going to defeat Trump's candidates up and down the ballot next year, we've got to defend our elections now. So please, add your name and endorse voting by mail by using this link.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/VBM-July25-Endorse/?refcode=em250825-1-700&akid=6161%2E6688874%2ElOyhgh)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/VBM-July25-Endorse/?refcode=em250825-1-700&akid=6161%2E6688874%2ElOyhgh)**
Thanks a lot,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6161%2E6688874%2ElOyhgh).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. **[If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4941?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=656%2E49239%2ERidTg-)** | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4939?t=9&akid=656%2E49239%2ERidTg-)

You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Kyle (Team Heidi Hall for Congress)
subject: Here's our plan for the rest of August
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend, I'm Kyle, a member of Team Heidi Hall.
I wanted to reach out to give you an important campaign update and let you know what's going on behind the scenes and what our plan for the rest of August is.
No matter the result of the redistricting vote this year, we're fighting to win. I want to tell you how Heidi can use your help.
Heidi and our team have been planning ahead and doing the work needed to build on the momentum that we've gained through:
✅ Earning key endorsements
✅ Getting our campaign in the headlines here in CA and nationwide
✅ Keeping up with our critical monthly fundraising goals
Friend, your role in helping us keep this momentum to push our campaign forward is incredibly meaningful.
A major component of being able to do the work that we need to do behind the scenes is having your grassroots support. Without it, we wouldn't have the resources to continue spreading our message, continue earning support, or have the team that's needed to grow our grassroots movement to flip this seat blue.
Friend, we need you on our team. Can you please donate what you can to help us raise the remaining $16,590 we need to reach our online fundraising goal for August? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
HELP US REACH OUR GOAL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Thank you for your support,
Kyle
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250825_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

## _PolitiBrawl Streetcast:_
# Asking Wall St. traders if they beat Nancy Pelosi's stock portfolio
Congresswoman Nancy Pelosi is one of the most successful stock traders of all time, with 54% returns last year, **[beating most major hedge funds in the U.S.](https://substack.com/redirect/c4794777-309a-4cab-bc9b-b86446601837?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller **[asked traders on Wall Street](https://substack.com/redirect/02dc8202-5831-4313-bf1d-b50b318f2dc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** if their portfolios beat Pelosi in 2024.
Their responses will SHOCK you...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/02dc8202-5831-4313-bf1d-b50b318f2dc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/02dc8202-5831-4313-bf1d-b50b318f2dc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump says "we're just gonna do it" to question about "Department of War" renaming
A reporter asked President Donald Trump how he will rename the Department of Defense to "The Department of War" without an act of congress.
**["We're just gonna do it,"](https://substack.com/redirect/8f6943e6-1412-4ae3-9041-1dffa523058b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Trump answered, unbothered by the apparent red tape in his way. "I'm sure Congress will go along if we need that."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/679b0479-5334-41ed-90ac-e67fbb30315b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump stated "I don't want to be defense only. We want offense too,"** suggesting the rebrand aligns with his emphasis on military strength and his criticism that political correctness drove the original name change under President Truman in 1947.
* **Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth supports the change** \- Hegseth, who has vowed to restore the department's "warrior ethos," polled his X followers in March about preferring "Department of Defense" versus "Department of War," with the majority choosing the latter option.
* **Congressional approval likely required for official name change** \- While Trump indicated the rebranding is imminent, the Pentagon would likely need Congress to approve any name change since the Defense Department was established by decades-old legislation that created the unified military structure after World War II.

* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Deep State](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[Fires A Warning Shot](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[At Your Vote](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[And](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Your Future](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America? _**Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?**_
Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They _ARE NOT_ leaving things up to chance. They are helping to _**protect themselves**_ in case the Deep State has one more potential _ace up their sleeve._
**[-> Discover how hard-working American Patriots are helping defend their futures from the ](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Deep State](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/e77be46d-6851-4cee-8fda-9ce49f3a8afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Trump signs executive order outlawing burning the flag**
President Donald Trump **[signed an executive order Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/573f17f1-79a8-4900-a41b-7607bd976a16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** directing Attorney General Pam Bondi to prosecute those who violate laws involving flag desecration and pursue litigation to clarify First Amendment scope regarding flag burning, calling it "uniquely and inherently offensive."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/573f17f1-79a8-4900-a41b-7607bd976a16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Order targets foreign nationals with immigration consequences** \- The executive order directs the attorney general and homeland security secretary to deny, revoke, or terminate visas and immigration benefits for non-citizens who desecrate the American flag, wherever legally permissible under applicable law.

### Watch: Trump signs flag burning EO
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0bcf0849-fd64-413c-958a-52a4ee80fb75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Recent flag burning incidents cited as justification** \- The order follows numerous instances of flag desecration, including anti-Israel protesters burning flags outside the Democratic National Convention in Chicago, during Netanyahu's congressional address, and anti-ICE protesters in Los Angeles who burned American flags while waving Mexican flags during immigration raids.
* **Part of broader patriotism restoration campaign** \- The flag protection order follows other Trump patriotic initiatives including banning State Department offices from flying non-American flags, personally funding two massive 88-foot American flags installed at the White House, and responding to the growth of flag protests that began with Colin Kaepernick's kneeling in 2016.

* * *
## [Trump to file lawsuit against blue slipping "scam" slowing his judicial appointments](https://substack.com/redirect/e78f4598-2a03-4056-b20d-a723c9f412bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth supports the change \- Hegseth, who has vowed to restore the department's "warrior ethos," polled his X followers in March about preferring "Department of Defense" versus "Department of War," with the majority choosing the latter option. Congressional approval likely required for official name change \- While Trump indicated the rebranding is imminent, the Pentagon would likely need Congress to approve any name change since the Defense Department was established by decades-old legislation that created the unified military structure after World War II. | | ---|---|--- It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to put Trump behind bars. To bankrupt him through legal fees. And to even assassinate him ... twice! But President Trump has prevailed each and every time. President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to "demolish the deep state, " and claims this to be his " final battle" against these shadowy figures. But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun. Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always. So, how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America? Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again? Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They ARE NOT leaving things up to chance. They are helping to protect themselves in case the Deep State has one more potential ace up their sleeve. Trump signs executive order outlawing burning the flag President Donald Trump directing Attorney General Pam Bondi to prosecute those who violate laws involving flag desecration and pursue litigation to clarify First Amendment scope regarding flag burning, calling it "uniquely and inherently offensive." | | ---|---|--- Order targets foreign nationals with immigration consequences \- The executive order directs the attorney general and homeland security secretary to deny, revoke, or terminate visas and immigration benefits for non-citizens who desecrate the American flag, wherever legally permissible under applicable law. Watch: Trump signs flag burning EO Recent flag burning incidents cited as justification \- The order follows numerous instances of flag desecration, including anti-Israel protesters burning flags outside the Democratic National Convention in Chicago, during Netanyahu's congressional address, and anti-ICE protesters in Los Angeles who burned American flags while waving Mexican flags during immigration raids. Part of broader patriotism restoration campaign \- The flag protection order follows other Trump patriotic initiatives including banning State Department offices from flying non-American flags, personally funding two massive 88-foot American flags installed at the White House, and responding to the growth of flag protests that began with Colin Kaepernick's kneeling in 2016. | | | | ---|---|--- | 6:55 PM | | | POLL Should members of congress be banned from trading stocks? | ? ? ? body:
Chrissy is working to preserve Valley Forge as a site for refuge and renewal
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985057/565565218/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HWMEMpzW0jvh07QORjHY4uvU6MSTFff8J2PDjlTcUf8=&emci=328ddde7-d681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ba75aca6-fa81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)

**During the Revolutionary War, George Washington's army spent the winter of 1777-78 at Valley Forge here in Pennsylvania's Sixth district. **
The camp went down in history: not only for the 2,000 lives lost over the brutal winter, but also for the robust training and aid delivered by foreign allies. And as fighting resumed in the spring, the transformed Continental Army went on to turn the tide for American independence.
**Now designated as Valley Forge National Historical Park, its 3,500 acres of green spaces, historic structures, and monuments bring 2 million visitors to our district yearly to learn, to take a walk, and to picnic. I’m working to pass my bill, the Valley Forge Park Realignment Permit and Promise Act, to make it easier for park officials to make improvements.**

National parks like Valley Forge are in trouble as President Trump and his Republican allies in Congress, cut their budgets and whitewash our history. The National Park Service has already lost a quarter of its workforce this year, saw its budget cut by $267 million in the recently enacted Republican Budget Bill, and will see another $1 billion cut if the President’s 2026 budget is signed into law.

Our public parks are a national treasure. [**Will you sign Chrissy's petition in support of protecting our national parks today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985058/565565219/-481502325?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1168-su-nd&refcode=jtk1168-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HWMEMpzW0jvh07QORjHY4uvU6MSTFff8J2PDjlTcUf8=&emci=328ddde7-d681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ba75aca6-fa81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)
Derek, Democrats don’t have the votes right now to stop the President and his Republican allies in Congress but we do have our voices. And we shouldn’t be silent. **We’re hoping for 5,000 signatures on our petition. Will you help her keep up the fight for our public lands, and the dedicated workers who care for them in Pennsylvania and nationwide.**
[**Will you please add your voice to the call to protect our national parks before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985059/565565220/-481502325?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1168-su-nd&refcode=jtk1168-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HWMEMpzW0jvh07QORjHY4uvU6MSTFff8J2PDjlTcUf8=&emci=328ddde7-d681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ba75aca6-fa81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)

"It is a backdoor for privatizing Social Security."
| | |
---
Peter – Trump’s Treasury secretary said the quiet part out loud:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985062/565565279/-1039551688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk538-su-nd&refcode=jtk538-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=0&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9wcsFfaCyfYMnt6t3jxhQHGfTysq25vKJw4xuxHaik=&emci=75bc7759-207d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=b775aca6-fa81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13116610)
Republicans are cooking up a secret backdoor for privatizing Social Security, which will:
* Turn your guaranteed retirement into a Wall Street gamble
* Let big banks and hedge funds play with your hard-earned money
* Weaken the system so it can “fail” – and they can sell it for parts

_Privatization_ is just another word for stealing your benefits and handing them to Wall Street. **[If the idea disgusts you as much as it disgusts me, then please be one of the 15,000 supporters I'm counting on to sign my petition by 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985063/565565280/-1039551688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk538-su-nd&refcode=jtk538-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=0&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9wcsFfaCyfYMnt6t3jxhQHGfTysq25vKJw4xuxHaik=&emci=75bc7759-207d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=b775aca6-fa81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13116610)**
Social Security is a promise the U.S. government made to all working Americans. To sell it out would be to SHRED that promise – and endanger every American's hope of retiring with dignity.

Not on my watch.
So we need to make it crystal clear that the American people won't stand for the Trump administration's pro-billionaire attacks on this critical lifeline.

**Please, Peter, add your voice now to tell the GOP loud and clear: [hands OFF Social Security.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985064/565565281/-1039551688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk538-su-nd&refcode=jtk538-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=0&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9wcsFfaCyfYMnt6t3jxhQHGfTysq25vKJw4xuxHaik=&emci=75bc7759-207d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=b775aca6-fa81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13116610)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Patty Murray

name: Eugene Vindman
subject: 6 years ago, my life changed forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985048/565565207/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.25_Eugene-Vindman-Split-NC_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWgnuNpCsA7YPCQlb0welOu99U0thnxXkigDqgCR1Yg=)
6 years ago, Trump made the phone call that forever altered the lives of me and my twin brother. On July 25, 2019, my brother, Alexander Vindman, listened as President Trump attempted to extort our ally, Ukraine, by withholding military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated Joe Biden. At the time, I was serving as the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House. After Alex reported the call to me, my brother and I made the fateful decision to do our patriotic duty and stand up to Donald Trump at the risk of our decades-long military careers. **We blew the whistle on him and reported his corrupt phone call with Ukraine up the chain of command. Our actions eventually led to his impeachment, and Trump retaliated by firing us from our posts.** The decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump cost my brother and me our military careers. But over two decades ago, I swore an oath to protect our country and our Constitution from threats, foreign and domestic, and I would not let Trump deter me from that duty. I ran for Congress last year to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy. I’ve done everything in my power to hold Trump and his MAGA cronies accountable — no matter the political cost — because I’ll never stop defending truth, democracy, and working Americans. But speaking out comes with consequences. I’m already one of the GOP’s top targets in the House, and National Republicans have already dumped millions into ads smearing and attacking me. Republicans have made it clear that they’ll spare no resources in kicking me out of Congress, and it’s only going to get worse from here. So today, on the 6th anniversary of the day that changed my and my brother’s lives, I am asking you to support my campaign so I can continue defending our democracy and fighting for you in Congress. **[_Can you please split $10 between my campaign for Congress and Off the Sidelines PAC today? Every dollar will help us fight against the MAGA extremists who will do anything to take our movement down._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985049/565565208/463250139?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.25_Eugene-Vindman-Split-NC_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWgnuNpCsA7YPCQlb0welOu99U0thnxXkigDqgCR1Yg=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Eugene Vindman and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113985050/565565209/463250139?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.25_Eugene-Vindman-Split-NC_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjc1YWNhNi1mYTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWgnuNpCsA7YPCQlb0welOu99U0thnxXkigDqgCR1Yg=)

clean_body: | = 6 years ago, Trump made the phone call that forever altered the lives of me and my twin brother. On July 25, 2019, my brother, Alexander Vindman, listened as President Trump attempted to extort our ally, Ukraine, by withholding military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated Joe Biden. At the time, I was serving as the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House. After Alex reported the call to me, my brother and I made the fateful decision to do our patriotic duty and stand up to Donald Trump at the risk of our decades-long military careers. We blew the whistle on him and reported his corrupt phone call with Ukraine up the chain of command. Our actions eventually led to his impeachment, and Trump retaliated by firing us from our posts. The decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump cost my brother and me our military careers. But over two decades ago, I swore an oath to protect our country and our Constitution from threats, foreign and domestic, and I would not let Trump deter me from that duty. I ran for Congress last year to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy. I’ve done everything in my power to hold Trump and his MAGA cronies accountable — no matter the political cost — because I’ll never stop defending truth, democracy, and working Americans. But speaking out comes with consequences. I’m already one of the GOP’s top targets in the House, and National Republicans have already dumped millions into ads smearing and attacking me. Republicans have made it clear that they’ll spare no resources in kicking me out of Congress, and it’s only going to get worse from here. So today, on the 6th anniversary of the day that changed my and my brother’s lives, I am asking you to support my campaign so I can continue defending our democracy and fighting for you in Congress. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Eugene Vindman and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Six years ago, my life changed forever. I chose to defend our democracy, and today, I still live by that purpose. So every day, when I am fighting against extremism on the House floor, know that I could not have done it without you. Thank you, Eugene Vindman © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Jon Ossoff for GA
subject: Heads in the sand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
There is a very good chance this ends up being the most expensive election in U.S. Senate history.
#

**[Peter, we’re respectfully asking you to give $5 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250825-1-f&t=1&akid=678%2E5691347%2EDMFF_Q)
Before you click away, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why we’re asking, and why your donation is so important to our success, particularly right now.
Here goes:
**Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Donald Trump won.**
_That means that he is without a doubt MAGA’s TOP priority for defeat._
It’s why they’ve already spent millions of dollars on attack ads, and it’s why just last week they sent JD Vance to Georgia to come after Jon.
It’s also why, before this race is over, there is a very good chance it ends up being the most expensive election in U.S. Senate history.
Peter, you know that Jon hates having to ask for money. If it was up to him, we’d have overturned _Citizens United_ years ago and we wouldn’t have shady dark-money Super PACs spending hundreds of millions of dollars to influence our elections.
But that is the reality we’re facing. And we can’t just stick our heads in the sand and hope for the best. There is too much on the line.
**We know that a single donation might not seem like much compared to the millions flooding our political system, but _remember:_ it’s not just you adding your $5 — it’s thousands of people across the country all pitching in. And it adds up fast. **
**[So we are humbly asking: Can Jon count on you to make a $5 contribution today? We wish we didn’t have to ask, but there’s no way we’ll be able to compete without lots of donations from people like you, Peter.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250825-1-f&t=2&akid=678%2E5691347%2EDMFF_Q)

name: Team McBride
subject: This is un-American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Reject the Trump administration’s cruel bigotry.
#
Donald Trump is stripping trans military members of their hard-earned retirement benefits.
Earlier this month, we learned that thousands of qualified, brave, and battle-tested service members are being discharged from the military because they dared to live openly as transgender.
**Now, they’re also losing access to the retirement benefits.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250825-1?refcode=em20250825-2287&refcode2=2287_21716_vBBPDc&akid=2287%2E21716%2EvBBPDc)
Attacking and stealing from patriots for who they are is not just wrong — it’s un-American and makes our country _less safe_.
**As the only trans member in Congress, Sarah refuses to stay silent — no matter how many MAGA attacks are thrown her way.** If you’re with her, she needs your support now to continue advocating for our trans service members and working people everywhere.
[**Will you pitch in a grassroots donation of any amount to support Sarah and reject the Trump administration’s cruel bigotry?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250825-1?refcode=em20250825-2287&refcode2=2287_21716_vBBPDc&akid=2287%2E21716%2EvBBPDc)

Elected leaders need to stand for something more than a political party or personal power. Our people deserve nothing less than leaders who will do everything possible to make their lives better. _That’s why I’m running for Senate._ [**This is the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and The Hill is already calling it the #1 most likely to flip. Sadly, this is nothing new to me. I've borne _venomous_ insults and been called so many _horrible_ names throughout the years.
The "tolerant" Left will turn racist and ugly the instant a black woman decides to reject the Democrat party and embrace common sense. Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.
I'm the sitting Lieutenant Governor, second in command in the former Capitol of the Confederate States. I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. There is no place for this disgusting hatred in our nation. I won't let their insults define me, and I certainly won't let them slow me down!
I didn't become the first black, female Lt. Governor of Virginia by playing the victim. I did it by embracing my conservative values and trusting in God!
Leftists can spew whatever racist nonsense they like, but I will win the race for Governor of Virginia with you on my side.

clean_body: | | | | | is a sign that a racist protester held up as I spoke to the Arlington County School Board about keeping our girls safe.Fellow American - I'm disgusted, but not surprised. Sadly, this is nothing new to me. I've borne venomous insults and been called so many horrible names throughout the years. The "tolerant" Left will turn racist and ugly the instant a black woman decides to reject the Democrat party and embrace common sense. Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin. I'm the sitting Lieutenant Governor, second in command in the former Capitol of the Confederate States. I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. There is no place for this disgusting hatred in our nation. I won't let their insults define me, and I certainly won't let them slow me down! I didn't become the first black, female Lt. Governor of Virginia by playing the victim. I did it by embracing my conservative values and trusting in God! Leftists can spew whatever racist nonsense they like, but I will win the race for Governor of Virginia with you on my side. Here's my call to action: back against the liberal media and the entire Democrat establishment is never easy, Fellow American. With patriots like you on my side, I know we will win in November and beyond. Thanks for your support. God bless you, Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA) | | | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. name: Lisa Ramirez
subject: I’m running for Congress in CA-40!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Hi friend, I’m Lisa Ramirez, and I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s 40th District!**

This race is going to be one of the tightest in the nation for 2026, and I’m ready to flip it from red to blue. But it takes a strong grassroots team to win as close as this one, so I’ll need all hands on deck. [Will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help us flip this seat? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93208?t=6&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ) | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93209?t=7&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
---
I grew up middle class and learned early on what it means to work hard and make something out of nothing. At the age of 12, I started helping out at my family’s restaurant, then waitressed through college and worked full-time to put myself through law school. I learned quickly how to balance work and school in order to succeed. But this isn’t a story about struggle, _it’s a promise of the future that hard work and dedication can build._

I studied law so that I could dedicate my life to standing up for those who are too often left behind: seniors struggling to access their hard-earned benefits, small business owners buried in red tape, survivors of domestic violence and human trafficking, individuals with special needs, and so many others. And now, as the very laws meant to protect us are putting us in danger, I am committed to uniting, inspiring, and leading our county to take a stand for the future of our country.

I’ve seen firsthand the horrific effects of unjust immigration policies that divide families, and I’ve fought against them. When Narciso Barranco, a hardworking father of three sons serving our country in the Marines, was unlawfully detained by ICE, I stood in his corner. I advocated for him until he was able to come home to his family and speak for himself.

_For the folks I represent, it’s never about money; it’s their freedom, family, and future at stake._

The politics of hate we are experiencing right now is dividing our country and destroying our economy. We, as the American people, have a say in the matter. It is time that we come together and create a future where the contribution of every American is welcomed and valued, where families are strengthened and united, where there is order and opportunity, and where we are not just surviving but thriving. It is time that we reclaim our democracy and become active participants in the future of this country.

**Our current representatives in Congress are out of touch with the needs of the people, nor do they care about what’s in our best interest. Despite promises to make life more affordable, costs are rising. Healthcare is about to get a whole lot more expensive, many children are being left behind, and the reality is young people who call this community home can’t afford to live here as adults. Decent wages and job opportunities are real challenges going unaddressed. It’s time for change.**

I’m running for Congress because I care, and I believe that what makes our country great is not its power, position, or politics. **It’s the people.** And we have the power to create a great future together.

[We’re building a grassroots campaign powered by people like you. Will you join me in kickstarting our campaign for change and split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign? Every dollar counts because every person matters.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93208?t=8&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lisa Ramirez and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93209?t=9&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93210?t=10&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93211?t=11&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93212?t=12&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93208?t=13&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
With Gratitude,
Lisa Ramirez
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93208?t=14&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20983%2E878179%2EJcAXDQ)

Today's show is sponsored by:
**Concerned Women For America**
Concerned Women For America focuses on seven core issues: family, sanctity of life, religious liberty, parental choice in education, fighting sexual exploitation, national sovereignty, and support for Israel. CWA knows what a woman is. CWA trains women to become grassroots leaders, speak into the culture, pray, testify, and lobby. If you donate $20 you will get CEO & President Penny Nance's new book A Woman's Guide, Seven Rules for Success in Business and Life. Head to https://concernedwomen.org/spicer/to donate today!
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/
I was in attendance at the Sixteenth Annual Meeting of the International Catholic Legislators Network. It was an honor to meet the first American Pope as he spoke about authentic human flourishing. The Texas Senate passed a new Republican-drawn Congressional map. Former Governor of Texas, Rick Perry is here to weigh in as Texas has become the fastest growing state in the nation as people flee over taxed, over regulated, over litigated blue states. These folks move to Texas in record numbers to enjoy the Republican policies and deserve to be represented in Congress. As the former Secretary of Energy, Rick Perry is confident that America will win the race that powers the future: AI data centers. As President Trump abolishes woke, liberal policies that failed, nuclear energy is necessary to power these AI data centers. This is the Manhattan Project of our time and Governor Perry is confident the United States will come out on top. Governor Perry is leading the effort in making ibogaine for veterans and those struggling with addiction available as an effective treatment. The once demonized hallucinogenic has been proven in a Stanford study to effectively treat traumatic brain injury. With veterans like Marcus Luttrell and others singing the praises of ibogaine, the treatment has the potential to save hundreds of thousands to millions of lives of those suffering from addiction, traumatic brain injury and PTSD.
Featuring:
**Secretary Rick Perry**
Former Governor | Texas
Former Secretary of Energy

And he says he got the idea straight from Vladimir Putin, who told him that: _**“your election was rigged because you have mail-in voting.”**_ It’s as outrageous as it is dangerous. Trump is already rewriting election rules, intimidating officials, and pardoning those who tried to overturn the 2020 election. And unlike last time, the safeguards that stopped him at the federal level – career civil servants, the Justice Department – are gone. Make no mistake: the fight for democracy will come down to the Secretaries of State, along with state and local leaders, who run our elections and certify every vote. And like 2020, it will come down to what happens in the courtroom, too. **That’s why we created the DASS Legal Fund – to give Democratic Secretaries of State and their teams the resources they need to defend voters, fight back against bogus GOP lawsuits, and protect every ballot.** [**But we can’t do it without you. body:
I hope you'll have my back again today.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113986364/565569520/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-25_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJhMTAwZTktZmY4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7JN9Eb1nuD1ZmzTTdYSZ9_bKRWkmKIzqbn7ggex-9-U=)
A few days ago, Roanoke College released a new poll of our race for Governor.
In May, they claimed we were ahead by 17 points. _Last week, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points._
Peter, I'll put it plainly: **This election will be really close.**
We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025.

clean_body: I hope you'll have my back again today. = A few days ago, Roanoke College released a new poll of our race for Governor. In May, they claimed we were ahead by 17 points. Last week, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points. Peter, I'll put it plainly: This election will be really close. We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025. But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support. = = = = = = = It's a point of pride that so many of you have invested in my campaign. I hope you'll have my back again today. Thank you so much, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

Dear Friend, You are probably aware of shootings and attacks on our police officers increasing over the last few weeks. With a total of 198 officers being shot while in the line of duty this year.
---

---
In Tampa one officer was shot while he was standing in front of his station. In Kansas City a deputy sheriff was shot and killed while responding to a domestic violence call. And in Baton Rouge another officer was intentionally rammed and runover by a criminal who was later caught because he was bragging about the barbaric crime on social media. Friend, I’m sorry to have to recap these horror stories for you, but these tragic events remind me of what would’ve happened to Officer Brad Lunsford and his fellow officer if Brad hadn’t responded quickly and decisively in following his training. Now instead of being awarded for his courage and heroism, Brad is facing 11 years in prison because Soros-funded New Mexico Attorney General Raul Torrez hates the police. **[Friend, will you join us in supporting Brad Lunsford’s fight for justice?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Like every other Soros-backed prosecutor, Torrez is following a political playbook: crack down on innocent officers and let offenders go free. Their hatred for police is so great that they’ll do anything to smear their good names and put them behind bars. Just look at Brad’s fiasco of a trial. Not only did one of the jurors conceal their BLM activism, but now Raul Torrez is defending the juror who failed to disclose their documented anti-police bias at the New Mexico supreme court! Friend, this isn’t merely unjust...it’s criminal. Which is why the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doubling down in our efforts to support Officer Lunsford and provide the best legal defense possible. If you’ve heard of LELDF you know that we organize and fund the successful legal defense of good officers wrongly charged for crimes – like Officer Brad Lunsford. Helping to hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. **[As we prepare leading up to Brad's hearing on September 19th, will show your support by donating $35 or more to fund Brad’s defense?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your tax-deductible donation is more than a financial help to the Lunsford family as they continue to deal with politically motivated battles in court – it’s a sign of hope for them to know that they’re not alone in this fight. As the country faces increasing violence against our law enforcement, thank you for choosing to stand with our men and women in blue.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
